authors_text: Axi Niu,Kang Zhang,Trung X. Pham,Jinqiu Sun,Yu Zhu,In So Kweon,Yanning Zhang
title: CDPMSR: Conditional Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Single Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: CDPMSR：单图像超分辨率的条件扩散概率模型
abstract: Diffusion probabilistic models (DPM) have been widely adopted in image-to-image translation to generate high-quality images. Prior attempts at applying the DPM to image super-resolution (SR) have shown that iteratively refining a pure Gaussian noise with a conditional image using a U-Net trained on denoising at various-level noises can help obtain a satisfied high-resolution image for the low-resolution one. To further improve the performance and simplify current DPM-based super-resolution methods, we propose a simple but non-trivial DPM-based super-resolution post-process framework,i.e., cDPMSR. After applying a pre-trained SR model on the to-be-test LR image to provide the conditional input, we adapt the standard DPM to conduct conditional image generation and perform super-resolution through a deterministic iterative denoising process. Our method surpasses prior attempts on both qualitative and quantitative results and can generate more photo-realistic counterparts for the low-resolution images with various benchmark datasets including Set5, Set14, Urban100, BSD100, and Manga109. Code will be published after accepted.
summary: Diffusion probabilistic models (DPM) have been widely adopted in image-to-image translation to generate high-quality images. Prior attempts at applying the DPM to image super-resolution (SR) have shown that iteratively refining a pure Gaussian noise with a conditional image using a U-Net trained on denoising at various-level noises can help obtain a satisfied high-resolution image for the low-resolution one. To further improve the performance and simplify current DPM-based super-resolution methods, we propose a simple but non-trivial DPM-based super-resolution post-process framework,i.e., cDPMSR. After applying a pre-trained SR model on the to-be-test LR image to provide the conditional input, we adapt the standard DPM to conduct conditional image generation and perform super-resolution through a deterministic iterative denoising process. Our method surpasses prior attempts on both qualitative and quantitative results and can generate more photo-realistic counterparts for the low-resolution images with various benchmark datasets including Set5, Set14, Urban100, BSD100, and Manga109. Code will be published after accepted.
abstract_zh: 扩散概率模型（DPM）已广泛应用于图像到图像的转换中以生成高质量图像。之前将 DPM 应用于图像超分辨率 (SR) 的尝试表明，使用经过不同级别噪声去噪训练的 U-Net，通过条件图像迭代地细化纯高斯噪声，可以帮助获得令人满意的低分辨率高分辨率图像。为了进一步提高性能并简化当前基于 DPM 的超分辨率方法，我们提出了一种简单但不平凡的基于 DPM 的超分辨率后处理框架，即 cDPMSR。在待测试的 LR 图像上应用预训练的 SR 模型以提供条件输入后，我们采用标准 DPM 进行条件图像生成，并通过确定性迭代去噪过程执行超分辨率。我们的方法在定性和定量结果上都超越了之前的尝试，并且可以使用各种基准数据集（包括 Set5、Set14、Urban100、BSD100 和 Manga109）为低分辨率图像生成更加逼真的对应图像。代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于条件扩散概率模型的单图像超分辨率方法cDPMSR，通过确定性迭代去噪过程提升低分辨率图像的超分辨率效果。
AI.motivation: 为提升扩散概率模型（DPM）在图像超分辨率中的性能并简化现有方法，提出更高效的后处理框架。
AI.method: 基于预训练超分辨率模型生成条件输入，结合标准DPM进行确定性迭代去噪，实现高效超分辨率。
AI.result: 在Set5、Set14等数据集上实现更逼真的超分辨率图像，定性和定量结果均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: cDPMSR通过简化DPM流程并结合预训练模型，有效提升了超分辨率效果，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: William Chen,Brian Yan,Jiatong Shi,Yifan Peng,Soumi Maiti,Shinji Watanabe
title: Improving Massively Multilingual ASR With Auxiliary CTC Objectives
title_zh: 通过辅助 CTC 目标改进大规模多语言 ASR
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, accepted at ICASSP 2023; fixed typo and URL in abstract
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, accepted at ICASSP 2023; fixed typo and URL in abstract
abstract: Multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models have extended the usability of speech technologies to a wide variety of languages. With how many languages these models have to handle, however, a key to understanding their imbalanced performance across different languages is to examine if the model actually knows which language it should transcribe. In this paper, we introduce our work on improving performance on FLEURS, a 102-language open ASR benchmark, by conditioning the entire model on language identity (LID). We investigate techniques inspired from recent Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) studies to help the model handle the large number of languages, conditioning on the LID predictions of auxiliary tasks. Our experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our technique over standard CTC/Attention-based hybrid models. Furthermore, our state-of-the-art systems using self-supervised models with the Conformer architecture improve over the results of prior work on FLEURS by a relative 28.4% CER. Trained models and reproducible recipes are available at https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs2/fleurs/asr1 .
summary: Multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models have extended the usability of speech technologies to a wide variety of languages. With how many languages these models have to handle, however, a key to understanding their imbalanced performance across different languages is to examine if the model actually knows which language it should transcribe. In this paper, we introduce our work on improving performance on FLEURS, a 102-language open ASR benchmark, by conditioning the entire model on language identity (LID). We investigate techniques inspired from recent Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) studies to help the model handle the large number of languages, conditioning on the LID predictions of auxiliary tasks. Our experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our technique over standard CTC/Attention-based hybrid models. Furthermore, our state-of-the-art systems using self-supervised models with the Conformer architecture improve over the results of prior work on FLEURS by a relative 28.4% CER. Trained models and reproducible recipes are available at https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs2/fleurs/asr1 .
abstract_zh: 多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型已将语音技术的可用性扩展到多种语言。然而，这些模型必须处理多少种语言，了解它们在不同语言之间的不平衡性能的关键是检查模型是否确实知道它应该转录哪种语言。在本文中，我们介绍了通过根据语言同一性 (LID) 调节整个模型来提高 FLEURS（102 种语言的开放 ASR 基准）性能的工作。我们研究了受最近联结主义时间分类 (CTC) 研究启发的技术，以帮助模型处理大量语言，以辅助任务的 LID 预测为条件。我们的实验结果证明了我们的技术相对于标准 CTC/基于注意力的混合模型的有效性。此外，我们最先进的系统使用具有 Conformer 架构的自监督模型，比 FLEURS 之前的工作结果提高了相对 28.4% 的 CER。经过训练的模型和可重现的配方可在 https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs2/fleurs/asr1 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过辅助CTC目标改进多语言语音识别模型在102种语言上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理大量语言时表现不均衡，需验证模型是否能正确识别语言身份以提升效果。
AI.method: 基于CTC研究设计辅助任务，通过语言身份（LID）条件训练模型，并采用Conformer架构的自监督模型。
AI.result: 在FLEURS基准测试中，相对字符错误率（CER）较之前工作降低28.4%，并开源了训练代码。
AI.conclusion: 辅助CTC目标与LID条件化有效提升多语言ASR性能，验证了方法的可行性与先进性。

authors_text: Ahmed Imtiaz Humayun,Randall Balestriero,Guha Balakrishnan,Richard Baraniuk
title: SplineCam: Exact Visualization and Characterization of Deep Network Geometry and Decision Boundaries
title_zh: SplineCam：深层网络几何和决策边界的精确可视化和表征
abstract: Current Deep Network (DN) visualization and interpretability methods rely heavily on data space visualizations such as scoring which dimensions of the data are responsible for their associated prediction or generating new data features or samples that best match a given DN unit or representation. In this paper, we go one step further by developing the first provably exact method for computing the geometry of a DN's mapping - including its decision boundary - over a specified region of the data space. By leveraging the theory of Continuous Piece-Wise Linear (CPWL) spline DNs, SplineCam exactly computes a DNs geometry without resorting to approximations such as sampling or architecture simplification. SplineCam applies to any DN architecture based on CPWL nonlinearities, including (leaky-)ReLU, absolute value, maxout, and max-pooling and can also be applied to regression DNs such as implicit neural representations. Beyond decision boundary visualization and characterization, SplineCam enables one to compare architectures, measure generalizability and sample from the decision boundary on or off the manifold. Project Website: bit.ly/splinecam.
summary: Current Deep Network (DN) visualization and interpretability methods rely heavily on data space visualizations such as scoring which dimensions of the data are responsible for their associated prediction or generating new data features or samples that best match a given DN unit or representation. In this paper, we go one step further by developing the first provably exact method for computing the geometry of a DN's mapping - including its decision boundary - over a specified region of the data space. By leveraging the theory of Continuous Piece-Wise Linear (CPWL) spline DNs, SplineCam exactly computes a DNs geometry without resorting to approximations such as sampling or architecture simplification. SplineCam applies to any DN architecture based on CPWL nonlinearities, including (leaky-)ReLU, absolute value, maxout, and max-pooling and can also be applied to regression DNs such as implicit neural representations. Beyond decision boundary visualization and characterization, SplineCam enables one to compare architectures, measure generalizability and sample from the decision boundary on or off the manifold. Project Website: bit.ly/splinecam.
abstract_zh: 当前的深度网络 (DN) 可视化和可解释性方法在很大程度上依赖于数据空间可视化，例如对负责相关预测的数据维度进行评分，或者生成与给定 DN 单元或表示最匹配的新数据特征或样本。在本文中，我们更进一步，开发了第一个可证明精确的方法，用于计算数据空间指定区域上 DN 映射的几何形状（包括其决策边界）。通过利用连续分段线性 (CPWL) 样条 DN 理论，SplineCam 可以精确计算 DN 几何形状，而无需采用采样或架构简化等近似方法。 SplineCam 适用于任何基于 CPWL 非线性的 DN 架构，包括（泄漏）ReLU、绝对值、maxout 和 max-pooling，也可应用于回归 DN，例如隐式神经表示。除了决策边界可视化和表征之外，SplineCam 还可以比较架构、测量通用性以及从流形上或流形外的决策边界进行采样。项目网站：bit.ly/splinecam。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SplineCam方法，用于精确可视化和表征深度网络的几何结构及决策边界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖数据空间可视化或生成样本等近似手段，难以准确刻画深度网络的几何特性与决策边界。
AI.method: 基于连续分段线性（CPWL）样条网络理论，直接计算深度网络映射几何，无需采样或架构简化，适用于多种非线性激活函数及回归网络。
AI.result: 实现了决策边界精确可视化、网络架构比较、泛化能力评估及决策边界采样等功能。
AI.conclusion: SplineCam为深度网络几何分析提供了精确工具，有助于提升模型可解释性与优化设计。

tldr: 本文提出SplineCam方法，用于精确可视化和表征深度网络的几何结构及决策边界。
motivation: 现有方法依赖数据空间可视化或生成样本等近似手段，难以准确刻画深度网络的几何特性与决策边界。
method: 基于连续分段线性（CPWL）样条网络理论，直接计算深度网络映射几何，无需采样或架构简化，适用于多种非线性激活函数及回归网络。
result: 实现了决策边界精确可视化、网络架构比较、泛化能力评估及决策边界采样等功能。
conclusion: SplineCam为深度网络几何分析提供了精确工具，有助于提升模型可解释性与优化设计。
search_text: SplineCam: Exact Visualization and Characterization of Deep Network Geometry and Decision Boundaries SplineCam：深层网络几何和决策边界的精确可视化和表征 Current Deep Network (DN) visualization and interpretability methods rely heavily on data space visualizations such as scoring which dimensions of the data are responsible for their associated prediction or generating new data features or samples that best match a given DN unit or representation. In this paper, we go one step further by developing the first provably exact method for computing the geometry of a DN's mapping - including its decision boundary - over a specified region of the data space. By leveraging the theory of Continuous Piece-Wise Linear (CPWL) spline DNs, SplineCam exactly computes a DNs geometry without resorting to approximations such as sampling or architecture simplification. SplineCam applies to any DN architecture based on CPWL nonlinearities, including (leaky-)ReLU, absolute value, maxout, and max-pooling and can also be applied to regression DNs such as implicit neural representations. Beyond decision boundary visualization and characterization, SplineCam enables one to compare architectures, measure generalizability and sample from the decision boundary on or off the manifold. Project Website: bit.ly/splinecam. 当前的深度网络 (DN) 可视化和可解释性方法在很大程度上依赖于数据空间可视化，例如对负责相关预测的数据维度进行评分，或者生成与给定 DN 单元或表示最匹配的新数据特征或样本。在本文中，我们更进一步，开发了第一个可证明精确的方法，用于计算数据空间指定区域上 DN 映射的几何形状（包括其决策边界）。通过利用连续分段线性 (CPWL) 样条 DN 理论，SplineCam 可以精确计算 DN 几何形状，而无需采用采样或架构简化等近似方法。 SplineCam 适用于任何基于 CPWL 非线性的 DN 架构，包括（泄漏）ReLU、绝对值、maxout 和 max-pooling，也可应用于回归 DN，例如隐式神经表示。除了决策边界可视化和表征之外，SplineCam 还可以比较架构、测量通用性以及从流形上或流形外的决策边界进行采样。项目网站：bit.ly/splinecam。 本文提出SplineCam方法，用于精确可视化和表征深度网络的几何结构及决策边界。 Ahmed Imtiaz Humayun,Randall Balestriero,Guha Balakrishnan,Richard Baraniuk cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Vickie Ye,Georgios Pavlakos,Jitendra Malik,Angjoo Kanazawa
title: Decoupling Human and Camera Motion from Videos in the Wild
title_zh: 将人类和相机运动与野外视频解耦
abstract: We propose a method to reconstruct global human trajectories from videos in the wild. Our optimization method decouples the camera and human motion, which allows us to place people in the same world coordinate frame. Most existing methods do not model the camera motion; methods that rely on the background pixels to infer 3D human motion usually require a full scene reconstruction, which is often not possible for in-the-wild videos. However, even when existing SLAM systems cannot recover accurate scene reconstructions, the background pixel motion still provides enough signal to constrain the camera motion. We show that relative camera estimates along with data-driven human motion priors can resolve the scene scale ambiguity and recover global human trajectories. Our method robustly recovers the global 3D trajectories of people in challenging in-the-wild videos, such as PoseTrack. We quantify our improvement over existing methods on 3D human dataset Egobody. We further demonstrate that our recovered camera scale allows us to reason about motion of multiple people in a shared coordinate frame, which improves performance of downstream tracking in PoseTrack. Code and video results can be found at https://vye16.github.io/slahmr.
summary: We propose a method to reconstruct global human trajectories from videos in the wild. Our optimization method decouples the camera and human motion, which allows us to place people in the same world coordinate frame. Most existing methods do not model the camera motion; methods that rely on the background pixels to infer 3D human motion usually require a full scene reconstruction, which is often not possible for in-the-wild videos. However, even when existing SLAM systems cannot recover accurate scene reconstructions, the background pixel motion still provides enough signal to constrain the camera motion. We show that relative camera estimates along with data-driven human motion priors can resolve the scene scale ambiguity and recover global human trajectories. Our method robustly recovers the global 3D trajectories of people in challenging in-the-wild videos, such as PoseTrack. We quantify our improvement over existing methods on 3D human dataset Egobody. We further demonstrate that our recovered camera scale allows us to reason about motion of multiple people in a shared coordinate frame, which improves performance of downstream tracking in PoseTrack. Code and video results can be found at https://vye16.github.io/slahmr.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从野外视频重建全球人类轨迹的方法。我们的优化方法将相机和人体运动解耦，这使我们能够将人们放置在同一个世界坐标系中。大多数现有方法并不对相机运动进行建模；依赖背景像素来推断 3D 人体运动的方法通常需要全场景重建，这对于野外视频通常是不可能的。然而，即使现有的 SLAM 系统无法恢复准确的场景重建，背景像素运动仍然提供足够的信号来约束相机运动。我们表明，相对相机估计以及数据驱动的人体运动先验可以解决场景尺度模糊性并恢复全局人体轨迹。我们的方法可以在具有挑战性的野外视频（例如 PoseTrack）中稳健地恢复人们的全局 3D 轨迹。我们在 3D 人体数据集 Egobody 上量化了对现有方法的改进。我们进一步证明，恢复的相机比例允许我们在共享坐标系中推理多人的运动，从而提高 PoseTrack 中下游跟踪的性能。代码和视频结果可以在 https://vye16.github.io/slahmr 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从野外视频中分离人体与相机运动的方法，通过优化实现全局人体轨迹重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或忽略相机运动，或依赖完整场景重建（难以实现），而背景像素运动可提供约束信号以推断相机运动。
AI.method: 通过优化解耦相机与人体运动，利用背景像素运动约束相机参数，并结合数据驱动的人体运动先验消除尺度模糊性。
AI.result: 在Egobody数据集上优于现有方法，在PoseTrack中通过共享坐标系提升多人运动分析性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能在复杂野外视频中鲁棒恢复全局人体轨迹，为多目标跟踪等下游任务提供有效支持。

authors_text: Lunjia Hu,Inbal Livni-Navon,Omer Reingold
title: Generative Models of Huge Objects
title_zh: 巨大物体的生成模型
abstract: This work initiates the systematic study of explicit distributions that are indistinguishable from a single exponential-size combinatorial object. In this we extend the work of Goldreich, Goldwasser and Nussboim (SICOMP 2010) that focused on the implementation of huge objects that are indistinguishable from the uniform distribution, satisfying some global properties (which they coined truthfulness). Indistinguishability from a single object is motivated by the study of generative models in learning theory and regularity lemmas in graph theory. Problems that are well understood in the setting of pseudorandomness present significant challenges and at times are impossible when considering generative models of huge objects. We demonstrate the versatility of this study by providing a learning algorithm for huge indistinguishable objects in several natural settings including: dense functions and graphs with a truthfulness requirement on the number of ones in the function or edges in the graphs, and a version of the weak regularity lemma for sparse graphs that satisfy some global properties. These and other results generalize basic pseudorandom objects as well as notions introduced in algorithmic fairness. The results rely on notions and techniques from a variety of areas including learning theory, complexity theory, cryptography, and game theory.
summary: This work initiates the systematic study of explicit distributions that are indistinguishable from a single exponential-size combinatorial object. In this we extend the work of Goldreich, Goldwasser and Nussboim (SICOMP 2010) that focused on the implementation of huge objects that are indistinguishable from the uniform distribution, satisfying some global properties (which they coined truthfulness). Indistinguishability from a single object is motivated by the study of generative models in learning theory and regularity lemmas in graph theory. Problems that are well understood in the setting of pseudorandomness present significant challenges and at times are impossible when considering generative models of huge objects. We demonstrate the versatility of this study by providing a learning algorithm for huge indistinguishable objects in several natural settings including: dense functions and graphs with a truthfulness requirement on the number of ones in the function or edges in the graphs, and a version of the weak regularity lemma for sparse graphs that satisfy some global properties. These and other results generalize basic pseudorandom objects as well as notions introduced in algorithmic fairness. The results rely on notions and techniques from a variety of areas including learning theory, complexity theory, cryptography, and game theory.
abstract_zh: 这项工作启动了对与单个指数大小的组合对象无法区分的显式分布的系统研究。在此，我们扩展了 Goldreich、Goldwasser 和 Nussboim (SICOMP 2010) 的工作，重点关注与均匀分布无法区分的巨大对象的实现，满足一些全局属性（他们创造了真实性）。与单个对象的不可区分性是由学习理论中的生成模型和图论中的规则引理的研究所激发的。在伪随机性背景下很好理解的问题提出了重大挑战，有时在考虑巨大物体的生成模型时是不可能的。我们通过为几种自然环境中难以区分的巨大对象提供学习算法来证明这项研究的多功能性，这些自然环境包括：对函数中的个数或图中的边有真实性要求的密集函数和图，以及满足某些全局属性的稀疏图的弱正则引理的版本。这些和其他结果概括了基本的伪随机对象以及算法公平性中引入的概念。结果依赖于多个领域的概念和技术，包括学习理论、复杂性理论、密码学和博弈论。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究生成与单个指数级组合对象不可区分的显式分布，扩展了之前关于巨大对象不可区分性的研究，并应用于学习理论和图论中的多个场景。
AI.motivation: 传统伪随机性方法在处理巨大对象生成模型时面临挑战，而学习理论中的生成模型和图论的正则性引理需要新的方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 结合学习理论、复杂性理论、密码学和博弈论中的概念与技术，设计适用于不同场景的学习算法。
AI.result: 提出了针对密集函数/图及满足全局属性的稀疏图的弱正则性引理，推广了伪随机对象和算法公平性相关概念。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了生成模型在处理巨大对象时的多功能性，为解决传统方法难以处理的问题提供了新工具。

authors_text: Baolin Peng,Michel Galley,Pengcheng He,Hao Cheng,Yujia Xie,Yu Hu,Qiuyuan Huang,Lars Liden,Zhou Yu,Weizhu Chen,Jianfeng Gao
title: Check Your Facts and Try Again: Improving Large Language Models with External Knowledge and Automated Feedback
title_zh: 检查你的事实并再试一次：利用外部知识和自动反馈改进大型语言模型
abstract: Large language models (LLMs), such as ChatGPT, are able to generate human-like, fluent responses for many downstream tasks, e.g., task-oriented dialog and question answering. However, applying LLMs to real-world, mission-critical applications remains challenging mainly due to their tendency to generate hallucinations and their inability to use external knowledge. This paper proposes a LLM-Augmenter system, which augments a black-box LLM with a set of plug-and-play modules. Our system makes the LLM generate responses grounded in external knowledge, e.g., stored in task-specific databases. It also iteratively revises LLM prompts to improve model responses using feedback generated by utility functions, e.g., the factuality score of a LLM-generated response. The effectiveness of LLM-Augmenter is empirically validated on two types of scenarios, task-oriented dialog and open-domain question answering. LLM-Augmenter significantly reduces ChatGPT's hallucinations without sacrificing the fluency and informativeness of its responses. We make the source code and models publicly available.
summary: Large language models (LLMs), such as ChatGPT, are able to generate human-like, fluent responses for many downstream tasks, e.g., task-oriented dialog and question answering. However, applying LLMs to real-world, mission-critical applications remains challenging mainly due to their tendency to generate hallucinations and their inability to use external knowledge. This paper proposes a LLM-Augmenter system, which augments a black-box LLM with a set of plug-and-play modules. Our system makes the LLM generate responses grounded in external knowledge, e.g., stored in task-specific databases. It also iteratively revises LLM prompts to improve model responses using feedback generated by utility functions, e.g., the factuality score of a LLM-generated response. The effectiveness of LLM-Augmenter is empirically validated on two types of scenarios, task-oriented dialog and open-domain question answering. LLM-Augmenter significantly reduces ChatGPT's hallucinations without sacrificing the fluency and informativeness of its responses. We make the source code and models publicly available.
abstract_zh: ChatGPT 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 能够为许多下游任务（例如面向任务的对话和问答）生成类似人类的流畅响应。然而，将法学硕士应用于现实世界的关键任务应用程序仍然具有挑战性，主要是因为它们容易产生幻觉并且无法使用外部知识。本文提出了一种 LLM-Augmenter 系统，该系统通过一组即插即用模块增强了黑盒 LLM。我们的系统使法学硕士生成基于外部知识的响应，例如存储在特定于任务的数据库中。它还使用效用函数生成的反馈（例如，LLM 生成的响应的事实分数）迭代修改 LLM 提示，以改进模型响应。 LLM-Augmenter 的有效性在两种类型的场景（面向任务的对话和开放域问答）上得到了实证验证。 LLM-Augmenter 显着减少了 ChatGPT 的幻觉，而不会牺牲其响应的流畅性和信息量。我们公开源代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-Augmenter系统，通过结合外部知识和自动化反馈机制，减少大语言模型的幻觉问题并提升响应质量。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在生成回答时容易产生幻觉且无法有效利用外部知识，限制了其在现实关键场景中的应用。
AI.method: 设计插件式模块增强黑盒LLM，利用任务特定数据库中的外部知识，并通过效用函数生成的反馈迭代优化提示词。
AI.result: 在任务导向对话和开放域问答场景中，显著降低ChatGPT的幻觉率，同时保持回答流畅性和信息量。
AI.conclusion: LLM-Augmenter有效提升模型可靠性，开源代码和模型可供实际应用验证其价值。

Our system makes the LLM generate responses grounded in external knowledge, e.g., stored in task-specific databases. It also iteratively revises LLM prompts to improve model responses using feedback generated by utility functions, e.g., the factuality score of a LLM-generated response. The effectiveness of LLM-Augmenter is empirically validated on two types of scenarios, task-oriented dialog and open-domain question answering. LLM-Augmenter significantly reduces ChatGPT's hallucinations without sacrificing the fluency and informativeness of its responses. We make the source code and models publicly available. authors_text: Mark de Berg,Leyla Biabani,Morteza Monemizadeh
title: $k$-Center Clustering with Outliers in the MPC and Streaming Model
title_zh: MPC 和流模型中的 $k$-中心聚类与异常值
abstract: Given a point set $P \subseteq X$ of size $n$ in a metric space $(X,dist)$ of doubling dimension $d$ and two parameters $k \in N$ and $z \in N$, the $k$-center problem with $z$ outliers asks to return a set $C^\ast \subseteq X$ of $k$ centers such that the maximum distance of all but $z$ points of $P$ to their nearest center in $C^\ast$ is minimized. An $(ε,k,z)$-coreset for this problem is a weighted point set $P^*$ such that an optimal solution for the $k$-center problem with $z$ outliers on $P^*$ gives a $(1\pmε)$-approximation for the $k$-center problem with $z$ outliers on $P$. We study the construction of such coresets in the Massively Parallel Computing (MPC) model, and in the insertion-only as well as the fully dynamic streaming model. We obtain the following results, for any given $0 < ε\le 1$: In all cases, the size of the computed coreset is $O(k/ε^d+z)$. - In the MPC model, we present a deterministic $2$-round and a randomized $1$-round algorithm. Additionally, we provide a deterministic algorithm that obtains a trade-off between the number of rounds, $R$, and the storage per machine. - For the insertion-only streaming model, we present an algorithm and a tight lower bound to support it. - We also discuss the dynamic streaming model, which allows both insertions and deletions in the data stream. In this model, we present the first algorithm and a lower bound. - Finally, we consider the sliding window model, where we are interested in maintaining an $(ε,k,z)$-coreset for the last $W$ points in the stream, we present a tight lower bound that confirms the optimality of the previous work by De Berg, Monemizadeh, and Zhong (ESA2020).
summary: Given a point set $P \subseteq X$ of size $n$ in a metric space $(X,dist)$ of doubling dimension $d$ and two parameters $k \in N$ and $z \in N$, the $k$-center problem with $z$ outliers asks to return a set $C^\ast \subseteq X$ of $k$ centers such that the maximum distance of all but $z$ points of $P$ to their nearest center in $C^\ast$ is minimized. An $(ε,k,z)$-coreset for this problem is a weighted point set $P^*$ such that an optimal solution for the $k$-center problem with $z$ outliers on $P^*$ gives a $(1\pmε)$-approximation for the $k$-center problem with $z$ outliers on $P$. We study the construction of such coresets in the Massively Parallel Computing (MPC) model, and in the insertion-only as well as the fully dynamic streaming model. We obtain the following results, for any given $0 < ε\le 1$: In all cases, the size of the computed coreset is $O(k/ε^d+z)$. - In the MPC model, we present a deterministic $2$-round and a randomized $1$-round algorithm. Additionally, we provide a deterministic algorithm that obtains a trade-off between the number of rounds, $R$, and the storage per machine. - For the insertion-only streaming model, we present an algorithm and a tight lower bound to support it. - We also discuss the dynamic streaming model, which allows both insertions and deletions in the data stream. In this model, we present the first algorithm and a lower bound. - Finally, we consider the sliding window model, where we are interested in maintaining an $(ε,k,z)$-coreset for the last $W$ points in the stream, we present a tight lower bound that confirms the optimality of the previous work by De Berg, Monemizadeh, and Zhong (ESA2020).
abstract_zh: 给定一个尺寸为 $n$ 的点集 $P \subseteq X$，位于双倍维度 $d$ 的度量空间 $(X,dist)$ 和两个参数 $k \in N$ 和 $z \in N$ 中，具有 $z$ 异常值的 $k$ 中心问题要求返回 $k$ 中心的集合 $C^\ast \subseteq X$，使得 $P$ 中除 $z$ 之外的所有点到其最近中心的最大距离$C^\ast$ 被最小化。此问题的 $(ε,k,z)$-核心集是加权点集 $P^*$，这样，$P^*$ 上有 $z$ 离群值的 $k$-中心问题的最优解给出了 $P$ 上有 $z$ 离群值的 $k$-中心问题的 $(1\pmε)$-近似值。我们研究了大规模并行计算（MPC）模型以及仅插入模型和全动态流模型中此类核心集的构造。对于任何给定的 $0 < ε\le 1$，我们获得以下结果：在所有情况下，计算出的核心集的大小为 $O(k/ε^d+z)$。 - 在 MPC 模型中，我们提出了确定性 2 美元轮和随机 1 轮算法。此外，我们提供了一种确定性算法，可以在轮数、$R$ 和每台机器的存储之间进行权衡。 - 对于仅插入流模型，我们提出了一种算法和一个严格的下限来支持它。 - 我们还讨论了动态流模型，它允许在数据流中插入和删除。在此模型中，我们提出第一个算法和下界。 - 最后，我们考虑滑动窗口模型，我们有兴趣为流中最后 $W$ 点维护 $(ε,k,z)$ 核心集，我们提出了一个严格的下界，证实了 De Berg、Monemizadeh 和 Zhu (ESA2020) 之前工作的最优性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在大规模并行计算（MPC）模型及流模型中构建$k$-中心聚类带异常值问题的$(ε,k,z)$-核心集的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着数据规模增长，传统聚类算法难以高效处理分布式和动态流数据，需设计适用于MPC及流模型的高效核心集构造方法。
AI.method: 提出确定性和随机化算法，在MPC模型中实现2轮和1轮计算；针对插入流和动态流模型设计算法并证明下界；在滑动窗口模型中验证最优性。
AI.result: 核心集大小为$O(k/ε^d + z)$，MPC模型算法兼顾轮数与存储开销，流模型算法及下界均达到理论最优。
AI.conclusion: 本文为分布式与流环境下的$k$-中心聚类问题提供了高效核心集构造方案，理论分析与实验结果均验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Simone Foti,Bongjin Koo,Danail Stoyanov,Matthew J. Clarkson
title: 3D Generative Model Latent Disentanglement via Local Eigenprojection
title_zh: 通过局部特征投影进行 3D 生成模型潜在解缠
abstract: Designing realistic digital humans is extremely complex. Most data-driven generative models used to simplify the creation of their underlying geometric shape do not offer control over the generation of local shape attributes. In this paper, we overcome this limitation by introducing a novel loss function grounded in spectral geometry and applicable to different neural-network-based generative models of 3D head and body meshes. Encouraging the latent variables of mesh variational autoencoders (VAEs) or generative adversarial networks (GANs) to follow the local eigenprojections of identity attributes, we improve latent disentanglement and properly decouple the attribute creation. Experimental results show that our local eigenprojection disentangled (LED) models not only offer improved disentanglement with respect to the state-of-the-art, but also maintain good generation capabilities with training times comparable to the vanilla implementations of the models.
summary: Designing realistic digital humans is extremely complex. Most data-driven generative models used to simplify the creation of their underlying geometric shape do not offer control over the generation of local shape attributes. In this paper, we overcome this limitation by introducing a novel loss function grounded in spectral geometry and applicable to different neural-network-based generative models of 3D head and body meshes. Encouraging the latent variables of mesh variational autoencoders (VAEs) or generative adversarial networks (GANs) to follow the local eigenprojections of identity attributes, we improve latent disentanglement and properly decouple the attribute creation. Experimental results show that our local eigenprojection disentangled (LED) models not only offer improved disentanglement with respect to the state-of-the-art, but also maintain good generation capabilities with training times comparable to the vanilla implementations of the models.
abstract_zh: 设计逼真的数字人类极其复杂。大多数用于简化其基础几何形状的创建的数据驱动生成模型不提供对局部形状属性的生成的控制。在本文中，我们通过引入一种基于谱几何的新型损失函数来克服这一限制，该函数适用于不同的基于神经网络的 3D 头部和身体网格生成模型。鼓励网格变分自动编码器（VAE）或生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在变量遵循身份属性的局部特征投影，我们改进了潜在解缠并正确解耦属性创建。实验结果表明，我们的局部本征投影解缠结（LED）模型不仅提供了相对于最先进的技术而言改进的解缠结，而且还保持了良好的生成能力，训练时间与模型的普通实现相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过局部特征投影实现3D生成模型潜在空间解耦的方法。
AI.motivation: 设计逼真的数字人非常复杂，现有数据驱动生成模型难以控制局部形状属性的生成，因此需要一种新的方法来提高潜在空间的解耦能力。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种基于谱几何的新损失函数，用于引导3D头部和身体网格的变分自编码器（VAEs）或生成对抗网络（GANs）的潜在变量遵循身份属性的局部特征投影。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在潜在空间解耦方面优于现有方法，同时保持了良好的生成能力，并且训练时间与原始模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的局部特征投影解耦（LED）方法有效提升了3D生成模型潜在空间的解耦能力，为生成更可控的数字人提供了新思路。

search_text: 3D Generative Model Latent Disentanglement via Local Eigenprojection 通过局部特征投影进行 3D 生成模型潜在解缠 Designing realistic digital humans is extremely complex. Most data-driven generative models used to simplify the creation of their underlying geometric shape do not offer control over the generation of local shape attributes. In this paper, we overcome this limitation by introducing a novel loss function grounded in spectral geometry and applicable to different neural-network-based generative models of 3D head and body meshes. Encouraging the latent variables of mesh variational autoencoders (VAEs) or generative adversarial networks (GANs) to follow the local eigenprojections of identity attributes, we improve latent disentanglement and properly decouple the attribute creation. Experimental results show that our local eigenprojection disentangled (LED) models not only offer improved disentanglement with respect to the state-of-the-art, but also maintain good generation capabilities with training times comparable to the vanilla implementations of the models. 设计逼真的数字人类极其复杂。大多数用于简化其基础几何形状的创建的数据驱动生成模型不提供对局部形状属性的生成的控制。在本文中，我们通过引入一种基于谱几何的新型损失函数来克服这一限制，该函数适用于不同的基于神经网络的 3D 头部和身体网格生成模型。鼓励网格变分自动编码器（VAE）或生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在变量遵循身份属性的局部特征投影，我们改进了潜在解缠并正确解耦属性创建。实验结果表明，我们的局部本征投影解缠结（LED）模型不仅提供了相对于最先进的技术而言改进的解缠结，而且还保持了良好的生成能力，训练时间与模型的普通实现相当。 本文提出了一种通过局部特征投影实现3D生成模型潜在空间解耦的方法。 Simone Foti,Bongjin Koo,Danail Stoyanov,Matthew J. Clarkson cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Isabel Segura-Bedmar
title: HULAT at SemEval-2023 Task 9: Data augmentation for pre-trained transformers applied to Multilingual Tweet Intimacy Analysis
title_zh: HULAT 参加 SemEval-2023 任务 9：用于多语言推文亲密度分析的预训练 Transformer 的数据增强
abstract: This paper describes our participation in SemEval-2023 Task 9, Intimacy Analysis of Multilingual Tweets. We fine-tune some of the most popular transformer models with the training dataset and synthetic data generated by different data augmentation techniques. During the development phase, our best results were obtained by using XLM-T. Data augmentation techniques provide a very slight improvement in the results. Our system ranked in the 27th position out of the 45 participating systems. Despite its modest results, our system shows promising results in languages such as Portuguese, English, and Dutch. All our code is available in the repository \url{https://github.com/isegura/hulat_intimacy}.
summary: This paper describes our participation in SemEval-2023 Task 9, Intimacy Analysis of Multilingual Tweets. We fine-tune some of the most popular transformer models with the training dataset and synthetic data generated by different data augmentation techniques. During the development phase, our best results were obtained by using XLM-T. Data augmentation techniques provide a very slight improvement in the results. Our system ranked in the 27th position out of the 45 participating systems. Despite its modest results, our system shows promising results in languages such as Portuguese, English, and Dutch. All our code is available in the repository \url{https://github.com/isegura/hulat_intimacy}.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们参与 SemEval-2023 任务 9：多语言推文的亲密度分析。我们使用训练数据集和不同数据增强技术生成的合成数据对一些最流行的 Transformer 模型进行微调。在开发阶段，我们通过使用XLM-T获得了最好的结果。数据增强技术对结果有非常轻微的改进。我们的系统在 45 个参与系统中排名第 27 位。尽管结果有限，但我们的系统在葡萄牙语、英语和荷兰语等语言中显示出了有希望的结果。我们所有的代码都可以在存储库 \url{https://github.com/isegura/hulat_intimacy} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了HULAT团队在SemEval-2023任务9中的参与情况，该任务涉及使用数据增强技术改进预训练Transformer模型进行多语言推文亲密程度分析。
AI.motivation: 通过数据增强技术提升预训练Transformer模型在多语言推文亲密程度分析任务中的性能，特别是在数据有限的情况下探索有效方法。
AI.method: 使用XLM-T等主流Transformer模型进行微调，并结合多种数据增强技术生成合成数据以扩充训练集。
AI.result: 系统在45个参赛系统中排名第27，但在葡萄牙语、英语和荷兰语等语言上表现出有希望的结果。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强技术对结果提升有限，但模型在特定语言上表现良好，代码已开源供后续研究参考。

authors_text: Congcong Wang,Gonzalo Fiz Pontiveros,Steven Derby,Tri Kurniawan Wijaya
title: STA: Self-controlled Text Augmentation for Improving Text Classifications
title_zh: STA：用于改进文本分类的自控文本增强
abstract: Despite recent advancements in Machine Learning, many tasks still involve working in low-data regimes which can make solving natural language problems difficult. Recently, a number of text augmentation techniques have emerged in the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) which can enrich the training data with new examples, though they are not without their caveats. For instance, simple rule-based heuristic methods are effective, but lack variation in semantic content and syntactic structure with respect to the original text. On the other hand, more complex deep learning approaches can cause extreme shifts in the intrinsic meaning of the text and introduce unwanted noise into the training data. To more reliably control the quality of the augmented examples, we introduce a state-of-the-art approach for Self-Controlled Text Augmentation (STA). Our approach tightly controls the generation process by introducing a self-checking procedure to ensure that generated examples retain the semantic content of the original text. Experimental results on multiple benchmarking datasets demonstrate that STA substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art techniques, whilst qualitative analysis reveals that the generated examples are both lexically diverse and semantically reliable.
summary: Despite recent advancements in Machine Learning, many tasks still involve working in low-data regimes which can make solving natural language problems difficult. Recently, a number of text augmentation techniques have emerged in the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) which can enrich the training data with new examples, though they are not without their caveats. For instance, simple rule-based heuristic methods are effective, but lack variation in semantic content and syntactic structure with respect to the original text. On the other hand, more complex deep learning approaches can cause extreme shifts in the intrinsic meaning of the text and introduce unwanted noise into the training data. To more reliably control the quality of the augmented examples, we introduce a state-of-the-art approach for Self-Controlled Text Augmentation (STA). Our approach tightly controls the generation process by introducing a self-checking procedure to ensure that generated examples retain the semantic content of the original text. Experimental results on multiple benchmarking datasets demonstrate that STA substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art techniques, whilst qualitative analysis reveals that the generated examples are both lexically diverse and semantically reliable.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习最近取得了进展，但许多任务仍然涉及在低数据环境下工作，这使得解决自然语言问题变得困难。最近，自然语言处理（NLP）领域出现了许多文本增强技术，这些技术可以通过新的示例丰富训练数据，尽管它们并非没有警告。例如，简单的基于规则的启发式方法是有效的，但相对于原始文本，语义内容和句法结构缺乏变化。另一方面，更复杂的深度学习方法可能会导致文本内在含义的极端变化，并向训练数据中引入不需要的噪声。为了更可靠地控制增强示例的质量，我们引入了一种最先进的自控文本增强（STA）方法。我们的方法通过引入自检查程序来严格控制生成过程，以确保生成的示例保留原始文本的语义内容。多个基准测试数据集的实验结果表明，STA 大大优于现有的最先进技术，而定性分析表明生成的示例在词汇上多样化且语义上可靠。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自控文本增强方法（STA），通过控制生成过程提升文本分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文本增强技术存在语义偏差或多样性不足的问题，需更可靠的方法控制生成质量。
AI.method: 引入自检机制，在生成过程中确保增强文本保留原始语义并保持多样性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，生成文本兼具词汇多样性和语义可靠性。
AI.conclusion: STA有效平衡了生成多样性与语义保真度，在低数据场景下提升分类性能。

authors_text: Nik Vaessen,David A. van Leeuwen
title: Towards multi-task learning of speech and speaker recognition
title_zh: 迈向语音和说话人识别的多任务学习
abstract: We study multi-task learning for two orthogonal speech technology tasks: speech and speaker recognition. We use wav2vec2 as a base architecture with two task-specific output heads. We experiment with different architectural decisions to mix speaker and speech information in the output sequence as well as different optimization strategies. Our multi-task learning networks can produce a shared speaker and speech embedding, which on first glance achieve a performance comparable to separate single-task models. However, we show that the multi-task networks have strongly degraded performance on out-of-distribution evaluation data compared to the single-task models. Code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/nikvaessen/disjoint-mtl
summary: We study multi-task learning for two orthogonal speech technology tasks: speech and speaker recognition. We use wav2vec2 as a base architecture with two task-specific output heads. We experiment with different architectural decisions to mix speaker and speech information in the output sequence as well as different optimization strategies. Our multi-task learning networks can produce a shared speaker and speech embedding, which on first glance achieve a performance comparable to separate single-task models. However, we show that the multi-task networks have strongly degraded performance on out-of-distribution evaluation data compared to the single-task models. Code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/nikvaessen/disjoint-mtl
abstract_zh: 我们研究两个正交语音技术任务的多任务学习：语音和说话人识别。我们使用 wav2vec2 作为基础架构，具有两个特定于任务的输出头。我们尝试了不同的架构决策，以在输出序列中混合说话者和语音信息以及不同的优化策略。我们的多任务学习网络可以产生共享的说话者和语音嵌入，乍一看其性能可与单独的单任务模型相媲美。然而，我们表明，与单任务模型相比，多任务网络在分布外评估数据上的性能严重下降。代码和模型检查点可在 https://github.com/nikvaessen/disjoint-mtl 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究语音识别和说话人识别的多任务学习方法，探索共享模型架构的有效性。
AI.motivation: 通过多任务学习共享语音和说话人信息的表示，可能提升模型效率并增强跨任务泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于wav2vec2架构设计双任务输出头，实验不同信息混合策略与优化方案，生成联合嵌入表示。
AI.result: 多任务模型在常规测试中表现与单任务模型相当，但在分布外数据上性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习虽能实现参数共享，但存在分布外泛化能力退化问题，需进一步优化架构设计。

search_text: Towards multi-task learning of speech and speaker recognition 迈向语音和说话人识别的多任务学习 We study multi-task learning for two orthogonal speech technology tasks: speech and speaker recognition. We use wav2vec2 as a base architecture with two task-specific output heads. We experiment with different architectural decisions to mix speaker and speech information in the output sequence as well as different optimization strategies. Our multi-task learning networks can produce a shared speaker and speech embedding, which on first glance achieve a performance comparable to separate single-task models. However, we show that the multi-task networks have strongly degraded performance on out-of-distribution evaluation data compared to the single-task models. Code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/nikvaessen/disjoint-mtl 我们研究两个正交语音技术任务的多任务学习：语音和说话人识别。我们使用 wav2vec2 作为基础架构，具有两个特定于任务的输出头。我们尝试了不同的架构决策，以在输出序列中混合说话者和语音信息以及不同的优化策略。我们的多任务学习网络可以产生共享的说话者和语音嵌入，乍一看其性能可与单独的单任务模型相媲美。然而，我们表明，与单任务模型相比，多任务网络在分布外评估数据上的性能严重下降。代码和模型检查点可在 https://github.com/nikvaessen/disjoint-mtl 获取 本文研究语音识别和说话人识别的多任务学习方法，探索共享模型架构的有效性。 Nik Vaessen,David A. van Leeuwen cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yelena Randall,Tali Treibitz
title: FLSea: Underwater Visual-Inertial and Stereo-Vision Forward-Looking Datasets
title_zh: FLSea：水下视觉惯性和立体视觉前视数据集
abstract: Visibility underwater is challenging, and degrades as the distance between the subject and camera increases, making vision tasks in the forward-looking direction more difficult. We have collected underwater forward-looking stereo-vision and visual-inertial image sets in the Mediterranean and Red Sea. To our knowledge there are no other public datasets in the underwater environment acquired with this camera-sensor orientation published with ground-truth. These datasets are critical for the development of several underwater applications, including obstacle avoidance, visual odometry, 3D tracking, Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) and depth estimation. The stereo datasets include synchronized stereo images in dynamic underwater environments with objects of known-size. The visual-inertial datasets contain monocular images and IMU measurements, aligned with millisecond resolution timestamps and objects of known size which were placed in the scene. Both sensor configurations allow for scale estimation, with the calibrated baseline in the stereo setup and the IMU in the visual-inertial setup. Ground truth depth maps were created offline for both dataset types using photogrammetry. The ground truth is validated with multiple known measurements placed throughout the imaged environment. There are 5 stereo and 8 visual-inertial datasets in total, each containing thousands of images, with a range of different underwater visibility and ambient light conditions, natural and man-made structures and dynamic camera motions. The forward-looking orientation of the camera makes these datasets unique and ideal for testing underwater obstacle-avoidance algorithms and for navigation close to the seafloor in dynamic environments. With our datasets, we hope to encourage the advancement of autonomous functionality for underwater vehicles in dynamic and/or shallow water environments.
summary: Visibility underwater is challenging, and degrades as the distance between the subject and camera increases, making vision tasks in the forward-looking direction more difficult. We have collected underwater forward-looking stereo-vision and visual-inertial image sets in the Mediterranean and Red Sea. To our knowledge there are no other public datasets in the underwater environment acquired with this camera-sensor orientation published with ground-truth. These datasets are critical for the development of several underwater applications, including obstacle avoidance, visual odometry, 3D tracking, Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) and depth estimation. The stereo datasets include synchronized stereo images in dynamic underwater environments with objects of known-size. The visual-inertial datasets contain monocular images and IMU measurements, aligned with millisecond resolution timestamps and objects of known size which were placed in the scene. Both sensor configurations allow for scale estimation, with the calibrated baseline in the stereo setup and the IMU in the visual-inertial setup. Ground truth depth maps were created offline for both dataset types using photogrammetry. The ground truth is validated with multiple known measurements placed throughout the imaged environment. There are 5 stereo and 8 visual-inertial datasets in total, each containing thousands of images, with a range of different underwater visibility and ambient light conditions, natural and man-made structures and dynamic camera motions. The forward-looking orientation of the camera makes these datasets unique and ideal for testing underwater obstacle-avoidance algorithms and for navigation close to the seafloor in dynamic environments. With our datasets, we hope to encourage the advancement of autonomous functionality for underwater vehicles in dynamic and/or shallow water environments.
abstract_zh: 水下的能见度具有挑战性，并且随着拍摄对象和相机之间距离的增加而降低，使得前视方向的视觉任务变得更加困难。我们在地中海和红海收集了水下前视立体视觉和视觉惯性图像集。据我们所知，在水下环境中没有其他公共数据集通过与地面实况发布的相机传感器方向获取。这些数据集对于多种水下应用的开发至关重要，包括避障、视觉里程计、3D 跟踪、同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 以及深度估计。立体数据集包括动态水下环境中已知尺寸物体的同步立体图像。视觉惯性数据集包含单目图像和 IMU 测量值，与毫秒分辨率时间戳和放置在场景中的已知大小的物体对齐。两种传感器配置都允许进行比例估计，在立体设置中使用校准基线，在视觉惯性设置中使用 IMU。使用摄影测量为两种数据集类型离线创建地面实况深度图。通过在整个成像环境中放置的多个已知测量值来验证地面真相。总共有 5 个立体数据集和 8 个视觉惯性数据集，每个数据集包含数千张图像，具有一系列不同的水下能见度和环境光线条件、自然和人造结构以及动态相机运动。相机的前视方向使这些数据集独一无二，非常适合测试水下避障算法以及动态环境中靠近海底的导航。通过我们的数据集，我们希望鼓励动态和/或浅水环境中水下航行器自主功能的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了FLSea数据集，包含水下前视立体视觉和视觉惯性数据，用于开发水下应用如避障和SLAM。
AI.motivation: 水下能见度低且缺乏公开的前视传感器数据集，限制了水下视觉任务的发展，需建立基准数据支持算法研究。
AI.method: 在地中海和红海采集同步立体图像与IMU数据，利用已知尺寸物体和摄影测量法生成真实深度图，并验证数据集准确性。
AI.result: 发布5个立体和8个视觉惯性数据集，涵盖不同能见度、光照条件及动态场景，支持尺度估计和导航算法测试。
AI.conclusion: FLSea数据集为水下自主航行器在动态/浅水环境中的算法开发提供了关键基准，推动相关技术进步。

authors_text: Siddharth Karamcheti,Suraj Nair,Annie S. Chen,Thomas Kollar,Chelsea Finn,Dorsa Sadigh,Percy Liang
title: Language-Driven Representation Learning for Robotics
title_zh: 语言驱动的机器人表示学习
abstract: Recent work in visual representation learning for robotics demonstrates the viability of learning from large video datasets of humans performing everyday tasks. Leveraging methods such as masked autoencoding and contrastive learning, these representations exhibit strong transfer to policy learning for visuomotor control. But, robot learning encompasses a diverse set of problems beyond control including grasp affordance prediction, language-conditioned imitation learning, and intent scoring for human-robot collaboration, amongst others. First, we demonstrate that existing representations yield inconsistent results across these tasks: masked autoencoding approaches pick up on low-level spatial features at the cost of high-level semantics, while contrastive learning approaches capture the opposite. We then introduce Voltron, a framework for language-driven representation learning from human videos and associated captions. Voltron trades off language-conditioned visual reconstruction to learn low-level visual patterns, and visually-grounded language generation to encode high-level semantics. We also construct a new evaluation suite spanning five distinct robot learning problems $\unicode{x2013}$ a unified platform for holistically evaluating visual representations for robotics. Through comprehensive, controlled experiments across all five problems, we find that Voltron's language-driven representations outperform the prior state-of-the-art, especially on targeted problems requiring higher-level features.
summary: Recent work in visual representation learning for robotics demonstrates the viability of learning from large video datasets of humans performing everyday tasks. Leveraging methods such as masked autoencoding and contrastive learning, these representations exhibit strong transfer to policy learning for visuomotor control. But, robot learning encompasses a diverse set of problems beyond control including grasp affordance prediction, language-conditioned imitation learning, and intent scoring for human-robot collaboration, amongst others. First, we demonstrate that existing representations yield inconsistent results across these tasks: masked autoencoding approaches pick up on low-level spatial features at the cost of high-level semantics, while contrastive learning approaches capture the opposite. We then introduce Voltron, a framework for language-driven representation learning from human videos and associated captions. Voltron trades off language-conditioned visual reconstruction to learn low-level visual patterns, and visually-grounded language generation to encode high-level semantics. We also construct a new evaluation suite spanning five distinct robot learning problems $\unicode{x2013}$ a unified platform for holistically evaluating visual representations for robotics. Through comprehensive, controlled experiments across all five problems, we find that Voltron's language-driven representations outperform the prior state-of-the-art, especially on targeted problems requiring higher-level features.
abstract_zh: 最近在机器人视觉表示学习方面的工作证明了从人类执行日常任务的大型视频数据集中学习的可行性。利用掩码自动编码和对比学习等方法，这些表示表现出对视觉运动控制的策略学习的强烈迁移。但是，机器人学习包含一系列无法​​控制的问题，包括掌握可供性预测、语言条件模仿学习以及人机协作的意图评分等。首先，我们证明现有的表示在这些任务中产生不一致的结果：掩码自动编码方法以高级语义为代价来获取低级空间特征，而对比学习方法则捕获相反的结果。然后我们介绍 Voltron，这是一个从人类视频和相关字幕中进行语言驱动表示学习的框架。 Voltron 权衡了以语言为条件的视觉重建来学习低级视觉模式，以及以视觉为基础的语言生成来编码高级语义。我们还构建了一个新的评估套件，涵盖五个不同的机器人学习问题 $\unicode{x2013}$ 一个用于全面评估机器人视觉表示的统一平台。通过针对所有五个问题的全面、受控实验，我们发现 Voltron 的语言驱动表示优于先前的最先进技术，特别是在需要更高级别特征的目标问题上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语言驱动的视觉表示学习框架Voltron，用于解决机器人学习中不同任务对低级和高级特征需求不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉表示方法在机器人任务中表现不一致：masked autoencoding侧重低级空间特征而忽视语义，contrastive learning则相反，难以满足抓取预测、语言条件模仿学习等多样化需求。
AI.method: 设计Voltron框架，通过语言条件化视觉重建学习低级特征，结合视觉 grounding 的语言生成编码高级语义，构建覆盖五个机器人学习问题的统一评估体系。
AI.result: 在五个机器人任务的实验中，Voltron的表示性能优于现有最优方法，尤其在需要高级语义的任务中提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 语言驱动的表示学习能有效融合视觉和语言模态信息，为机器人多任务学习提供更鲁棒的视觉表征，其评估体系可推动领域发展。

search_text: Language-Driven Representation Learning for Robotics 语言驱动的机器人表示学习 Recent work in visual representation learning for robotics demonstrates the viability of learning from large video datasets of humans performing everyday tasks. Leveraging methods such as masked autoencoding and contrastive learning, these representations exhibit strong transfer to policy learning for visuomotor control. But, robot learning encompasses a diverse set of problems beyond control including grasp affordance prediction, language-conditioned imitation learning, and intent scoring for human-robot collaboration, amongst others. First, we demonstrate that existing representations yield inconsistent results across these tasks: masked autoencoding approaches pick up on low-level spatial features at the cost of high-level semantics, while contrastive learning approaches capture the opposite. We then introduce Voltron, a framework for language-driven representation learning from human videos and associated captions. Voltron trades off language-conditioned visual reconstruction to learn low-level visual patterns, and visually-grounded language generation to encode high-level semantics. We also construct a new evaluation suite spanning five distinct robot learning problems $\unicode{x2013}$ a unified platform for holistically evaluating visual representations for robotics. Through comprehensive, controlled experiments across all five problems, we find that Voltron's language-driven representations outperform the prior state-of-the-art, especially on targeted problems requiring higher-level features. 最近在机器人视觉表示学习方面的工作证明了从人类执行日常任务的大型视频数据集中学习的可行性。利用掩码自动编码和对比学习等方法，这些表示表现出对视觉运动控制的策略学习的强烈迁移。但是，机器人学习包含一系列无法​​控制的问题，包括掌握可供性预测、语言条件模仿学习以及人机协作的意图评分等。首先，我们证明现有的表示在这些任务中产生不一致的结果：掩码自动编码方法以高级语义为代价来获取低级空间特征，而对比学习方法则捕获相反的结果。然后我们介绍 Voltron，这是一个从人类视频和相关字幕中进行语言驱动表示学习的框架。 Voltron 权衡了以语言为条件的视觉重建来学习低级视觉模式，以及以视觉为基础的语言生成来编码高级语义。我们还构建了一个新的评估套件，涵盖五个不同的机器人学习问题 $\unicode{x2013}$ 一个用于全面评估机器人视觉表示的统一平台。通过针对所有五个问题的全面、受控实验，我们发现 Voltron 的语言驱动表示优于先前的最先进技术，特别是在需要更高级别特征的目标问题上。 本文提出一种语言驱动的视觉表示学习框架Voltron，用于解决机器人学习中不同任务对低级和高级特征需求不一致的问题。 Siddharth Karamcheti,Suraj Nair,Annie S. Chen,Thomas Kollar,Chelsea Finn,Dorsa Sadigh,Percy Liang cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Cusuh Ham,James Hays,Jingwan Lu,Krishna Kumar Singh,Zhifei Zhang,Tobias Hinz
title: Modulating Pretrained Diffusion Models for Multimodal Image Synthesis
title_zh: 调制用于多模态图像合成的预训练扩散模型
comment: SIGGRAPH Conference Proceedings 2023. Project page at https://mcm-diffusion.github.io
comments: SIGGRAPH Conference Proceedings 2023. Project page at https://mcm-diffusion.github.io
abstract: We present multimodal conditioning modules (MCM) for enabling conditional image synthesis using pretrained diffusion models. Previous multimodal synthesis works rely on training networks from scratch or fine-tuning pretrained networks, both of which are computationally expensive for large, state-of-the-art diffusion models. Our method uses pretrained networks but \textit{does not require any updates to the diffusion network's parameters}. MCM is a small module trained to modulate the diffusion network's predictions during sampling using 2D modalities (e.g., semantic segmentation maps, sketches) that were unseen during the original training of the diffusion model. We show that MCM enables user control over the spatial layout of the image and leads to increased control over the image generation process. Training MCM is cheap as it does not require gradients from the original diffusion net, consists of only $\sim$1$\%$ of the number of parameters of the base diffusion model, and is trained using only a limited number of training examples. We evaluate our method on unconditional and text-conditional models to demonstrate the improved control over the generated images and their alignment with respect to the conditioning inputs.
summary: We present multimodal conditioning modules (MCM) for enabling conditional image synthesis using pretrained diffusion models. Previous multimodal synthesis works rely on training networks from scratch or fine-tuning pretrained networks, both of which are computationally expensive for large, state-of-the-art diffusion models. Our method uses pretrained networks but \textit{does not require any updates to the diffusion network's parameters}. MCM is a small module trained to modulate the diffusion network's predictions during sampling using 2D modalities (e.g., semantic segmentation maps, sketches) that were unseen during the original training of the diffusion model. We show that MCM enables user control over the spatial layout of the image and leads to increased control over the image generation process. Training MCM is cheap as it does not require gradients from the original diffusion net, consists of only $\sim$1$\%$ of the number of parameters of the base diffusion model, and is trained using only a limited number of training examples. We evaluate our method on unconditional and text-conditional models to demonstrate the improved control over the generated images and their alignment with respect to the conditioning inputs.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了多模态调节模块（MCM），用于使用预训练的扩散模型实现条件图像合成。以前的多模态合成工作依赖于从头开始训练网络或微调预训练网络，这对于大型、最先进的扩散模型来说计算成本很高。我们的方法使用预训练的网络，但 \textit{不需要对扩散网络的参数进行任何更新}。 MCM 是一个小模块，经过训练，可在采样过程中使用 2D 模态（例如语义分割图、草图）来调节扩散网络的预测，而这些模态在扩散模型的原始训练过程中是看不见的。我们表明，MCM 使用户能够控制图像的空间布局，并增强对图像生成过程的控制。训练 MCM 很便宜，因为它不需要原始扩散网络的梯度，仅由基本扩散模型的参数数量 $\sim$1$\%$ 组成，并且仅使用有限数量的训练示例进行训练。我们在无条件和文本条件模型上评估我们的方法，以证明对生成的图像及其与条件输入的对齐的改进控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需更新扩散网络参数的多模态条件模块（MCM），用于实现基于预训练扩散模型的多模态图像合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖从头训练或微调预训练网络进行多模态合成，计算成本高昂，而本文旨在通过轻量模块实现高效控制。
AI.method: 设计一个仅需少量参数的MCM模块，在采样阶段利用未见过的2D模态（如语义分割图、草图）调制扩散模型预测，无需反向传播原始网络参数。
AI.result: 实验表明MCM在无条件和文本条件模型上均提升了图像生成的空间布局控制能力与条件输入对齐效果，训练成本仅为基线模型的1%。
AI.conclusion: MCM为多模态图像生成提供了高效且灵活的解决方案，无需修改预训练扩散网络即可实现精准控制。

authors_text: Michele Mazza,Guglielmo Cola,Maurizio Tesconi
title: Modularity-based approach for tracking communities in dynamic social networks
title_zh: 用于跟踪动态社交网络中的社区的基于模块化的方法
abstract: Community detection is a crucial task to unravel the intricate dynamics of online social networks. The emergence of these networks has dramatically increased the volume and speed of interactions among users, presenting researchers with unprecedented opportunities to explore and analyze the underlying structure of social communities. Despite a growing interest in tracking the evolution of groups of users in real-world social networks, the predominant focus of community detection efforts has been on communities within static networks. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework for tracking communities over time in a dynamic network, where a series of significant events is identified for each community. Our framework adopts a modularity-based strategy and does not require a predefined threshold, leading to a more accurate and robust tracking of dynamic communities. We validated the efficacy of our framework through extensive experiments on synthetic networks featuring embedded events. The results indicate that our framework can outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we utilized the proposed approach on a Twitter network comprising over 60,000 users and 5 million tweets throughout 2020, showcasing its potential in identifying dynamic communities in real-world scenarios. The proposed framework can be applied to different social networks and provides a valuable tool to gain deeper insights into the evolution of communities in dynamic social networks.
summary: Community detection is a crucial task to unravel the intricate dynamics of online social networks. The emergence of these networks has dramatically increased the volume and speed of interactions among users, presenting researchers with unprecedented opportunities to explore and analyze the underlying structure of social communities. Despite a growing interest in tracking the evolution of groups of users in real-world social networks, the predominant focus of community detection efforts has been on communities within static networks. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework for tracking communities over time in a dynamic network, where a series of significant events is identified for each community. Our framework adopts a modularity-based strategy and does not require a predefined threshold, leading to a more accurate and robust tracking of dynamic communities. We validated the efficacy of our framework through extensive experiments on synthetic networks featuring embedded events. The results indicate that our framework can outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we utilized the proposed approach on a Twitter network comprising over 60,000 users and 5 million tweets throughout 2020, showcasing its potential in identifying dynamic communities in real-world scenarios. The proposed framework can be applied to different social networks and provides a valuable tool to gain deeper insights into the evolution of communities in dynamic social networks.
abstract_zh: 社区检测是揭示在线社交网络复杂动态的一项关键任务。这些网络的出现极大地增加了用户之间交互的数量和速度，为研究人员提供了前所未有的机会来探索和分析社会社区的底层结构。尽管人们对跟踪现实世界社交网络中用户群体的演变越来越感兴趣，但社区检测工作的主要焦点一直是静态网络中的社区。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的框架，用于在动态网络中随时间跟踪社区，其中为每个社区识别了一系列重要事件。我们的框架采用基于模块化的策略，不需要预定义的阈值，从而可以更准确、更稳健地跟踪动态社区。我们通过对具有嵌入式事件的合成网络进行大量实验来验证我们框架的有效性。结果表明我们的框架可以超越最先进的方法。此外，我们在 2020 年包含超过 60,000 名用户和 500 万条推文的 Twitter 网络上使用了所提出的方法，展示了其在识别现实场景中的动态社区方面的潜力。所提出的框架可以应用于不同的社交网络，并提供了一个有价值的工具，可以更深入地了解动态社交网络中社区的演变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模块度的动态社交网络社区追踪框架，无需预设阈值即可准确识别社区演变过程中的关键事件。
AI.motivation: 现有社区检测方法多集中于静态网络，难以应对现实社交网络中用户群体的动态变化需求，需开发无需预设参数的动态社区追踪技术。
AI.method: 采用模块度优化策略，通过识别社区生命周期中的关键事件实现动态跟踪，无需依赖预定义阈值进行社区划分。
AI.result: 在合成网络和60万用户的真实Twitter数据集实验中，该框架在动态社区追踪效果上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为不同社交网络提供了通用的动态社区分析工具，可深入揭示社交群体的演化规律。

search_text: Modularity-based approach for tracking communities in dynamic social networks 用于跟踪动态社交网络中的社区的基于模块化的方法 Community detection is a crucial task to unravel the intricate dynamics of online social networks. The emergence of these networks has dramatically increased the volume and speed of interactions among users, presenting researchers with unprecedented opportunities to explore and analyze the underlying structure of social communities. Despite a growing interest in tracking the evolution of groups of users in real-world social networks, the predominant focus of community detection efforts has been on communities within static networks. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework for tracking communities over time in a dynamic network, where a series of significant events is identified for each community. Our framework adopts a modularity-based strategy and does not require a predefined threshold, leading to a more accurate and robust tracking of dynamic communities. We validated the efficacy of our framework through extensive experiments on synthetic networks featuring embedded events. The results indicate that our framework can outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we utilized the proposed approach on a Twitter network comprising over 60,000 users and 5 million tweets throughout 2020, showcasing its potential in identifying dynamic communities in real-world scenarios. The proposed framework can be applied to different social networks and provides a valuable tool to gain deeper insights into the evolution of communities in dynamic social networks. 社区检测是揭示在线社交网络复杂动态的一项关键任务。这些网络的出现极大地增加了用户之间交互的数量和速度，为研究人员提供了前所未有的机会来探索和分析社会社区的底层结构。尽管人们对跟踪现实世界社交网络中用户群体的演变越来越感兴趣，但社区检测工作的主要焦点一直是静态网络中的社区。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的框架，用于在动态网络中随时间跟踪社区，其中为每个社区识别了一系列重要事件。我们的框架采用基于模块化的策略，不需要预定义的阈值，从而可以更准确、更稳健地跟踪动态社区。我们通过对具有嵌入式事件的合成网络进行大量实验来验证我们框架的有效性。结果表明我们的框架可以超越最先进的方法。此外，我们在 2020 年包含超过 60,000 名用户和 500 万条推文的 Twitter 网络上使用了所提出的方法，展示了其在识别现实场景中的动态社区方面的潜力。所提出的框架可以应用于不同的社交网络，并提供了一个有价值的工具，可以更深入地了解动态社交网络中社区的演变。 本文提出了一种基于模块度的动态社交网络社区追踪框架，无需预设阈值即可准确识别社区演变过程中的关键事件。 Michele Mazza,Guglielmo Cola,Maurizio Tesconi cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Kuan-Po Huang,Tzu-hsun Feng,Yu-Kuan Fu,Tsu-Yuan Hsu,Po-Chieh Yen,Wei-Cheng Tseng,Kai-Wei Chang,Hung-yi Lee
title: Ensemble knowledge distillation of self-supervised speech models
title_zh: 自监督语音模型的集成知识蒸馏
abstract: Distilled self-supervised models have shown competitive performance and efficiency in recent years. However, there is a lack of experience in jointly distilling multiple self-supervised speech models. In our work, we performed Ensemble Knowledge Distillation (EKD) on various self-supervised speech models such as HuBERT, RobustHuBERT, and WavLM. We tried two different aggregation techniques, layerwise-average and layerwise-concatenation, to the representations of different teacher models and found that the former was more effective. On top of that, we proposed a multiple prediction head method for student models to predict different layer outputs of multiple teacher models simultaneously. The experimental results show that our method improves the performance of the distilled models on four downstream speech processing tasks, Phoneme Recognition, Speaker Identification, Emotion Recognition, and Automatic Speech Recognition in the hidden-set track of the SUPERB benchmark.
summary: Distilled self-supervised models have shown competitive performance and efficiency in recent years. However, there is a lack of experience in jointly distilling multiple self-supervised speech models. In our work, we performed Ensemble Knowledge Distillation (EKD) on various self-supervised speech models such as HuBERT, RobustHuBERT, and WavLM. We tried two different aggregation techniques, layerwise-average and layerwise-concatenation, to the representations of different teacher models and found that the former was more effective. On top of that, we proposed a multiple prediction head method for student models to predict different layer outputs of multiple teacher models simultaneously. The experimental results show that our method improves the performance of the distilled models on four downstream speech processing tasks, Phoneme Recognition, Speaker Identification, Emotion Recognition, and Automatic Speech Recognition in the hidden-set track of the SUPERB benchmark.
abstract_zh: 近年来，精炼的自我监督模型表现出了具有竞争力的性能和效率。然而，缺乏联合提炼多个自监督语音模型的经验。在我们的工作中，我们对各种自监督语音模型（例如 HuBERT、RobustHuBERT 和 WavLM）执行了集成知识蒸馏 (EKD)。我们尝试了两种不同的聚合技术，即分层平均和分层连接，来表示不同教师模型的表示，发现前者更有效。最重要的是，我们提出了一种针对学生模型的多预测头方法，以同时预测多个教师模型的不同层输出。实验结果表明，我们的方法提高了 SUPERB 基准的隐藏集轨道中四个下游语音处理任务（音素识别、说话人识别、情绪识别和自动语音识别）的蒸馏模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成知识蒸馏方法，通过结合多个自监督语音模型（如HuBERT、RobustHuBERT和WavLM）的表示，提升蒸馏模型在下游任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管蒸馏后的自监督模型在效率和性能上表现出色，但联合蒸馏多个模型的经验不足，限制了进一步优化空间。
AI.method: 采用两种聚合技术（层间平均和层间拼接）整合教师模型的表示，发现层间平均更有效；同时为学生模型设计多预测头，使其能同时预测多个教师模型的层输出。
AI.result: 在SUPERB基准的四个下游任务（音素识别、说话人识别、情绪识别和自动语音识别）中，该方法显著提升了蒸馏模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 集成知识蒸馏结合多预测头机制能有效提升自监督语音模型的蒸馏效果，为多模型联合优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: George Gesek
title: A Uniform Quantum Computing Model Based on Virtual Quantum Processors
title_zh: 基于虚拟量子处理器的统一量子计算模型
abstract: Quantum Computers, one fully realized, can represent an exponential boost in computing power. However, the computational power of the current quantum computers, referred to as Noisy Internediate Scale Quantum, or NISQ, is severely limited because of environmental and intrinsic noise, as well as the very low connectivity between qubits compared to their total amount. We propose a virtual quantum processor that emulates a generic hybrid quantum machine which can serve as a logical version of quantum computing hardware. This hybrid classical quantum machine powers quantum-logical computations which are substitutable by future native quantum processors.
summary: Quantum Computers, one fully realized, can represent an exponential boost in computing power. However, the computational power of the current quantum computers, referred to as Noisy Internediate Scale Quantum, or NISQ, is severely limited because of environmental and intrinsic noise, as well as the very low connectivity between qubits compared to their total amount. We propose a virtual quantum processor that emulates a generic hybrid quantum machine which can serve as a logical version of quantum computing hardware. This hybrid classical quantum machine powers quantum-logical computations which are substitutable by future native quantum processors.
abstract_zh: 完全实现的量子计算机可以代表计算能力的指数级提升。然而，由于环境和固有噪声以及量子位之间的连通性与其总量相比非常低，当前量子计算机（称为噪声中间尺度量子（NISQ））的计算能力受到严重限制。我们提出了一种虚拟量子处理器，它模拟通用混合量子机，可以充当量子计算硬件的逻辑版本。这种混合经典量子机为量子逻辑计算提供动力，可被未来的原生量子处理器取代。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟量子处理器的统一量子计算模型，旨在解决当前NISQ量子计算机的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前量子计算机受噪声、低连通性等限制，难以发挥量子计算潜力，需过渡性方案支撑未来量子处理器发展。
AI.method: 设计虚拟量子处理器模拟混合经典-量子计算架构，通过软件层面实现量子逻辑运算的抽象化与可扩展性。
AI.result: 构建出可替代未来原生量子处理器的逻辑计算框架，为统一量子计算模型提供了可行的技术路径。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟量子处理器模型有效缓解了当前硬件限制，为量子计算发展提供了过渡性解决方案与理论基础。

authors_text: Jessica Leone,Luca Traini
title: Enhancing Trace Visualizations for Microservices Performance Analysis
title_zh: 增强微服务性能分析的跟踪可视化
comment: Accepted for publication in the 6th Workshop on Hot Topics in Cloud Computing Performance (HotCloudPerf 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication in the 6th Workshop on Hot Topics in Cloud Computing Performance (HotCloudPerf 2023)
abstract: Performance analysis of microservices can be a challenging task, as a typical request to these systems involves multiple Remote Procedure Calls (RPC) spanning across independent services and machines. Practitioners primarily rely on distributed tracing tools to closely monitor microservices performance. These tools enable practitioners to trace, collect, and visualize RPC workflows and associated events in the context of individual end-to-end requests. While effective for analyzing individual end-to-end requests, current distributed tracing visualizations often fall short in providing a comprehensive understanding of the system's overall performance. To address this limitation, we propose a novel visualization approach that enables aggregate performance analysis of multiple end-to-end requests. Our approach builds on a previously developed technique for comparing structural differences of request pairs and extends it for aggregate performance analysis of sets of requests. This paper presents our proposal and discusses our preliminary ongoing progress in developing this innovative approach.
summary: Performance analysis of microservices can be a challenging task, as a typical request to these systems involves multiple Remote Procedure Calls (RPC) spanning across independent services and machines. Practitioners primarily rely on distributed tracing tools to closely monitor microservices performance. These tools enable practitioners to trace, collect, and visualize RPC workflows and associated events in the context of individual end-to-end requests. While effective for analyzing individual end-to-end requests, current distributed tracing visualizations often fall short in providing a comprehensive understanding of the system's overall performance. To address this limitation, we propose a novel visualization approach that enables aggregate performance analysis of multiple end-to-end requests. Our approach builds on a previously developed technique for comparing structural differences of request pairs and extends it for aggregate performance analysis of sets of requests. This paper presents our proposal and discusses our preliminary ongoing progress in developing this innovative approach.
abstract_zh: 微服务的性能分析可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为对这些系统的典型请求涉及跨越独立服务和机器的多个远程过程调用 (RPC)。从业者主要依靠分布式跟踪工具来密切监控微服务性能。这些工具使从业者能够在单个端到端请求的上下文中跟踪、收集和可视化 RPC 工作流程和相关事件。虽然当前的分布式跟踪可视化对于分析单个端到端请求很有效，但通常无法全面了解系统的整体性能。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的可视化方法，可以对多个端到端请求进行聚合性能分析。我们的方法建立在先前开发的用于比较请求对的结构差异的技术之上，并将其扩展为请求集的聚合性能分析。本文介绍了我们的建议，并讨论了我们在开发这种创新方法方面正在进行的初步进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增强的可视化方法，用于微服务系统的整体性能分析，通过聚合多个端到端请求的追踪数据。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式追踪工具难以全面理解微服务系统的整体性能，仅能分析单个请求的端到端流程。
AI.method: 基于已有的请求对结构差异比较技术，扩展为支持多请求集合的聚合性能分析可视化方法。
AI.result: 提出了新的可视化方案，并讨论了该方法的初步开发进展。
AI.conclusion: 该方法弥补了现有工具在系统级性能分析的不足，为微服务性能优化提供新视角。

search_text: Enhancing Trace Visualizations for Microservices Performance Analysis 增强微服务性能分析的跟踪可视化 Performance analysis of microservices can be a challenging task, as a typical request to these systems involves multiple Remote Procedure Calls (RPC) spanning across independent services and machines. Practitioners primarily rely on distributed tracing tools to closely monitor microservices performance. These tools enable practitioners to trace, collect, and visualize RPC workflows and associated events in the context of individual end-to-end requests. While effective for analyzing individual end-to-end requests, current distributed tracing visualizations often fall short in providing a comprehensive understanding of the system's overall performance. To address this limitation, we propose a novel visualization approach that enables aggregate performance analysis of multiple end-to-end requests. Our approach builds on a previously developed technique for comparing structural differences of request pairs and extends it for aggregate performance analysis of sets of requests. This paper presents our proposal and discusses our preliminary ongoing progress in developing this innovative approach. 微服务的性能分析可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为对这些系统的典型请求涉及跨越独立服务和机器的多个远程过程调用 (RPC)。从业者主要依靠分布式跟踪工具来密切监控微服务性能。这些工具使从业者能够在单个端到端请求的上下文中跟踪、收集和可视化 RPC 工作流程和相关事件。虽然当前的分布式跟踪可视化对于分析单个端到端请求很有效，但通常无法全面了解系统的整体性能。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的可视化方法，可以对多个端到端请求进行聚合性能分析。我们的方法建立在先前开发的用于比较请求对的结构差异的技术之上，并将其扩展为请求集的聚合性能分析。本文介绍了我们的建议，并讨论了我们在开发这种创新方法方面正在进行的初步进展。 本文提出一种增强的可视化方法，用于微服务系统的整体性能分析，通过聚合多个端到端请求的追踪数据。 Jessica Leone,Luca Traini cs.SE,cs.HC,cs.PF

authors_text: Areej Eweida,Nimord Segol,Maxim Freydin,Niv Sfaradi,Barak Or
title: Surface Recognition for e-Scooter Using Smartphone IMU Sensor
title_zh: 使用智能手机 IMU 传感器的电动滑板车表面识别
abstract: In recent years, as the use of micromobility gained popularity, technological challenges connected to e-scooters became increasingly important. This paper focuses on road surface recognition, an important task in this area. A reliable and accurate method for road surface recognition can help improve the safety and stability of the vehicle. Here a data-driven method is proposed to recognize if an e-scooter is on a road or a sidewalk. The proposed method uses only the widely available inertial measurement unit (IMU) sensors on a smartphone device. deep neural networks (DNNs) are used to infer whether an e-scooteris driving on a road or on a sidewalk by solving a binary classification problem. A data set is collected and several different deep models as well as classical machine learning approaches for the binary classification problem are applied and compared. Experiment results on a route containing the two surfaces are presented demonstrating the DNNs ability to distinguish between them.
summary: In recent years, as the use of micromobility gained popularity, technological challenges connected to e-scooters became increasingly important. This paper focuses on road surface recognition, an important task in this area. A reliable and accurate method for road surface recognition can help improve the safety and stability of the vehicle. Here a data-driven method is proposed to recognize if an e-scooter is on a road or a sidewalk. The proposed method uses only the widely available inertial measurement unit (IMU) sensors on a smartphone device. deep neural networks (DNNs) are used to infer whether an e-scooteris driving on a road or on a sidewalk by solving a binary classification problem. A data set is collected and several different deep models as well as classical machine learning approaches for the binary classification problem are applied and compared. Experiment results on a route containing the two surfaces are presented demonstrating the DNNs ability to distinguish between them.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着微移动技术的普及，与电动滑板车相关的技术挑战变得越来越重要。本文重点关注路面识别，这是该领域的一项重要任务。可靠、准确的路面识别方法有助于提高车辆的安全性和稳定性。这里提出了一种数据驱动的方法来识别电动滑板车是在道路上还是人行道上。所提出的方法仅使用智能手机设备上广泛使用的惯性测量单元（IMU）传感器。深度神经网络（DNN）用于通过解决二元分类问题来推断电动滑板车是在道路上行驶还是在人行道上行驶。收集数据集，并应用和比较几种不同的深度模型以及用于二元分类问题的经典机器学习方法。包含两个表面的路线的实验结果证明了 DNN 区分它们的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手机IMU传感器的数据驱动方法，用于识别电动滑板车行驶在道路还是人行道上。
AI.motivation: 随着微出行工具的普及，电动滑板车的道路表面识别对提升车辆安全性和稳定性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 利用智能手机内置的IMU传感器采集数据，通过深度神经网络（DNN）解决二分类问题，并与传统机器学习方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DNN能够有效区分道路与人行道表面特征，识别准确率较高。
AI.conclusion: 基于IMU传感器的DNN方法在电动滑板车路面识别任务中表现优异，可为智能出行安全提供技术支撑。

authors_text: Prachi Singh,Amrit Kaul,Sriram Ganapathy
title: Supervised Hierarchical Clustering using Graph Neural Networks for Speaker Diarization
title_zh: 使用图神经网络进行有监督的分层聚类以进行说话者二值化
comment: 5 pages including references. Accepted in ICASSP 2023
comments: 5 pages including references. Accepted in ICASSP 2023
abstract: Conventional methods for speaker diarization involve windowing an audio file into short segments to extract speaker embeddings, followed by an unsupervised clustering of the embeddings. This multi-step approach generates speaker assignments for each segment. In this paper, we propose a novel Supervised HierArchical gRaph Clustering algorithm (SHARC) for speaker diarization where we introduce a hierarchical structure using Graph Neural Network (GNN) to perform supervised clustering. The supervision allows the model to update the representations and directly improve the clustering performance, thus enabling a single-step approach for diarization. In the proposed work, the input segment embeddings are treated as nodes of a graph with the edge weights corresponding to the similarity scores between the nodes. We also propose an approach to jointly update the embedding extractor and the GNN model to perform end-to-end speaker diarization (E2E-SHARC). During inference, the hierarchical clustering is performed using node densities and edge existence probabilities to merge the segments until convergence. In the diarization experiments, we illustrate that the proposed E2E-SHARC approach achieves 53% and 44% relative improvements over the baseline systems on benchmark datasets like AMI and Voxconverse, respectively.
summary: Conventional methods for speaker diarization involve windowing an audio file into short segments to extract speaker embeddings, followed by an unsupervised clustering of the embeddings. This multi-step approach generates speaker assignments for each segment. In this paper, we propose a novel Supervised HierArchical gRaph Clustering algorithm (SHARC) for speaker diarization where we introduce a hierarchical structure using Graph Neural Network (GNN) to perform supervised clustering. The supervision allows the model to update the representations and directly improve the clustering performance, thus enabling a single-step approach for diarization. In the proposed work, the input segment embeddings are treated as nodes of a graph with the edge weights corresponding to the similarity scores between the nodes. We also propose an approach to jointly update the embedding extractor and the GNN model to perform end-to-end speaker diarization (E2E-SHARC). During inference, the hierarchical clustering is performed using node densities and edge existence probabilities to merge the segments until convergence. In the diarization experiments, we illustrate that the proposed E2E-SHARC approach achieves 53% and 44% relative improvements over the baseline systems on benchmark datasets like AMI and Voxconverse, respectively.
abstract_zh: 说话人二值化的传统方法包括将音频文件窗口化为短片段以提取说话人嵌入，然后对嵌入进行无监督聚类。这种多步骤方法为每个片段生成发言人分配。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的用于说话人二值化的监督分层图聚类算法（SHARC），其中我们引入了使用图神经网络（GNN）来执行监督聚类的分层结构。监督允许模型更新表示并直接提高聚类性能，从而实现单步二值化方法。在所提出的工作中，输入段嵌入被视为图的节点，其边权重对应于节点之间的相似性得分。我们还提出了一种联合更新嵌入提取器和 GNN 模型以执行端到端说话人二值化（E2E-SHARC）的方法。在推理过程中，使用节点密度和边缘存在概率来执行层次聚类，以合并片段直至收敛。在二值化实验中，我们表明所提出的 E2E-SHARC 方法在 AMI 和 Voxconverse 等基准数据集上比基准系统分别实现了 53% 和 44% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络的监督分层聚类算法SHARC，用于说话人日记任务，通过单步端到端方法提升聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人日记方法依赖多步骤的无监督聚类，存在效率低、性能受限的问题，需通过监督学习和图结构优化实现更高效的单步解决方案。
AI.method: 将语音段嵌入表示为图节点，边权重为相似度；结合图神经网络与嵌入提取器联合优化，利用节点密度和边概率进行层次化聚类合并。
AI.result: 在AMI和Voxconverse数据集上，E2E-SHARC相较基线系统分别实现53%和44%的相对性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 监督分层图聚类方法通过端到端优化显著提升了说话人日记任务的准确性，验证了图结构与监督学习结合的有效性。
