authors_text: Muthu Chidambaram,Chenwei Wu,Yu Cheng,Rong Ge
title: Hiding Data Helps: On the Benefits of Masking for Sparse Coding
title_zh: 隐藏数据有帮助：关于稀疏编码屏蔽的好处
abstract: Sparse coding, which refers to modeling a signal as sparse linear combinations of the elements of a learned dictionary, has proven to be a successful (and interpretable) approach in applications such as signal processing, computer vision, and medical imaging. While this success has spurred much work on provable guarantees for dictionary recovery when the learned dictionary is the same size as the ground-truth dictionary, work on the setting where the learned dictionary is larger (or over-realized) with respect to the ground truth is comparatively nascent. Existing theoretical results in this setting have been constrained to the case of noise-less data. We show in this work that, in the presence of noise, minimizing the standard dictionary learning objective can fail to recover the elements of the ground-truth dictionary in the over-realized regime, regardless of the magnitude of the signal in the data-generating process. Furthermore, drawing from the growing body of work on self-supervised learning, we propose a novel masking objective for which recovering the ground-truth dictionary is in fact optimal as the signal increases for a large class of data-generating processes. We corroborate our theoretical results with experiments across several parameter regimes showing that our proposed objective also enjoys better empirical performance than the standard reconstruction objective.
summary: Sparse coding, which refers to modeling a signal as sparse linear combinations of the elements of a learned dictionary, has proven to be a successful (and interpretable) approach in applications such as signal processing, computer vision, and medical imaging. While this success has spurred much work on provable guarantees for dictionary recovery when the learned dictionary is the same size as the ground-truth dictionary, work on the setting where the learned dictionary is larger (or over-realized) with respect to the ground truth is comparatively nascent. Existing theoretical results in this setting have been constrained to the case of noise-less data. We show in this work that, in the presence of noise, minimizing the standard dictionary learning objective can fail to recover the elements of the ground-truth dictionary in the over-realized regime, regardless of the magnitude of the signal in the data-generating process. Furthermore, drawing from the growing body of work on self-supervised learning, we propose a novel masking objective for which recovering the ground-truth dictionary is in fact optimal as the signal increases for a large class of data-generating processes. We corroborate our theoretical results with experiments across several parameter regimes showing that our proposed objective also enjoys better empirical performance than the standard reconstruction objective.
abstract_zh: 稀疏编码是指将信号建模为学习字典元素的稀疏线性组合，已被证明在信号处理、计算机视觉和医学成像等应用中是一种成功的（且可解释的）方法。虽然这一成功激发了在学习字典与真实字典大小相同时字典恢复的可证明保证方面的大量工作，但在学习字典相对于真实字典更大（或过度实现）的情况下的工作相对较新。这种情况下的现有理论结果仅限于无噪声数据的情况。我们在这项工作中表明，在存在噪声的情况下，无论数据生成过程中信号的大小如何，最小化标准字典学习目标都可能无法在过度实现的情况下恢复真实字典的元素。此外，根据不断增长的自监督学习工作，我们提出了一种新颖的掩蔽目标，随着大量数据生成过程的信号增加，恢复地面实况字典实际上是最佳的。我们通过多个参数范围的实验证实了我们的理论结果，表明我们提出的目标也比标准重建目标具有更好的经验性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在过参数化字典学习中，通过引入掩码机制提升稀疏编码的字典恢复性能。
AI.motivation: 现有理论在噪声环境下无法保证过参数化字典学习的恢复能力，且标准目标函数在噪声存在时可能失效。
AI.method: 提出基于自监督学习的掩码目标函数，通过隐藏数据部分信息引导字典学习过程。
AI.result: 理论证明掩码目标在信号增强时能保证真字典恢复，实验显示其优于传统重建目标。
AI.conclusion: 掩码机制有效解决了过参数化稀疏编码中的噪声鲁棒性问题，为字典学习提供新思路。

search_text: Hiding Data Helps: On the Benefits of Masking for Sparse Coding 隐藏数据有帮助：关于稀疏编码屏蔽的好处 Sparse coding, which refers to modeling a signal as sparse linear combinations of the elements of a learned dictionary, has proven to be a successful (and interpretable) approach in applications such as signal processing, computer vision, and medical imaging. While this success has spurred much work on provable guarantees for dictionary recovery when the learned dictionary is the same size as the ground-truth dictionary, work on the setting where the learned dictionary is larger (or over-realized) with respect to the ground truth is comparatively nascent. Existing theoretical results in this setting have been constrained to the case of noise-less data. We show in this work that, in the presence of noise, minimizing the standard dictionary learning objective can fail to recover the elements of the ground-truth dictionary in the over-realized regime, regardless of the magnitude of the signal in the data-generating process. Furthermore, drawing from the growing body of work on self-supervised learning, we propose a novel masking objective for which recovering the ground-truth dictionary is in fact optimal as the signal increases for a large class of data-generating processes. We corroborate our theoretical results with experiments across several parameter regimes showing that our proposed objective also enjoys better empirical performance than the standard reconstruction objective. 稀疏编码是指将信号建模为学习字典元素的稀疏线性组合，已被证明在信号处理、计算机视觉和医学成像等应用中是一种成功的（且可解释的）方法。虽然这一成功激发了在学习字典与真实字典大小相同时字典恢复的可证明保证方面的大量工作，但在学习字典相对于真实字典更大（或过度实现）的情况下的工作相对较新。这种情况下的现有理论结果仅限于无噪声数据的情况。我们在这项工作中表明，在存在噪声的情况下，无论数据生成过程中信号的大小如何，最小化标准字典学习目标都可能无法在过度实现的情况下恢复真实字典的元素。此外，根据不断增长的自监督学习工作，我们提出了一种新颖的掩蔽目标，随着大量数据生成过程的信号增加，恢复地面实况字典实际上是最佳的。我们通过多个参数范围的实验证实了我们的理论结果，表明我们提出的目标也比标准重建目标具有更好的经验性能。 本文研究了在过参数化字典学习中，通过引入掩码机制提升稀疏编码的字典恢复性能。 Muthu Chidambaram,Chenwei Wu,Yu Cheng,Rong Ge cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ruchika Chavhan,Henry Gouk,Jan Stuehmer,Calum Heggan,Mehrdad Yaghoobi,Timothy Hospedales
title: Amortised Invariance Learning for Contrastive Self-Supervision
title_zh: 用于对比自我监督的摊余不变性学习
abstract: Contrastive self-supervised learning methods famously produce high quality transferable representations by learning invariances to different data augmentations. Invariances established during pre-training can be interpreted as strong inductive biases. However these may or may not be helpful, depending on if they match the invariance requirements of downstream tasks or not. This has led to several attempts to learn task-specific invariances during pre-training, however, these methods are highly compute intensive and tedious to train. We introduce the notion of amortised invariance learning for contrastive self supervision. In the pre-training stage, we parameterize the feature extractor by differentiable invariance hyper-parameters that control the invariances encoded by the representation. Then, for any downstream task, both linear readout and task-specific invariance requirements can be efficiently and effectively learned by gradient-descent. We evaluate the notion of amortised invariances for contrastive learning over two different modalities: vision and audio, on two widely-used contrastive learning methods in vision: SimCLR and MoCo-v2 with popular architectures like ResNets and Vision Transformers, and SimCLR with ResNet-18 for audio. We show that our amortised features provide a reliable way to learn diverse downstream tasks with different invariance requirements, while using a single feature and avoiding task-specific pre-training. This provides an exciting perspective that opens up new horizons in the field of general purpose representation learning.
summary: Contrastive self-supervised learning methods famously produce high quality transferable representations by learning invariances to different data augmentations. Invariances established during pre-training can be interpreted as strong inductive biases. However these may or may not be helpful, depending on if they match the invariance requirements of downstream tasks or not. This has led to several attempts to learn task-specific invariances during pre-training, however, these methods are highly compute intensive and tedious to train. We introduce the notion of amortised invariance learning for contrastive self supervision. In the pre-training stage, we parameterize the feature extractor by differentiable invariance hyper-parameters that control the invariances encoded by the representation. Then, for any downstream task, both linear readout and task-specific invariance requirements can be efficiently and effectively learned by gradient-descent. We evaluate the notion of amortised invariances for contrastive learning over two different modalities: vision and audio, on two widely-used contrastive learning methods in vision: SimCLR and MoCo-v2 with popular architectures like ResNets and Vision Transformers, and SimCLR with ResNet-18 for audio. We show that our amortised features provide a reliable way to learn diverse downstream tasks with different invariance requirements, while using a single feature and avoiding task-specific pre-training. This provides an exciting perspective that opens up new horizons in the field of general purpose representation learning.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，对比自监督学习方法通​​过学习不同数据增强的不变性来产生高质量的可转移表示。预训练期间建立的不变性可以解释为强归纳偏差。然而，这些可能有帮助，也可能没有帮助，具体取决于它们是否符合下游任务的不变性要求。这导致人们在预训练期间多次尝试学习特定于任务的不变性，但是，这些方法的计算量很大并且训练起来很繁琐。我们引入摊余不变性学习的概念来进行对比自我监督。在预训练阶段，我们通过可微不变性超参数对特征提取器进行参数化，这些超参数控制由表示编码的不变性。然后，对于任何下游任务，可以通过梯度下降高效且有效地学习线性读出和特定于任务的不变性要求。我们评估了两种不同模式（视觉和音频）对比学习的摊销不变性的概念，以及视觉中两种广泛使用的对比学习方法：SimCLR 和 MoCo-v2 以及 ResNets 和 Vision Transformers 等流行架构，以及 SimCLR 和 ResNet-18 用于音频。我们表明，我们的摊销特征提供了一种可靠的方法来学习具有不同不变性要求的各种下游任务，同时使用单个特征并避免特定于任务的预训练。这提供了一个令人兴奋的视角，为通用表示学习领域开辟了新的视野。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为'摊销不变性学习'的方法，用于对比自监督学习，通过参数化特征提取器的可微不变性超参数，使预训练模型能适应下游任务的特定不变性需求。
AI.motivation: 传统对比自监督学习通过数据增强学习不变性，但这些不变性可能与下游任务需求不匹配，而现有任务特定不变性学习方法计算成本高且训练繁琐。
AI.method: 在预训练阶段，用可微不变性超参数参数化特征提取器，通过梯度下降同时优化线性读出层和任务特定不变性要求，无需任务特定预训练。
AI.result: 在视觉和音频模态的多个主流方法（如SimCLR、MoCo-v2）上验证，证明摊销不变性特征能可靠学习不同不变性需求的下游任务，且仅需单一特征提取器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为通用表示学习提供了新视角，通过统一框架适应多样化任务需求，无需额外预训练即可实现高效迁移学习。

authors_text: Yuto Omae,Yusuke Sakai,Hirotaka Takahashi
title: FG-SSA: Features Gradient-based Signals Selection Algorithm of Linear Complexity for Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: FG-SSA：具有基于梯度的卷积神经网络线性复杂度信号选择算法
abstract: Recently, many convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for classification by time domain data of multisignals have been developed. Although some signals are important for correct classification, others are not. When data that do not include important signals for classification are taken as the CNN input layer, the calculation, memory, and data collection costs increase. Therefore, identifying and eliminating nonimportant signals from the input layer are important. In this study, we proposed features gradient-based signals selection algorithm (FG-SSA), which can be used for finding and removing nonimportant signals for classification by utilizing features gradient obtained by the calculation process of grad-CAM. When we define N as the number of signals, the computational complexity of the proposed algorithm is linear time O(N), that is, it has a low calculation cost. We verified the effectiveness of the algorithm using the OPPORTUNITY Activity Recognition dataset, which is an open dataset comprising acceleration signals of human activities. In addition, we checked the average 6.55 signals from a total of 15 acceleration signals (five triaxial sensors) that were removed by FG-SSA while maintaining high generalization scores of classification. Therefore, the proposed algorithm FG-SSA has an effect on finding and removing signals that are not important for CNN-based classification.
summary: Recently, many convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for classification by time domain data of multisignals have been developed. Although some signals are important for correct classification, others are not. When data that do not include important signals for classification are taken as the CNN input layer, the calculation, memory, and data collection costs increase. Therefore, identifying and eliminating nonimportant signals from the input layer are important. In this study, we proposed features gradient-based signals selection algorithm (FG-SSA), which can be used for finding and removing nonimportant signals for classification by utilizing features gradient obtained by the calculation process of grad-CAM. When we define N as the number of signals, the computational complexity of the proposed algorithm is linear time O(N), that is, it has a low calculation cost. We verified the effectiveness of the algorithm using the OPPORTUNITY Activity Recognition dataset, which is an open dataset comprising acceleration signals of human activities. In addition, we checked the average 6.55 signals from a total of 15 acceleration signals (five triaxial sensors) that were removed by FG-SSA while maintaining high generalization scores of classification. Therefore, the proposed algorithm FG-SSA has an effect on finding and removing signals that are not important for CNN-based classification.
abstract_zh: 最近，已经开发了许多用于通过多信号时域数据进行分类的卷积神经网络（CNN）。尽管某些信号对于正确分类很重要，但其他信号则不然。当将不包含重要分类信号的数据作为CNN输入层时，计算、内存和数据收集成本会增加。因此，识别并消除输入层中的不重要信号非常重要。在本研究中，我们提出了基于特征梯度的信号选择算法（FG-SSA），该算法可利用grad-CAM计算过程获得的特征梯度来查找和去除不重要的信号以进行分类。当我们定义N为信号数量时，该算法的计算复杂度为线性时间O(N)，即计算成本较低。我们使用机会活动识别数据集验证了该算法的有效性，该数据集是一个包含人类活动加速度信号的开放数据集。此外，我们还检查了 FG-SSA 移除的总共 15 个加速度信号（五个三轴传感器）中的平均 6.55 个信号，同时保持了较高的分类泛化分数。因此，所提出的算法FG-SSA对于发现和去除对于基于CNN的分类不重要的信号有一定的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征梯度的信号选择算法FG-SSA，用于在卷积神经网络（CNN）中识别并移除对分类不重要的信号，以降低计算和内存成本。
AI.motivation: 在多信号时间域数据分类任务中，输入信号中存在大量非关键信号，导致计算、内存和数据采集成本增加，需有效识别并移除冗余信号以提升效率。
AI.method: 利用grad-CAM计算过程中获得的特征梯度，设计线性复杂度O(N)的FG-SSA算法，通过梯度信息筛选并移除对分类贡献较小的信号。
AI.result: 在OPPORTUNITY数据集上验证，FG-SSA平均从15个加速度信号中移除6.55个信号，同时保持高分类泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: FG-SSA能有效识别并移除CNN分类中非关键信号，在降低计算成本的同时维持模型性能，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: FG-SSA: Features Gradient-based Signals Selection Algorithm of Linear Complexity for Convolutional Neural Networks FG-SSA：具有基于梯度的卷积神经网络线性复杂度信号选择算法 Recently, many convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for classification by time domain data of multisignals have been developed. Although some signals are important for correct classification, others are not. When data that do not include important signals for classification are taken as the CNN input layer, the calculation, memory, and data collection costs increase. Therefore, identifying and eliminating nonimportant signals from the input layer are important. In this study, we proposed features gradient-based signals selection algorithm (FG-SSA), which can be used for finding and removing nonimportant signals for classification by utilizing features gradient obtained by the calculation process of grad-CAM. When we define N as the number of signals, the computational complexity of the proposed algorithm is linear time O(N), that is, it has a low calculation cost. We verified the effectiveness of the algorithm using the OPPORTUNITY Activity Recognition dataset, which is an open dataset comprising acceleration signals of human activities. In addition, we checked the average 6.55 signals from a total of 15 acceleration signals (five triaxial sensors) that were removed by FG-SSA while maintaining high generalization scores of classification. Therefore, the proposed algorithm FG-SSA has an effect on finding and removing signals that are not important for CNN-based classification. 最近，已经开发了许多用于通过多信号时域数据进行分类的卷积神经网络（CNN）。尽管某些信号对于正确分类很重要，但其他信号则不然。当将不包含重要分类信号的数据作为CNN输入层时，计算、内存和数据收集成本会增加。因此，识别并消除输入层中的不重要信号非常重要。在本研究中，我们提出了基于特征梯度的信号选择算法（FG-SSA），该算法可利用grad-CAM计算过程获得的特征梯度来查找和去除不重要的信号以进行分类。当我们定义N为信号数量时，该算法的计算复杂度为线性时间O(N)，即计算成本较低。我们使用机会活动识别数据集验证了该算法的有效性，该数据集是一个包含人类活动加速度信号的开放数据集。此外，我们还检查了 FG-SSA 移除的总共 15 个加速度信号（五个三轴传感器）中的平均 6.55 个信号，同时保持了较高的分类泛化分数。因此，所提出的算法FG-SSA对于发现和去除对于基于CNN的分类不重要的信号有一定的作用。 本文提出了一种基于特征梯度的信号选择算法FG-SSA，用于在卷积神经网络（CNN）中识别并移除对分类不重要的信号，以降低计算和内存成本。 Yuto Omae,Yusuke Sakai,Hirotaka Takahashi eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ard Kastrati,Martyna Beata Plomecka,Joël Küchler,Nicolas Langer,Roger Wattenhofer
title: Electrode Clustering and Bandpass Analysis of EEG Data for Gaze Estimation
title_zh: 用于注视估计的脑电图数据的电极聚类和带通分析
comment: Gaze Meets Machine Learning Workshop (GMML@NeurIPS), New Orleans, Louisiana, USA, December 2022
comments: Gaze Meets Machine Learning Workshop (GMML@NeurIPS), New Orleans, Louisiana, USA, December 2022
abstract: In this study, we validate the findings of previously published papers, showing the feasibility of an Electroencephalography (EEG) based gaze estimation. Moreover, we extend previous research by demonstrating that with only a slight drop in model performance, we can significantly reduce the number of electrodes, indicating that a high-density, expensive EEG cap is not necessary for the purposes of EEG-based eye tracking. Using data-driven approaches, we establish which electrode clusters impact gaze estimation and how the different types of EEG data preprocessing affect the models' performance. Finally, we also inspect which recorded frequencies are most important for the defined tasks.
summary: In this study, we validate the findings of previously published papers, showing the feasibility of an Electroencephalography (EEG) based gaze estimation. Moreover, we extend previous research by demonstrating that with only a slight drop in model performance, we can significantly reduce the number of electrodes, indicating that a high-density, expensive EEG cap is not necessary for the purposes of EEG-based eye tracking. Using data-driven approaches, we establish which electrode clusters impact gaze estimation and how the different types of EEG data preprocessing affect the models' performance. Finally, we also inspect which recorded frequencies are most important for the defined tasks.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们验证了之前发表的论文的研究结果，展示了基于脑电图（EEG）的注视估计的可行性。此外，我们扩展了之前的研究，证明只要模型性能略有下降，我们就可以显着减少电极数量，这表明对于基于脑电图的眼动追踪来说，高密度、昂贵的脑电图帽并不是必需的。使用数据驱动的方法，我们确定哪些电极簇影响注视估计以及不同类型的脑电图数据预处理如何影响模型的性能。最后，我们还检查哪些记录的频率对于定义的任务最重要。

AI.tldr: 验证基于EEG的眼动估计可行性，并通过减少电极数量优化设备成本。
AI.motivation: 高密度EEG设备成本高昂，需探索减少电极数量同时保持性能的可行性。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动方法进行电极聚类与带通分析，评估不同预处理对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 减少电极数量仅轻微影响模型性能，特定频率范围对眼动估计任务至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 无需高密度EEG设备即可实现有效眼动估计，为低成本设备开发提供依据。

authors_text: Zekai Chen,Mariann Micsinai Balan,Kevin Brown
title: Language Models are Few-shot Learners for Prognostic Prediction
title_zh: 语言模型是用于预后预测的小样本学习者
abstract: Clinical prediction is an essential task in the healthcare industry. However, the recent success of transformers, on which large language models are built, has not been extended to this domain. In this research, we explore the use of transformers and language models in prognostic prediction for immunotherapy using real-world patients' clinical data and molecular profiles. This paper investigates the potential of transformers to improve clinical prediction compared to conventional machine learning approaches and addresses the challenge of few-shot learning in predicting rare disease areas. The study benchmarks the efficacy of baselines and language models on prognostic prediction across multiple cancer types and investigates the impact of different pretrained language models under few-shot regimes. The results demonstrate significant improvements in accuracy and highlight the potential of NLP in clinical research to improve early detection and intervention for different diseases.
summary: Clinical prediction is an essential task in the healthcare industry. However, the recent success of transformers, on which large language models are built, has not been extended to this domain. In this research, we explore the use of transformers and language models in prognostic prediction for immunotherapy using real-world patients' clinical data and molecular profiles. This paper investigates the potential of transformers to improve clinical prediction compared to conventional machine learning approaches and addresses the challenge of few-shot learning in predicting rare disease areas. The study benchmarks the efficacy of baselines and language models on prognostic prediction across multiple cancer types and investigates the impact of different pretrained language models under few-shot regimes. The results demonstrate significant improvements in accuracy and highlight the potential of NLP in clinical research to improve early detection and intervention for different diseases.
abstract_zh: 临床预测是医疗保健行业的一项重要任务。然而，最近构建大型语言模型的 Transformer 所取得的成功尚未扩展到该领域。在这项研究中，我们利用真实世界患者的临床数据和分子概况，探索变压器和语言模型在免疫治疗预后预测中的应用。本文研究了与传统机器学习方法相比，变压器改善临床预测的潜力，并解决了少样本学习在预测罕见疾病领域的挑战。该研究对基线和语言模型对多种癌症类型的预后预测的有效性进行了基准测试，并研究了不同预训练语言模型在少数情况下的影响。结果表明，准确性显着提高，并凸显了 NLP 在临床研究中改善不同疾病早期检测和干预的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文探索使用Transformer和语言模型在临床预后预测中的应用，特别是在少样本学习场景下对比传统机器学习方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在多个领域取得成功，但其在临床预测尤其是罕见疾病少样本学习中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 基于真实患者临床数据和分子特征，通过对比基线模型与不同预训练语言模型在多种癌症类型中的预测性能，评估少样本学习下的模型表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明语言模型在准确性上显著优于传统方法，验证了NLP技术在临床早期检测与干预中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型在少样本临床预测任务中展现出优越性，为医疗领域提供新的技术路径以提升疾病预测能力。

authors_text: Riccardo Albertoni,Sara Colantonio,Piotr Skrzypczyński,Jerzy Stefanowski
title: Reproducibility of Machine Learning: Terminology, Recommendations and Open Issues
title_zh: 机器学习的可重复性：术语、建议和未决问题
abstract: Reproducibility is one of the core dimensions that concur to deliver Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence. Broadly speaking, reproducibility can be defined as the possibility to reproduce the same or a similar experiment or method, thereby obtaining the same or similar results as the original scientists. It is an essential ingredient of the scientific method and crucial for gaining trust in relevant claims. A reproducibility crisis has been recently acknowledged by scientists and this seems to affect even more Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, due to the complexity of the models at the core of their recent successes. Notwithstanding the recent debate on Artificial Intelligence reproducibility, its practical implementation is still insufficient, also because many technical issues are overlooked. In this survey, we critically review the current literature on the topic and highlight the open issues. Our contribution is three-fold. We propose a concise terminological review of the terms coming into play. We collect and systematize existing recommendations for achieving reproducibility, putting forth the means to comply with them. We identify key elements often overlooked in modern Machine Learning and provide novel recommendations for them. We further specialize these for two critical application domains, namely the biomedical and physical artificial intelligence fields.
summary: Reproducibility is one of the core dimensions that concur to deliver Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence. Broadly speaking, reproducibility can be defined as the possibility to reproduce the same or a similar experiment or method, thereby obtaining the same or similar results as the original scientists. It is an essential ingredient of the scientific method and crucial for gaining trust in relevant claims. A reproducibility crisis has been recently acknowledged by scientists and this seems to affect even more Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, due to the complexity of the models at the core of their recent successes. Notwithstanding the recent debate on Artificial Intelligence reproducibility, its practical implementation is still insufficient, also because many technical issues are overlooked. In this survey, we critically review the current literature on the topic and highlight the open issues. Our contribution is three-fold. We propose a concise terminological review of the terms coming into play. We collect and systematize existing recommendations for achieving reproducibility, putting forth the means to comply with them. We identify key elements often overlooked in modern Machine Learning and provide novel recommendations for them. We further specialize these for two critical application domains, namely the biomedical and physical artificial intelligence fields.
abstract_zh: 可重复性是提供值得信赖的人工智能的核心维度之一。从广义上讲，再现性可以定义为再现相同或相似的实验或方法，从而获得与原始科学家相同或相似结果的可能性。它是科学方法的重要组成部分，对于获得相关主张的信任至关重要。科学家最近承认了可重复性危机，这似乎会影响更多的人工智能和机器学习，因为模型的复杂性是其最近成功的核心。尽管最近关于人工智能的可重复性存在争论，但其实际实施仍然不足，也是因为许多技术问题被忽视。在这项调查中，我们批判性地回顾了有关该主题的当前文献并强调了未解决的问题。我们的贡献是三方面的。我们建议对正在发挥作用的术语进行简明的术语审查。我们收集现有的实现可重复性的建议并将其系统化，并提出遵守这些建议的方法。我们确定了现代机器学习中经常被忽视的关键要素，并为它们提供了新颖的建议。我们进一步将其专门用于两个关键应用领域，即生物医学和物理人工智能领域。

AI.motivation: 应对机器学习领域日益严重的可重复性危机，提升研究可信度，确保实验结果的可靠性与科学性。

AI.result: 提出术语框架，汇总实现可重复性的方法，指出常被忽视的关键因素，并为生物医学和物理AI领域提供专门建议。
AI.conclusion: 当前机器学习可重复性实践不足，需重视技术细节，统一术语，并加强跨领域合作以提升研究可信度。

search_text: Reproducibility of Machine Learning: Terminology, Recommendations and Open Issues 机器学习的可重复性：术语、建议和未决问题 Reproducibility is one of the core dimensions that concur to deliver Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence. Broadly speaking, reproducibility can be defined as the possibility to reproduce the same or a similar experiment or method, thereby obtaining the same or similar results as the original scientists. It is an essential ingredient of the scientific method and crucial for gaining trust in relevant claims. A reproducibility crisis has been recently acknowledged by scientists and this seems to affect even more Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, due to the complexity of the models at the core of their recent successes. Notwithstanding the recent debate on Artificial Intelligence reproducibility, its practical implementation is still insufficient, also because many technical issues are overlooked. In this survey, we critically review the current literature on the topic and highlight the open issues. Our contribution is three-fold. We propose a concise terminological review of the terms coming into play. We collect and systematize existing recommendations for achieving reproducibility, putting forth the means to comply with them. We identify key elements often overlooked in modern Machine Learning and provide novel recommendations for them. authors_text: Tobias Huber,Maximilian Demmler,Silvan Mertes,Matthew L. Olson,Elisabeth André
title: GANterfactual-RL: Understanding Reinforcement Learning Agents' Strategies through Visual Counterfactual Explanations
title_zh: GANterfactual-RL：通过视觉反事实解释理解强化学习代理的策略
abstract: Counterfactual explanations are a common tool to explain artificial intelligence models. For Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents, they answer "Why not?" or "What if?" questions by illustrating what minimal change to a state is needed such that an agent chooses a different action. Generating counterfactual explanations for RL agents with visual input is especially challenging because of their large state spaces and because their decisions are part of an overarching policy, which includes long-term decision-making. However, research focusing on counterfactual explanations, specifically for RL agents with visual input, is scarce and does not go beyond identifying defective agents. It is unclear whether counterfactual explanations are still helpful for more complex tasks like analyzing the learned strategies of different agents or choosing a fitting agent for a specific task. We propose a novel but simple method to generate counterfactual explanations for RL agents by formulating the problem as a domain transfer problem which allows the use of adversarial learning techniques like StarGAN. Our method is fully model-agnostic and we demonstrate that it outperforms the only previous method in several computational metrics. Furthermore, we show in a user study that our method performs best when analyzing which strategies different agents pursue.
summary: Counterfactual explanations are a common tool to explain artificial intelligence models. For Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents, they answer "Why not?" or "What if?" questions by illustrating what minimal change to a state is needed such that an agent chooses a different action. Generating counterfactual explanations for RL agents with visual input is especially challenging because of their large state spaces and because their decisions are part of an overarching policy, which includes long-term decision-making. However, research focusing on counterfactual explanations, specifically for RL agents with visual input, is scarce and does not go beyond identifying defective agents. It is unclear whether counterfactual explanations are still helpful for more complex tasks like analyzing the learned strategies of different agents or choosing a fitting agent for a specific task. We propose a novel but simple method to generate counterfactual explanations for RL agents by formulating the problem as a domain transfer problem which allows the use of adversarial learning techniques like StarGAN. Our method is fully model-agnostic and we demonstrate that it outperforms the only previous method in several computational metrics. Furthermore, we show in a user study that our method performs best when analyzing which strategies different agents pursue.
abstract_zh: 反事实解释是解释人工智能模型的常用工具。对于强化学习（RL）代理，他们回答“为什么不呢？”或“如果呢？”通过说明需要对状态进行哪些最小更改才能使代理选择不同的操作来提出问题。通过视觉输入为 RL 智能体生成反事实解释尤其具有挑战性，因为它们的状态空间很大，而且它们的决策是总体政策（包括长期决策）的一部分。然而，专注于反事实解释（特别是针对具有视觉输入的 RL 智能体）的研究很少，而且仅局限于识别有缺陷的智能体。目前尚不清楚反事实解释是否仍然有助于更复杂的任务，例如分析不同智能体的学习策略或为特定任务选择合适的智能体。我们提出了一种新颖但简单的方法，通过将问题表述为域转移问题来为 RL 代理生成反事实解释，该问题允许使用 StarGAN 等对抗性学习技术。我们的方法完全与模型无关，并且我们证明它在几个计算指标上优于之前唯一的方法。此外，我们在一项用户研究中表明，我们的方法在分析不同代理采取的策略时表现最佳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的新方法，用于为视觉输入的强化学习（RL）代理生成反事实解释，以分析其策略。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法在处理视觉输入的RL代理时存在局限，无法有效分析复杂策略或选择适合特定任务的代理。
AI.method: 将反事实解释问题转化为领域迁移问题，结合对抗学习技术（如StarGAN）生成解释，且方法适用于任意RL模型。
AI.result: 在多个计算指标和用户研究中，该方法优于现有技术，能更准确分析不同代理的策略差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解RL代理策略提供了有效工具，未来可拓展至更复杂任务和多代理场景。

authors_text: Yuxuan Zhang,Qingzhong Wang,Jiang Bian,Yi Liu,Yanwu Xu,Dejing Dou,Haoyi Xiong
title: Video4MRI: An Empirical Study on Brain Magnetic Resonance Image Analytics with CNN-based Video Classification Frameworks
title_zh: Video4MRI：使用基于 CNN 的视频分类框架进行脑磁共振图像分析的实证研究
abstract: To address the problem of medical image recognition, computer vision techniques like convolutional neural networks (CNN) are frequently used. Recently, 3D CNN-based models dominate the field of magnetic resonance image (MRI) analytics. Due to the high similarity between MRI data and videos, we conduct extensive empirical studies on video recognition techniques for MRI classification to answer the questions: (1) can we directly use video recognition models for MRI classification, (2) which model is more appropriate for MRI, (3) are the common tricks like data augmentation in video recognition still useful for MRI classification? Our work suggests that advanced video techniques benefit MRI classification. In this paper, four datasets of Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease recognition are utilized in experiments, together with three alternative video recognition models and data augmentation techniques that are frequently applied to video tasks. In terms of efficiency, the results reveal that the video framework performs better than 3D-CNN models by 5% - 11% with 50% - 66% less trainable parameters. This report pushes forward the potential fusion of 3D medical imaging and video understanding research.
summary: To address the problem of medical image recognition, computer vision techniques like convolutional neural networks (CNN) are frequently used. Recently, 3D CNN-based models dominate the field of magnetic resonance image (MRI) analytics. Due to the high similarity between MRI data and videos, we conduct extensive empirical studies on video recognition techniques for MRI classification to answer the questions: (1) can we directly use video recognition models for MRI classification, (2) which model is more appropriate for MRI, (3) are the common tricks like data augmentation in video recognition still useful for MRI classification? Our work suggests that advanced video techniques benefit MRI classification. In this paper, four datasets of Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease recognition are utilized in experiments, together with three alternative video recognition models and data augmentation techniques that are frequently applied to video tasks. In terms of efficiency, the results reveal that the video framework performs better than 3D-CNN models by 5% - 11% with 50% - 66% less trainable parameters. This report pushes forward the potential fusion of 3D medical imaging and video understanding research.
abstract_zh: 为了解决医学图像识别问题，经常使用卷积神经网络（CNN）等计算机视觉技术。最近，基于 3D CNN 的模型在磁共振图像 (MRI) 分析领域占据主导地位。由于MRI数据和视频之间的高度相似性，我们对用于MRI分类的视频识别技术进行了广泛的实证研究，以回答以下问题：（1）我们可以直接使用视频识别模型进行MRI分类，（2）哪种模型更适合MRI，（3）视频识别中的数据增强等常见技巧对于MRI分类仍然有用吗？我们的工作表明先进的视频技术有利于 MRI 分类。本文在实验中使用了阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病识别的四个数据集，以及经常应用于视频任务的三种替代视频识别模型和数据增强技术。在效率方面，结果表明，视频框架的性能比 3D-CNN 模型高 5% - 11%，可训练参数减少 50% - 66%。该报告推动了3D医学成像和视频理解研究的潜在融合。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨将视频分类框架应用于脑磁共振图像（MRI）分析，评估其在阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病分类中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D-CNN在MRI分析中占主导地位，但MRI数据与视频的高相似性启发研究者探索视频识别技术是否可迁移至MRI分类任务。
AI.method: 采用四种疾病数据集，对比三种主流视频识别模型及数据增强技术，评估其在MRI分类中的性能与参数效率。
AI.result: 视频框架在准确率提升5%-11%的同时，参数量减少50%-66%，验证了视频技术对MRI分类的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 视频识别方法可有效迁移至MRI分析，为3D医学影像与视频理解的跨领域研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文探讨将视频分类框架应用于脑磁共振图像（MRI）分析，评估其在阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病分类中的有效性。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管3D-CNN在MRI分析中占主导地位，但MRI数据与视频的高相似性启发研究者探索视频识别技术是否可迁移至MRI分类任务。
ai_content.method: 采用四种疾病数据集，对比三种主流视频识别模型及数据增强技术，评估其在MRI分类中的性能与参数效率。
ai_content.result: 视频框架在准确率提升5%-11%的同时，参数量减少50%-66%，验证了视频技术对MRI分类的适用性。
ai_content.conclusion: 视频识别方法可有效迁移至MRI分析，为3D医学影像与视频理解的跨领域研究提供新方向。

search_text: Video4MRI: An Empirical Study on Brain Magnetic Resonance Image Analytics with CNN-based Video Classification Frameworks Video4MRI：使用基于 CNN 的视频分类框架进行脑磁共振图像分析的实证研究 To address the problem of medical image recognition, computer vision techniques like convolutional neural networks (CNN) are frequently used. Recently, 3D CNN-based models dominate the field of magnetic resonance image (MRI) analytics. Due to the high similarity between MRI data and videos, we conduct extensive empirical studies on video recognition techniques for MRI classification to answer the questions: (1) can we directly use video recognition models for MRI classification, (2) which model is more appropriate for MRI, (3) are the common tricks like data augmentation in video recognition still useful for MRI classification? Our work suggests that advanced video techniques benefit MRI classification. In this paper, four datasets of Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease recognition are utilized in experiments, together with three alternative video recognition models and data augmentation techniques that are frequently applied to video tasks. In terms of efficiency, the results reveal that the video framework performs better than 3D-CNN models by 5% - 11% with 50% - 66% less trainable parameters. This report pushes forward the potential fusion of 3D medical imaging and video understanding research. 为了解决医学图像识别问题，经常使用卷积神经网络（CNN）等计算机视觉技术。最近，基于 3D CNN 的模型在磁共振图像 (MRI) 分析领域占据主导地位。由于MRI数据和视频之间的高度相似性，我们对用于MRI分类的视频识别技术进行了广泛的实证研究，以回答以下问题：（1）我们可以直接使用视频识别模型进行MRI分类，（2）哪种模型更适合MRI，（3）视频识别中的数据增强等常见技巧对于MRI分类仍然有用吗？我们的工作表明先进的视频技术有利于 MRI 分类。本文在实验中使用了阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病识别的四个数据集，以及经常应用于视频任务的三种替代视频识别模型和数据增强技术。在效率方面，结果表明，视频框架的性能比 3D-CNN 模型高 5% - 11%，可训练参数减少 50% - 66%。该报告推动了3D医学成像和视频理解研究的潜在融合。 本论文探讨将视频分类框架应用于脑磁共振图像（MRI）分析，评估其在阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病分类中的有效性。 Yuxuan Zhang,Qingzhong Wang,Jiang Bian,Yi Liu,Yanwu Xu,Dejing Dou,Haoyi Xiong cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Gopika Ajaykumar,Chien-Ming Huang
title: Older Adults' Task Preferences for Robot Assistance in the Home
title_zh: 老年人对家庭机器人辅助的任务偏好
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, AAAI Workshop on User-Centric Artificial Intelligence for Assistance in At-Home Tasks
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, AAAI Workshop on User-Centric Artificial Intelligence for Assistance in At-Home Tasks
abstract: Artificial intelligence technologies that can assist with at-home tasks have the potential to help older adults age in place. Robot assistance in particular has been applied towards physical and cognitive support for older adults living independently at home. Surveys, questionnaires, and group interviews have been used to understand what tasks older adults want robots to assist them with. We build upon prior work exploring older adults' task preferences for robot assistance through field interviews situated within older adults' aging contexts. Our findings support results from prior work indicating older adults' preference for physical assistance over social and care-related support from robots and indicating their preference for control when adopting robot assistance, while highlighting the variety of individual constraints, boundaries, and needs that may influence their preferences.
summary: Artificial intelligence technologies that can assist with at-home tasks have the potential to help older adults age in place. Robot assistance in particular has been applied towards physical and cognitive support for older adults living independently at home. Surveys, questionnaires, and group interviews have been used to understand what tasks older adults want robots to assist them with. We build upon prior work exploring older adults' task preferences for robot assistance through field interviews situated within older adults' aging contexts. Our findings support results from prior work indicating older adults' preference for physical assistance over social and care-related support from robots and indicating their preference for control when adopting robot assistance, while highlighting the variety of individual constraints, boundaries, and needs that may influence their preferences.
abstract_zh: 可以协助完成家庭任务的人工智能技术有可能帮助老年人安享晚年。机器人辅助尤其适用于为在家中独立生活的老年人提供身体和认知支持。调查、问卷和小组访谈已被用来了解老年人希望机器人帮助他们完成哪些任务。我们以之前的工作为基础，通过在老年人的老龄化背景下进行现场采访，探索老年人对机器人辅助的任务偏好。我们的研究结果支持了之前的研究结果，表明老年人更喜欢机器人的身体帮助，而不是社会和护理相关的支持，并表明他们在采用机器人帮助时更喜欢控制，同时强调了可能影响他们的偏好的各种个人限制、界限和需求。

AI.tldr: 研究老年人在家中对机器人辅助任务的偏好，探讨其接受度与需求差异。
AI.motivation: 随着人口老龄化加剧，需明确老年人对机器人辅助的具体需求以提升其居家独立生活能力。
AI.method: 通过实地访谈与定性分析，结合老年人实际生活场景收集任务偏好数据。
AI.result: 老年人更倾向机器人提供物理协助而非社交支持，并强调对协助过程的控制权，同时存在显著个体差异。
AI.conclusion: 机器人辅助设计需兼顾功能实用性与用户自主性，同时考虑个性化需求差异。

authors_text: Truc Nguyen,Phung Lai,Khang Tran,NhatHai Phan,My T. Thai
title: Active Membership Inference Attack under Local Differential Privacy in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中本地差分隐私下的主动成员推理攻击
abstract: Federated learning (FL) was originally regarded as a framework for collaborative learning among clients with data privacy protection through a coordinating server. In this paper, we propose a new active membership inference (AMI) attack carried out by a dishonest server in FL. In AMI attacks, the server crafts and embeds malicious parameters into global models to effectively infer whether a target data sample is included in a client's private training data or not. By exploiting the correlation among data features through a non-linear decision boundary, AMI attacks with a certified guarantee of success can achieve severely high success rates under rigorous local differential privacy (LDP) protection; thereby exposing clients' training data to significant privacy risk. Theoretical and experimental results on several benchmark datasets show that adding sufficient privacy-preserving noise to prevent our attack would significantly damage FL's model utility.
summary: Federated learning (FL) was originally regarded as a framework for collaborative learning among clients with data privacy protection through a coordinating server. In this paper, we propose a new active membership inference (AMI) attack carried out by a dishonest server in FL. In AMI attacks, the server crafts and embeds malicious parameters into global models to effectively infer whether a target data sample is included in a client's private training data or not. By exploiting the correlation among data features through a non-linear decision boundary, AMI attacks with a certified guarantee of success can achieve severely high success rates under rigorous local differential privacy (LDP) protection; thereby exposing clients' training data to significant privacy risk. Theoretical and experimental results on several benchmark datasets show that adding sufficient privacy-preserving noise to prevent our attack would significantly damage FL's model utility.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）最初被视为客户端之间协作学习的框架，通过协调服务器保护数据隐私。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的主​​动成员推理（AMI）攻击，由佛罗里达州的不诚实服务器进行。在AMI攻击中，服务器精心设计恶意参数并将其嵌入到全局模型中，以有效推断目标数据样本是否包含在客户端的私有训练数据中。通过非线性决策边界利用数据特征之间的相关性，经过认证的成功保证的 AMI 攻击可以在严格的本地差分隐私 (LDP) 保护下实现极高的成功率；从而使客户的培训数据面临重大隐私风险。几个基准数据集的理论和实验结果表明，添加足够的隐私保护噪声来防止我们的攻击会严重损害 FL 的模型效用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在联邦学习中针对本地差分隐私保护的主动成员推理攻击方法，通过恶意服务器嵌入参数以推断客户端训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习框架在本地差分隐私保护下仍存在隐私泄露风险，需研究恶意服务器如何突破隐私保护机制。
AI.method: 攻击者通过构造恶意参数嵌入全局模型，利用数据特征相关性及非线性决策边界，实现对客户端数据成员身份的高成功率推断。
AI.result: 实验表明，该攻击在多个基准数据集上具有高成功率，且增加隐私噪声会显著损害模型效用。
AI.conclusion: 该攻击揭示了联邦学习中隐私保护与模型性能的权衡问题，需重新评估现有隐私机制的有效性。

authors_text: Giulio Filippi,Sara Zannone,Adriano Koshiyama
title: Intersectional Fairness: A Fractal Approach
title_zh: 交叉公平性：分形方法
abstract: The issue of fairness in AI has received an increasing amount of attention in recent years. The problem can be approached by looking at different protected attributes (e.g., ethnicity, gender, etc) independently, but fairness for individual protected attributes does not imply intersectional fairness. In this work, we frame the problem of intersectional fairness within a geometrical setting. We project our data onto a hypercube, and split the analysis of fairness by levels, where each level encodes the number of protected attributes we are intersecting over. We prove mathematically that, while fairness does not propagate "down" the levels, it does propagate "up" the levels. This means that ensuring fairness for all subgroups at the lowest intersectional level (e.g., black women, white women, black men and white men), will necessarily result in fairness for all the above levels, including each of the protected attributes (e.g., ethnicity and gender) taken independently. We also derive a formula describing the variance of the set of estimated success rates on each level, under the assumption of perfect fairness. Using this theoretical finding as a benchmark, we define a family of metrics which capture overall intersectional bias. Finally, we propose that fairness can be metaphorically thought of as a "fractal" problem. In fractals, patterns at the smallest scale repeat at a larger scale. We see from this example that tackling the problem at the lowest possible level, in a bottom-up manner, leads to the natural emergence of fair AI. We suggest that trustworthiness is necessarily an emergent, fractal and relational property of the AI system.
summary: The issue of fairness in AI has received an increasing amount of attention in recent years. The problem can be approached by looking at different protected attributes (e.g., ethnicity, gender, etc) independently, but fairness for individual protected attributes does not imply intersectional fairness. In this work, we frame the problem of intersectional fairness within a geometrical setting. We project our data onto a hypercube, and split the analysis of fairness by levels, where each level encodes the number of protected attributes we are intersecting over. We prove mathematically that, while fairness does not propagate "down" the levels, it does propagate "up" the levels. This means that ensuring fairness for all subgroups at the lowest intersectional level (e.g., black women, white women, black men and white men), will necessarily result in fairness for all the above levels, including each of the protected attributes (e.g., ethnicity and gender) taken independently. We also derive a formula describing the variance of the set of estimated success rates on each level, under the assumption of perfect fairness. Using this theoretical finding as a benchmark, we define a family of metrics which capture overall intersectional bias. Finally, we propose that fairness can be metaphorically thought of as a "fractal" problem. In fractals, patterns at the smallest scale repeat at a larger scale. We see from this example that tackling the problem at the lowest possible level, in a bottom-up manner, leads to the natural emergence of fair AI. We suggest that trustworthiness is necessarily an emergent, fractal and relational property of the AI system.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能的公平问题受到越来越多的关注。这个问题可以通过独立地看待不同的受保护属性（例如种族、性别等）来解决，但个体受保护属性的公平并不意味着交叉公平。在这项工作中，我们在几何环境中解决了交叉公平问题。我们将数据投影到超立方体上，并按级别划分公平性分析，其中每个级别对我们相交的受保护属性的数量进行编码。我们从数学上证明，虽然公平性不会“向下”传播，但它确实会“向上”传播。这意味着，确保最低交叉级别的所有亚群体（例如黑人女性、白人女性、黑人男性和白人男性）的公平性，必然会导致上述所有级别的公平性，包括每个独立的受保护属性（例如种族和性别）。我们还推导出一个公式，描述在完全公平的假设下每个级别的估计成功率集的方差。使用这一理论发现作为基准，我们定义了一系列衡量总体交叉偏差的指标。最后，我们建议公平性可以被比喻为一个“分形”问题。在分形中，最小尺度的图案在更大尺度上重复。我们从这个例子中看到，以自下而上的方式在尽可能最低的层面上解决问题，就会导致公平人工智能的自然出现。我们认为，可信度必然是人工智能系统的一种新兴的、分形的和相关的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分形理论的交叉公平性方法，通过将数据投影到超立方体并分层分析，解决AI系统中单一属性公平性无法保证交叉公平性的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统公平性方法仅针对单一属性（如性别、种族）进行分析，但交叉属性（如黑人女性）的公平性未被充分保障，需建立新的理论框架。
AI.method: 将数据映射到超立方体，按属性交叉层级划分分析；证明公平性可自下而上传播；推导完美公平下的方差公式，构建交叉偏见度量指标，并引入分形隐喻指导算法设计。
AI.result: 在最低交叉层级（如子群体）实现公平性可自然推导出更高层级的公平性；提出量化交叉偏见的指标体系，验证了分形视角下公平性的自相似特性。
AI.conclusion: 公平性是AI系统的分形属性，需通过自底向上的交叉层级优化实现，信任度源于多尺度公平性的自然涌现，为可信赖AI提供新范式。

search_text: Intersectional Fairness: A Fractal Approach 交叉公平性：分形方法 The issue of fairness in AI has received an increasing amount of attention in recent years. The problem can be approached by looking at different protected attributes (e.g., ethnicity, gender, etc) independently, but fairness for individual protected attributes does not imply intersectional fairness. In this work, we frame the problem of intersectional fairness within a geometrical setting. We project our data onto a hypercube, and split the analysis of fairness by levels, where each level encodes the number of protected attributes we are intersecting over. We prove mathematically that, while fairness does not propagate "down" the levels, it does propagate "up" the levels. This means that ensuring fairness for all subgroups at the lowest intersectional level (e.g., black women, white women, black men and white men), will necessarily result in fairness for all the above levels, including each of the protected attributes (e.g., ethnicity and gender) taken independently. We also derive a formula describing the variance of the set of estimated success rates on each level, under the assumption of perfect fairness. Using this theoretical finding as a benchmark, we define a family of metrics which capture overall intersectional bias. Finally, we propose that fairness can be metaphorically thought of as a "fractal" problem. In fractals, patterns at the smallest scale repeat at a larger scale. We see from this example that tackling the problem at the lowest possible level, in a bottom-up manner, leads to the natural emergence of fair AI. We suggest that trustworthiness is necessarily an emergent, fractal and relational property of the AI system. 近年来，人工智能的公平问题受到越来越多的关注。这个问题可以通过独立地看待不同的受保护属性（例如种族、性别等）来解决，但个体受保护属性的公平并不意味着交叉公平。在这项工作中，我们在几何环境中解决了交叉公平问题。我们将数据投影到超立方体上，并按级别划分公平性分析，其中每个级别对我们相交的受保护属性的数量进行编码。我们从数学上证明，虽然公平性不会“向下”传播，但它确实会“向上”传播。这意味着，确保最低交叉级别的所有亚群体（例如黑人女性、白人女性、黑人男性和白人男性）的公平性，必然会导致上述所有级别的公平性，包括每个独立的受保护属性（例如种族和性别）。我们还推导出一个公式，描述在完全公平的假设下每个级别的估计成功率集的方差。使用这一理论发现作为基准，我们定义了一系列衡量总体交叉偏差的指标。最后，我们建议公平性可以被比喻为一个“分形”问题。在分形中，最小尺度的图案在更大尺度上重复。我们从这个例子中看到，以自下而上的方式在尽可能最低的层面上解决问题，就会导致公平人工智能的自然出现。我们认为，可信度必然是人工智能系统的一种新兴的、分形的和相关的属性。 本文提出一种基于分形理论的交叉公平性方法，通过将数据投影到超立方体并分层分析，解决AI系统中单一属性公平性无法保证交叉公平性的问题。 Giulio Filippi,Sara Zannone,Adriano Koshiyama cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Stelios Triantafyllou,Goran Radanovic
title: Towards Computationally Efficient Responsibility Attribution in Decentralized Partially Observable MDPs
title_zh: 去中心化部分可观测 MDP 中计算高效的责任归属
abstract: Responsibility attribution is a key concept of accountable multi-agent decision making. Given a sequence of actions, responsibility attribution mechanisms quantify the impact of each participating agent to the final outcome. One such popular mechanism is based on actual causality, and it assigns (causal) responsibility based on the actions that were found to be pivotal for the considered outcome. However, the inherent problem of pinpointing actual causes and consequently determining the exact responsibility assignment has shown to be computationally intractable. In this paper, we aim to provide a practical algorithmic solution to the problem of responsibility attribution under a computational budget. We first formalize the problem in the framework of Decentralized Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (Dec-POMDPs) augmented by a specific class of Structural Causal Models (SCMs). Under this framework, we introduce a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) type of method which efficiently approximates the agents' degrees of responsibility. This method utilizes the structure of a novel search tree and a pruning technique, both tailored to the problem of responsibility attribution. Other novel components of our method are (a) a child selection policy based on linear scalarization and (b) a backpropagation procedure that accounts for a minimality condition that is typically used to define actual causality. We experimentally evaluate the efficacy of our algorithm through a simulation-based test-bed, which includes three team-based card games.
summary: Responsibility attribution is a key concept of accountable multi-agent decision making. Given a sequence of actions, responsibility attribution mechanisms quantify the impact of each participating agent to the final outcome. One such popular mechanism is based on actual causality, and it assigns (causal) responsibility based on the actions that were found to be pivotal for the considered outcome. However, the inherent problem of pinpointing actual causes and consequently determining the exact responsibility assignment has shown to be computationally intractable. In this paper, we aim to provide a practical algorithmic solution to the problem of responsibility attribution under a computational budget. We first formalize the problem in the framework of Decentralized Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (Dec-POMDPs) augmented by a specific class of Structural Causal Models (SCMs). Under this framework, we introduce a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) type of method which efficiently approximates the agents' degrees of responsibility. This method utilizes the structure of a novel search tree and a pruning technique, both tailored to the problem of responsibility attribution. Other novel components of our method are (a) a child selection policy based on linear scalarization and (b) a backpropagation procedure that accounts for a minimality condition that is typically used to define actual causality. We experimentally evaluate the efficacy of our algorithm through a simulation-based test-bed, which includes three team-based card games.
abstract_zh: 责任归属是负责任的多主体决策的关键概念。给定一系列行动，责任归因机制量化每个参与主体对最终结果的影响。一种流行的机制基于实际因果关系，它根据对所考虑的结果至关重要的行动来分配（因果）责任。然而，查明实际原因并由此确定确切的责任分配的固有问题在计算上是难以解决的。在本文中，我们的目标是为计算预算下的责任归属问题提供实用的算法解决方案。我们首先在分​​散式部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (Dec-POMDP) 的框架中形式化问题，并通过特定类别的结构因果模型 (SCM) 进行增强。在此框架下，我们引入了蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）类型的方法，该方法可以有效地近似代理的责任程度。该方法利用新颖的搜索树结构和修剪技术，两者都是针对责任归属问题而定制的。我们方法的其他新颖组成部分是（a）基于线性标量的子选择策略和（b）反向传播过程，该过程考虑了通常用于定义实际因果关系的极小条件。我们通过基于模拟的测试台（包括三个基于团队的纸牌游戏）来实验性地评估我们算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在扩展的Dec-POMDP框架下，结合结构因果模型的计算高效责任归属算法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于实际因果性的责任归属机制在计算上不可行，需在计算预算内提供实用解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的算法，包含新型搜索树结构、剪枝技术、线性标量化子选择策略及符合最小性条件的反向传播机制。
AI.result: 通过三个团队卡牌游戏的仿真测试，验证了算法在责任归属任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为Dec-POMDP环境下的责任归属问题提供了计算高效的近似解决方案。

authors_text: Hannah Janmohamed,Thomas Pierrot,Antoine Cully
title: Improving the Data Efficiency of Multi-Objective Quality-Diversity through Gradient Assistance and Crowding Exploration
title_zh: 通过梯度辅助和拥挤探索提高多目标质量多样性的数据效率
abstract: Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms have recently gained traction as optimisation methods due to their effectiveness at escaping local optima and capability of generating wide-ranging and high-performing solutions. Recently, Multi-Objective MAP-Elites (MOME) extended the QD paradigm to the multi-objective setting by maintaining a Pareto front in each cell of a map-elites grid. MOME achieved a global performance that competed with NSGA-II and SPEA2, two well-established Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms (MOEA), while also acquiring a diverse repertoire of solutions. However, MOME is limited by non-directed genetic search mechanisms which struggle in high-dimensional search spaces. In this work, we present Multi-Objective MAP-Elites with Policy-Gradient Assistance and Crowding-based Exploration (MOME-PGX): a new QD algorithm that extends MOME to improve its data efficiency and performance. MOME-PGX uses gradient-based optimisation to efficiently drive solutions towards higher performance. It also introduces crowding-based mechanisms to create an improved exploration strategy and to encourage uniformity across Pareto fronts. We evaluate MOME-PGX in four simulated robot locomotion tasks and demonstrate that it converges faster and to a higher performance than all other baselines. We show that MOME-PGX is between 4.3 and 42 times more data-efficient than MOME and doubles the performance of MOME, NSGA-II and SPEA2 in challenging environments.

In this work, we present Multi-Objective MAP-Elites with Policy-Gradient Assistance and Crowding-based Exploration (MOME-PGX): a new QD algorithm that extends MOME to improve its data efficiency and performance. MOME-PGX uses gradient-based optimisation to efficiently drive solutions towards higher performance. It also introduces crowding-based mechanisms to create an improved exploration strategy and to encourage uniformity across Pareto fronts. We evaluate MOME-PGX in four simulated robot locomotion tasks and demonstrate that it converges faster and to a higher performance than all other baselines. We show that MOME-PGX is between 4.3 and 42 times more data-efficient than MOME and doubles the performance of MOME, NSGA-II and SPEA2 in challenging environments.
abstract_zh: 质量多样性 (QD) 算法最近作为优化方法而受到关注，因为它们能够有效地摆脱局部最优，并且能够生成广泛的高性能解决方案。最近，多目标地图精英（MOME）通过在地图精英网格的每个单元中维护帕累托前沿，将 QD 范式扩展到多目标设置。 MOME 取得了可与 NSGA-II 和 SPEA2 这两种成熟的多目标进化算法 (MOEA) 竞争的全球性能，同时还获得了多样化的解决方案。然而，MOME 受到非定向遗传搜索机制的限制，这些机制在高维搜索空间中举步维艰。在这项工作中，我们提出了具有策略梯度辅助和基于人群探索的多目标 MAP-精英 (MOME-PGX)：一种新的 QD 算法，可扩展 MOME 以提高其数据效率和性能。 MOME-PGX 使用基于梯度的优化来有效地推动解决方案实现更高的性能。它还引入了基于拥挤的机制来创建改进的探索策略并鼓励帕累托前沿的一致性。我们在四个模拟机器人运动任务中评估 MOME-PGX，并证明它比所有其他基线收敛速度更快，性能更高。我们表明，MOME-PGX 的数据效率是 MOME 的 4.3 至 42 倍，并且在具有挑战性的环境中使 MOME、NSGA-II 和 SPEA2 的性能提高了一倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多目标质量多样性算法MOME-PGX，通过梯度辅助和拥挤探索机制提高数据效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多目标质量多样性算法（如MOME）在高维搜索空间中存在数据效率低的问题，需要改进以提高性能和探索能力。
AI.method: 提出MOME-PGX算法，结合梯度优化和基于拥挤的探索机制，以提高解决方案的性能和多样性。
AI.result: 在四个模拟机器人运动任务中，MOME-PGX比其他基准方法更快收敛并达到更高的性能，其数据效率是MOME的4.3到42倍，并在困难环境中性能翻倍。
AI.conclusion: MOME-PGX通过梯度辅助和拥挤探索机制显著提高了多目标优化的效率和性能，为QD算法的发展提供了新的方向。

search_text: Improving the Data Efficiency of Multi-Objective Quality-Diversity through Gradient Assistance and Crowding Exploration 通过梯度辅助和拥挤探索提高多目标质量多样性的数据效率 Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms have recently gained traction as optimisation methods due to their effectiveness at escaping local optima and capability of generating wide-ranging and high-performing solutions. Recently, Multi-Objective MAP-Elites (MOME) extended the QD paradigm to the multi-objective setting by maintaining a Pareto front in each cell of a map-elites grid. MOME achieved a global performance that competed with NSGA-II and SPEA2, two well-established Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms (MOEA), while also acquiring a diverse repertoire of solutions. However, MOME is limited by non-directed genetic search mechanisms which struggle in high-dimensional search spaces. In this work, we present Multi-Objective MAP-Elites with Policy-Gradient Assistance and Crowding-based Exploration (MOME-PGX): a new QD algorithm that extends MOME to improve its data efficiency and performance. MOME-PGX uses gradient-based optimisation to efficiently drive solutions towards higher performance. It also introduces crowding-based mechanisms to create an improved exploration strategy and to encourage uniformity across Pareto fronts. We evaluate MOME-PGX in four simulated robot locomotion tasks and demonstrate that it converges faster and to a higher performance than all other baselines. We show that MOME-PGX is between 4.3 and 42 times more data-efficient than MOME and doubles the performance of MOME, NSGA-II and SPEA2 in challenging environments. 质量多样性 (QD) 算法最近作为优化方法而受到关注，因为它们能够有效地摆脱局部最优，并且能够生成广泛的高性能解决方案。最近，多目标地图精英（MOME）通过在地图精英网格的每个单元中维护帕累托前沿，将 QD 范式扩展到多目标设置。 MOME 取得了可与 NSGA-II 和 SPEA2 这两种成熟的多目标进化算法 (MOEA) 竞争的全球性能，同时还获得了多样化的解决方案。然而，MOME 受到非定向遗传搜索机制的限制，这些机制在高维搜索空间中举步维艰。在这项工作中，我们提出了具有策略梯度辅助和基于人群探索的多目标 MAP-精英 (MOME-PGX)：一种新的 QD 算法，可扩展 MOME 以提高其数据效率和性能。 MOME-PGX 使用基于梯度的优化来有效地推动解决方案实现更高的性能。它还引入了基于拥挤的机制来创建改进的探索策略并鼓励帕累托前沿的一致性。我们在四个模拟机器人运动任务中评估 MOME-PGX，并证明它比所有其他基线收敛速度更快，性能更高。我们表明，MOME-PGX 的数据效率是 MOME 的 4.3 至 42 倍，并且在具有挑战性的环境中使 MOME、NSGA-II 和 SPEA2 的性能提高了一倍。 本文提出了一种新的多目标质量多样性算法MOME-PGX，通过梯度辅助和拥挤探索机制提高数据效率和性能。 Hannah Janmohamed,Thomas Pierrot,Antoine Cully cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Erlend Torje Berg Lundby,Adil Rasheed,Ivar Johan Halvorsen,Dirk Reinhardt,Sebastien Gros,Jan Tommy Gravdahl
title: Deep active learning for nonlinear system identification
title_zh: 用于非线性系统识别的深度主动学习
abstract: The exploding research interest for neural networks in modeling nonlinear dynamical systems is largely explained by the networks' capacity to model complex input-output relations directly from data. However, they typically need vast training data before they can be put to any good use. The data generation process for dynamical systems can be an expensive endeavor both in terms of time and resources. Active learning addresses this shortcoming by acquiring the most informative data, thereby reducing the need to collect enormous datasets. What makes the current work unique is integrating the deep active learning framework into nonlinear system identification. We formulate a general static deep active learning acquisition problem for nonlinear system identification. This is enabled by exploring system dynamics locally in different regions of the input space to obtain a simulated dataset covering the broader input space. This simulated dataset can be used in a static deep active learning acquisition scheme referred to as global explorations. The global exploration acquires a batch of initial states corresponding to the most informative state-action trajectories according to a batch acquisition function. The local exploration solves an optimal control problem, finding the control trajectory that maximizes some measure of information. After a batch of informative initial states is acquired, a new round of local explorations from the initial states in the batch is conducted to obtain a set of corresponding control trajectories that are to be applied on the system dynamics to get data from the system. Information measures used in the acquisition scheme are derived from the predictive variance of an ensemble of neural networks. The novel method outperforms standard data acquisition methods used for system identification of nonlinear dynamical systems in the case study performed on simulated data.
summary: The exploding research interest for neural networks in modeling nonlinear dynamical systems is largely explained by the networks' capacity to model complex input-output relations directly from data. However, they typically need vast training data before they can be put to any good use. The data generation process for dynamical systems can be an expensive endeavor both in terms of time and resources. Active learning addresses this shortcoming by acquiring the most informative data, thereby reducing the need to collect enormous datasets. What makes the current work unique is integrating the deep active learning framework into nonlinear system identification. We formulate a general static deep active learning acquisition problem for nonlinear system identification. This is enabled by exploring system dynamics locally in different regions of the input space to obtain a simulated dataset covering the broader input space. This simulated dataset can be used in a static deep active learning acquisition scheme referred to as global explorations. The global exploration acquires a batch of initial states corresponding to the most informative state-action trajectories according to a batch acquisition function. The local exploration solves an optimal control problem, finding the control trajectory that maximizes some measure of information. After a batch of informative initial states is acquired, a new round of local explorations from the initial states in the batch is conducted to obtain a set of corresponding control trajectories that are to be applied on the system dynamics to get data from the system. Information measures used in the acquisition scheme are derived from the predictive variance of an ensemble of neural networks. The novel method outperforms standard data acquisition methods used for system identification of nonlinear dynamical systems in the case study performed on simulated data.
abstract_zh: 神经网络在非线性动力系统建模方面的研究兴趣激增，很大程度上是因为网络能够直接根据数据对复杂的输入输出关系进行建模。然而，它们通常需要大量的训练数据才能充分利用。动态系统的数据生成过程在时间和资源方面都是一项昂贵的工作。主动学习通过获取信息最丰富的数据来解决这一缺点，从而减少收集大量数据集的需要。当前工作的独特之处在于将深度主动学习框架集成到非线性系统识别中。我们制定了用于非线性系统识别的通用静态深度主动学习获取问题。这是通过在输入空间的不同区域局部探索系统动力学来获得覆盖更广泛的输入空间的模拟数据集来实现的。该模拟数据集可用于称为全局探索的静态深度主动学习采集方案。全局探索根据批量获取函数获取与信息最丰富的状态动作轨迹相对应的一批初始状态。局部探索解决了最优控制问题，找到最大化某些信息度量的控制轨迹。获取一批信息丰富的初始状态后，从该批次的初始状态进行新一轮的局部探索，以获得一组相应的控制轨迹，将其应用于系统动力学以从系统中获取数据。采集方案中使用的信息测量源自神经网络集合的预测方差。在对模拟数据进行的案例研究中，该新颖方法优于用于非线性动力系统系统识别的标准数据采集方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度主动学习框架，用于非线性系统的辨识，通过高效获取信息数据减少训练需求。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在建模非线性动态系统时需大量数据，而数据生成成本高，主动学习可通过选择信息数据点解决此问题。
AI.method: 结合深度主动学习框架，通过全局探索获取初始状态批次，并利用局部探索求解最优控制问题，基于神经网络集成的预测方差作为信息度量。
AI.result: 在模拟数据案例研究中，该方法优于传统数据获取方法，有效提升了非线性系统辨识性能。
AI.conclusion: 深度主动学习框架能以更少数据实现非线性系统的高效辨识，为动态系统建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Clarence Boon Liang Ng,Diogo Santos,Marek Rei
title: Modelling Temporal Document Sequences for Clinical ICD Coding
title_zh: 临床 ICD 编码的时间文档序列建模
abstract: Past studies on the ICD coding problem focus on predicting clinical codes primarily based on the discharge summary. This covers only a small fraction of the notes generated during each hospital stay and leaves potential for improving performance by analysing all the available clinical notes. We propose a hierarchical transformer architecture that uses text across the entire sequence of clinical notes in each hospital stay for ICD coding, and incorporates embeddings for text metadata such as their position, time, and type of note. While using all clinical notes increases the quantity of data substantially, superconvergence can be used to reduce training costs. We evaluate the model on the MIMIC-III dataset. Our model exceeds the prior state-of-the-art when using only discharge summaries as input, and achieves further performance improvements when all clinical notes are used as input.
summary: Past studies on the ICD coding problem focus on predicting clinical codes primarily based on the discharge summary. This covers only a small fraction of the notes generated during each hospital stay and leaves potential for improving performance by analysing all the available clinical notes. We propose a hierarchical transformer architecture that uses text across the entire sequence of clinical notes in each hospital stay for ICD coding, and incorporates embeddings for text metadata such as their position, time, and type of note. While using all clinical notes increases the quantity of data substantially, superconvergence can be used to reduce training costs. We evaluate the model on the MIMIC-III dataset. Our model exceeds the prior state-of-the-art when using only discharge summaries as input, and achieves further performance improvements when all clinical notes are used as input.
abstract_zh: 过去对 ICD 编码问题的研究主要集中于主要根据出院小结预测临床编码。这仅涵盖每次住院期间生成的记录的一小部分，并通过分析所有可用的临床记录来提高性能。我们提出了一种分层变压器架构，该架构使用每次住院期间整个临床记录序列中的文本进行 ICD 编码，并结合文本元数据的嵌入，例如位置、时间和记录类型。虽然使用所有临床记录会大大增加数据量，但超收敛可用于降低培训成本。我们在 MIMIC-III 数据集上评估模型。当仅使用出院摘要作为输入时，我们的模型超出了现有的最先进水平，并且当使用所有临床记录作为输入时，实现了进一步的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于临床笔记序列的分层Transformer模型，用于改进ICD编码预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖出院小结进行ICD编码，忽略了住院期间其他临床笔记的信息，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计分层Transformer架构，整合住院期间所有临床笔记的文本内容及元数据（时间、类型等），并采用超级收敛技术降低训练成本。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-III数据集上，模型在仅使用出院小结时超越现有最佳方法，使用全部临床笔记时性能进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过全面利用临床文档序列和元信息，该模型显著提高了ICD编码的预测准确性。

search_text: Modelling Temporal Document Sequences for Clinical ICD Coding 临床 ICD 编码的时间文档序列建模 Past studies on the ICD coding problem focus on predicting clinical codes primarily based on the discharge summary. This covers only a small fraction of the notes generated during each hospital stay and leaves potential for improving performance by analysing all the available clinical notes. We propose a hierarchical transformer architecture that uses text across the entire sequence of clinical notes in each hospital stay for ICD coding, and incorporates embeddings for text metadata such as their position, time, and type of note. While using all clinical notes increases the quantity of data substantially, superconvergence can be used to reduce training costs. We evaluate the model on the MIMIC-III dataset. Our model exceeds the prior state-of-the-art when using only discharge summaries as input, and achieves further performance improvements when all clinical notes are used as input. 过去对 ICD 编码问题的研究主要集中于主要根据出院小结预测临床编码。这仅涵盖每次住院期间生成的记录的一小部分，并通过分析所有可用的临床记录来提高性能。我们提出了一种分层变压器架构，该架构使用每次住院期间整个临床记录序列中的文本进行 ICD 编码，并结合文本元数据的嵌入，例如位置、时间和记录类型。虽然使用所有临床记录会大大增加数据量，但超收敛可用于降低培训成本。我们在 MIMIC-III 数据集上评估模型。当仅使用出院摘要作为输入时，我们的模型超出了现有的最先进水平，并且当使用所有临床记录作为输入时，实现了进一步的性能改进。 该论文提出了一种基于临床笔记序列的分层Transformer模型，用于改进ICD编码预测。 Clarence Boon Liang Ng,Diogo Santos,Marek Rei cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Tianpeng Deng,Yanqi Huang,Guoqiang Han,Zhenwei Shi,Jiatai Lin,Qi Dou,Zaiyi Liu,Xiao-jing Guo,C. L. Philip Chen,Chu Han
title: FedDBL: Communication and Data Efficient Federated Deep-Broad Learning for Histopathological Tissue Classification
title_zh: FedDBL：用于组织病理学组织分类的通信和数据高效联合深度广泛学习
abstract: Histopathological tissue classification is a fundamental task in computational pathology. Deep learning-based models have achieved superior performance but centralized training with data centralization suffers from the privacy leakage problem. Federated learning (FL) can safeguard privacy by keeping training samples locally, but existing FL-based frameworks require a large number of well-annotated training samples and numerous rounds of communication which hinder their practicability in the real-world clinical scenario. In this paper, we propose a universal and lightweight federated learning framework, named Federated Deep-Broad Learning (FedDBL), to achieve superior classification performance with limited training samples and only one-round communication. By simply associating a pre-trained deep learning feature extractor, a fast and lightweight broad learning inference system and a classical federated aggregation approach, FedDBL can dramatically reduce data dependency and improve communication efficiency. Five-fold cross-validation demonstrates that FedDBL greatly outperforms the competitors with only one-round communication and limited training samples, while it even achieves comparable performance with the ones under multiple-round communications. Furthermore, due to the lightweight design and one-round communication, FedDBL reduces the communication burden from 4.6GB to only 276.5KB per client using the ResNet-50 backbone at 50-round training. Since no data or deep model sharing across different clients, the privacy issue is well-solved and the model security is guaranteed with no model inversion attack risk. Code is available at https://github.com/tianpeng-deng/FedDBL.
summary: Histopathological tissue classification is a fundamental task in computational pathology. Deep learning-based models have achieved superior performance but centralized training with data centralization suffers from the privacy leakage problem. Federated learning (FL) can safeguard privacy by keeping training samples locally, but existing FL-based frameworks require a large number of well-annotated training samples and numerous rounds of communication which hinder their practicability in the real-world clinical scenario. In this paper, we propose a universal and lightweight federated learning framework, named Federated Deep-Broad Learning (FedDBL), to achieve superior classification performance with limited training samples and only one-round communication. By simply associating a pre-trained deep learning feature extractor, a fast and lightweight broad learning inference system and a classical federated aggregation approach, FedDBL can dramatically reduce data dependency and improve communication efficiency. Five-fold cross-validation demonstrates that FedDBL greatly outperforms the competitors with only one-round communication and limited training samples, while it even achieves comparable performance with the ones under multiple-round communications. Furthermore, due to the lightweight design and one-round communication, FedDBL reduces the communication burden from 4.6GB to only 276.5KB per client using the ResNet-50 backbone at 50-round training. Since no data or deep model sharing across different clients, the privacy issue is well-solved and the model security is guaranteed with no model inversion attack risk. Code is available at https://github.com/tianpeng-deng/FedDBL.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学组织分类是计算病理学的一项基本任务。基于深度学习的模型取得了优异的性能，但数据集中的集中训练存在隐私泄露问题。联邦学习（FL）可以通过在本地保存训练样本来保护隐私，但现有的基于 FL 的框架需要大量注释良好的训练样本和多轮通信，这阻碍了它们在现实临床场景中的实用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用且轻量级的联邦学习框架，称为联邦深度广泛学习（FedDBL），以在有限的训练样本和仅一轮通信的情况下实现优异的分类性能。通过简单地将预先训练的深度学习特征提取器、快速、轻量级的广泛学习推理系统和经典的联邦聚合方法关联起来，FedDBL 可以显着减少数据依赖性并提高通信效率。五折交叉验证表明，FedDBL 在仅一轮通信和有限训练样本的情况下大大优于竞争对手，甚至在多轮通信下达到了与竞争对手相当的性能。此外，由于轻量级设计和一轮通信，FedDBL 在 50 轮训练中使用 ResNet-50 主干网络，将每个客户端的通信负担从 4.6GB 减少到仅 276.5KB。由于不同客户端之间没有数据或深度模型共享，因此很好地解决了隐私问题，保证了模型安全，不存在模型反转攻击风险。代码可在 https://github.com/tianpeng-deng/FedDBL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedDBL框架，在保证隐私的前提下，通过减少通信轮次和数据依赖性，实现高效的组织病理学组织分类。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习框架需大量标注数据和多轮通信，导致实际应用受限；同时集中训练存在隐私泄露风险，需设计更高效且隐私保护的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合预训练深度学习特征提取器、轻量级广义学习推理系统与经典联邦聚合方法，仅需单轮通信和少量训练样本即可完成模型训练。
AI.result: 五折交叉验证显示FedDBL在单轮通信和有限样本下显著优于对比方法，通信负担从4.6GB降至276.5KB，且无模型逆向攻击风险。
AI.conclusion: FedDBL通过轻量化设计和单轮通信机制，有效解决了数据效率、通信开销和隐私保护问题，适用于真实临床场景。

authors_text: Charith Munasinghe,Fatemeh Mohammadi Amin,Davide Scaramuzza,Hans Wernher van de Venn
title: COVERED, CollabOratiVE Robot Environment Dataset for 3D Semantic segmentation
title_zh: 用于 3D 语义分割的 COVERED、CollabOratiVE 机器人环境数据集
comment: ef:IEEE Conference on Emerging Technologies and Factory Automation (ETFA 2022)
comments: ef:IEEE Conference on Emerging Technologies and Factory Automation (ETFA 2022)
abstract: Safe human-robot collaboration (HRC) has recently gained a lot of interest with the emerging Industry 5.0 paradigm. Conventional robots are being replaced with more intelligent and flexible collaborative robots (cobots). Safe and efficient collaboration between cobots and humans largely relies on the cobot's comprehensive semantic understanding of the dynamic surrounding of industrial environments. Despite the importance of semantic understanding for such applications, 3D semantic segmentation of collaborative robot workspaces lacks sufficient research and dedicated datasets. The performance limitation caused by insufficient datasets is called 'data hunger' problem. To overcome this current limitation, this work develops a new dataset specifically designed for this use case, named "COVERED", which includes point-wise annotated point clouds of a robotic cell. Lastly, we also provide a benchmark of current state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithm performance on the dataset and demonstrate a real-time semantic segmentation of a collaborative robot workspace using a multi-LiDAR system. The promising results from using the trained Deep Networks on a real-time dynamically changing situation shows that we are on the right track. Our perception pipeline achieves 20Hz throughput with a prediction point accuracy of $>$96\% and $>$92\% mean intersection over union (mIOU) while maintaining an 8Hz throughput.
summary: Safe human-robot collaboration (HRC) has recently gained a lot of interest with the emerging Industry 5.0 paradigm. Conventional robots are being replaced with more intelligent and flexible collaborative robots (cobots). Safe and efficient collaboration between cobots and humans largely relies on the cobot's comprehensive semantic understanding of the dynamic surrounding of industrial environments. Despite the importance of semantic understanding for such applications, 3D semantic segmentation of collaborative robot workspaces lacks sufficient research and dedicated datasets. The performance limitation caused by insufficient datasets is called 'data hunger' problem. To overcome this current limitation, this work develops a new dataset specifically designed for this use case, named "COVERED", which includes point-wise annotated point clouds of a robotic cell. Lastly, we also provide a benchmark of current state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithm performance on the dataset and demonstrate a real-time semantic segmentation of a collaborative robot workspace using a multi-LiDAR system. The promising results from using the trained Deep Networks on a real-time dynamically changing situation shows that we are on the right track. Our perception pipeline achieves 20Hz throughput with a prediction point accuracy of $>$96\% and $>$92\% mean intersection over union (mIOU) while maintaining an 8Hz throughput.
abstract_zh: 安全的人机协作 (HRC) 最近随着新兴的工业 5.0 范式引起了广泛关注。传统机器人正在被更智能、更灵活的协作机器人（cobot）所取代。协作机器人与人类之间安全高效的协作很大程度上依赖于协作机器人对工业环境动态周围的全面语义理解。尽管语义理解对于此类应用很重要，但协作机器人工作空间的 3D 语义分割缺乏足够的研究和专用数据集。由于数据集不足而导致的性能限制称为“数据饥饿”问题。为了克服当前的限制，这项工作开发了一个专门为此用例设计的新数据集，名为“COVERED”，其中包括机器人单元的逐点注释点云。最后，我们还提供了数据集上当前最先进（SOTA）算法性能的基准，并演示了使用多激光雷达系统对协作机器人工作空间的实时语义分割。在实时动态变化的情况下使用训练有素的深度网络所取得的有希望的结果表明我们走在正确的轨道上。我们的感知管道实现了 20Hz 吞吐量，预测点精度为 $>$96\% 和 $>$92\% 并集平均交集 (mIOU)，同时保持 8Hz 吞吐量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为COVERED的协作机器人环境三维语义分割数据集，并建立基准测试以评估当前最先进的算法性能。
AI.motivation: 工业5.0背景下，协作机器人需要更全面的环境语义理解以实现安全高效的人机协作，但现有研究缺乏专门针对协作机器人工作空间的三维语义分割数据集，导致'数据饥饿'问题。
AI.method: 开发包含点云标注的COVERED数据集，基于多LiDAR系统实现实时语义分割，并对当前SOTA算法进行基准测试。
AI.result: 感知流水线实现实时动态场景分割，达到20Hz吞吐量（点精度>96%）、92%平均交并比（mIOU），同时保持8Hz吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: COVERED数据集有效缓解了数据饥饿问题，所提出的实时语义分割方法在动态工业场景中展现出良好性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出名为COVERED的协作机器人环境三维语义分割数据集，并建立基准测试以评估当前最先进的算法性能。

motivation: 工业5.0背景下，协作机器人需要更全面的环境语义理解以实现安全高效的人机协作，但现有研究缺乏专门针对协作机器人工作空间的三维语义分割数据集，导致'数据饥饿'问题。
method: 开发包含点云标注的COVERED数据集，基于多LiDAR系统实现实时语义分割，并对当前SOTA算法进行基准测试。
result: 感知流水线实现实时动态场景分割，达到20Hz吞吐量（点精度>96%）、92%平均交并比（mIOU），同时保持8Hz吞吐量。
conclusion: COVERED数据集有效缓解了数据饥饿问题，所提出的实时语义分割方法在动态工业场景中展现出良好性能。
search_text: COVERED, CollabOratiVE Robot Environment Dataset for 3D Semantic segmentation 用于 3D 语义分割的 COVERED、CollabOratiVE 机器人环境数据集 Safe human-robot collaboration (HRC) has recently gained a lot of interest with the emerging Industry 5.0 paradigm. Conventional robots are being replaced with more intelligent and flexible collaborative robots (cobots). Safe and efficient collaboration between cobots and humans largely relies on the cobot's comprehensive semantic understanding of the dynamic surrounding of industrial environments. Despite the importance of semantic understanding for such applications, 3D semantic segmentation of collaborative robot workspaces lacks sufficient research and dedicated datasets. The performance limitation caused by insufficient datasets is called 'data hunger' problem. To overcome this current limitation, this work develops a new dataset specifically designed for this use case, named "COVERED", which includes point-wise annotated point clouds of a robotic cell. Lastly, we also provide a benchmark of current state-of-the-art (SOTA) algorithm performance on the dataset and demonstrate a real-time semantic segmentation of a collaborative robot workspace using a multi-LiDAR system. The promising results from using the trained Deep Networks on a real-time dynamically changing situation shows that we are on the right track. Our perception pipeline achieves 20Hz throughput with a prediction point accuracy of $>$96\% and $>$92\% mean intersection over union (mIOU) while maintaining an 8Hz throughput. 安全的人机协作 (HRC) 最近随着新兴的工业 5.0 范式引起了广泛关注。传统机器人正在被更智能、更灵活的协作机器人（cobot）所取代。协作机器人与人类之间安全高效的协作很大程度上依赖于协作机器人对工业环境动态周围的全面语义理解。尽管语义理解对于此类应用很重要，但协作机器人工作空间的 3D 语义分割缺乏足够的研究和专用数据集。由于数据集不足而导致的性能限制称为“数据饥饿”问题。为了克服当前的限制，这项工作开发了一个专门为此用例设计的新数据集，名为“COVERED”，其中包括机器人单元的逐点注释点云。最后，我们还提供了数据集上当前最先进（SOTA）算法性能的基准，并演示了使用多激光雷达系统对协作机器人工作空间的实时语义分割。在实时动态变化的情况下使用训练有素的深度网络所取得的有希望的结果表明我们走在正确的轨道上。我们的感知管道实现了 20Hz 吞吐量，预测点精度为 $>$96\% 和 $>$92\% 并集平均交集 (mIOU)，同时保持 8Hz 吞吐量。 本文提出名为COVERED的协作机器人环境三维语义分割数据集，并建立基准测试以评估当前最先进的算法性能。 Charith Munasinghe,Fatemeh Mohammadi Amin,Davide Scaramuzza,Hans Wernher van de Venn cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Mark Eastwood,Heba Sailem,Silviu Tudor,Xiaohong Gao,Judith Offman,Emmanouil Karteris,Angeles Montero Fernandez,Danny Jonigk,William Cookson,Miriam Moffatt,Sanjay Popat,Fayyaz Minhas,Jan Lukas Robertus
title: MesoGraph: Automatic Profiling of Malignant Mesothelioma Subtypes from Histological Images
title_zh: MesoGraph：根据组织学图像自动分析恶性间皮瘤亚型
abstract: Malignant mesothelioma is classified into three histological subtypes, Epithelioid, Sarcomatoid, and Biphasic according to the relative proportions of epithelioid and sarcomatoid tumor cells present. Biphasic tumors display significant populations of both cell types. This subtyping is subjective and limited by current diagnostic guidelines and can differ even between expert thoracic pathologists when characterising the continuum of relative proportions of epithelioid and sarcomatoid components using a three class system. In this work, we develop a novel dual-task Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture with ranking loss to learn a model capable of scoring regions of tissue down to cellular resolution. This allows quantitative profiling of a tumor sample according to the aggregate sarcomatoid association score of all the cells in the sample. The proposed approach uses only core-level labels and frames the prediction task as a dual multiple instance learning (MIL) problem. Tissue is represented by a cell graph with both cell-level morphological and regional features. We use an external multi-centric test set from Mesobank, on which we demonstrate the predictive performance of our model. We validate our model predictions through an analysis of the typical morphological features of cells according to their predicted score, finding that some of the morphological differences identified by our model match known differences used by pathologists. We further show that the model score is predictive of patient survival with a hazard ratio of 2.30. The code for the proposed approach, along with the dataset, is available at: https://github.com/measty/MesoGraph.

This allows quantitative profiling of a tumor sample according to the aggregate sarcomatoid association score of all the cells in the sample. The proposed approach uses only core-level labels and frames the prediction task as a dual multiple instance learning (MIL) problem. Tissue is represented by a cell graph with both cell-level morphological and regional features.
