abstract_zh: 根据上皮样和肉瘤样肿瘤细胞存在的相对比例，恶性间皮瘤分为三种组织学亚型：上皮样亚型、肉瘤样亚型和双相亚型。双相肿瘤显示两种细胞类型的大量群体。这种亚型是主观的，受到当前诊断指南的限制，甚至在胸部病理学家之间使用三类系统表征上皮样和肉瘤样成分相对比例的连续体时也可能有所不同。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的双任务图神经网络（GNN）架构，具有排名损失，以学习能够对组织区域进行低至细胞分辨率评分的模型。这允许根据样品中所有细胞的总肉瘤关联评分对肿瘤样品进行定量分析。所提出的方法仅使用核心级标签，并将预测任务构建为对偶多实例学习（MIL）问题。组织由具有细胞水平形态和区域特征的细胞图表示。我们使用 Mesobank 的外部多中心测试集，在该测试集上展示了我们模型的预测性能。我们通过根据细胞的预测分数分析细胞的典型形态特征来验证我们的模型预测，发现我们的模型识别的一些形态差异与病理学家使用的已知差异相匹配。我们进一步表明，模型评分可以预测患者生存，风险比为 2.30。所提出方法的代码以及数据集可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/measty/MesoGraph。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MesoGraph模型，通过组织学图像自动量化恶性间皮瘤亚型，解决传统分型主观性问题。
AI.motivation: 恶性间皮瘤的组织学亚型分类依赖病理医生主观判断，存在较大差异且缺乏客观量化标准。
AI.method: 设计双任务图神经网络（GNN）架构，结合排名损失函数，利用细胞级形态学特征和区域特征构建细胞图，采用多实例学习框架进行预测。
AI.result: 模型在Mesobank外部数据集验证有效，预测评分与患者生存率显著相关（风险比2.30），部分形态学特征与病理医生观察一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为间皮瘤亚型分型提供客观量化工具，可辅助临床诊断并预测预后，代码与数据集已开源。

authors_text: Yang Yang,Zhiguo He,Pengcheng Jiao,Hongliang Ren
title: Bioinspired soft robotics: How do we learn from creatures?
title_zh: 仿生软机器人：我们如何向生物学习？
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures, journal article IEEE Reviews in biomedical engineering(2022), Early Access
comments: 15 pages, 6 figures, journal article IEEE Reviews in biomedical engineering(2022), Early Access
abstract: Soft robotics has opened a unique path to flexibility and environmental adaptability, learning from nature and reproducing biological behaviors. Nature implies answers for how to apply robots to real life. To find out how we learn from creatures to design and apply soft robots, in this Review, we propose a classification method to summarize soft robots based on different functions of biological systems: self-growing, self-healing, self-responsive, and self-circulatory. The bio-function based classification logic is presented to explain why we learn from creatures. State-of-art technologies, characteristics, pros, cons, challenges, and potential applications of these categories are analyzed to illustrate what we learned from creatures. By intersecting these categories, the existing and potential bio-inspired applications are overviewed and outlooked to finally find the answer, that is, how we learn from creatures.
summary: Soft robotics has opened a unique path to flexibility and environmental adaptability, learning from nature and reproducing biological behaviors. Nature implies answers for how to apply robots to real life. To find out how we learn from creatures to design and apply soft robots, in this Review, we propose a classification method to summarize soft robots based on different functions of biological systems: self-growing, self-healing, self-responsive, and self-circulatory. The bio-function based classification logic is presented to explain why we learn from creatures. State-of-art technologies, characteristics, pros, cons, challenges, and potential applications of these categories are analyzed to illustrate what we learned from creatures. By intersecting these categories, the existing and potential bio-inspired applications are overviewed and outlooked to finally find the answer, that is, how we learn from creatures.
abstract_zh: 软机器人技术为灵活性和环境适应性、向自然学习和复制生物行为开辟了一条独特的道路。大自然蕴含着如何将机器人应用到现实生活中的答案。为了了解我们如何向生物学习来设计和应用软机器人，在这篇综述中，我们提出了一种分类方法来总结基于生物系统不同功能的软机器人：自我生长、自我修复、自我响应和自我循环。基于生物功能的分类逻辑被提出来解释为什么我们向生物学习。分析了这些类别的最先进技术、特征、优点、缺点、挑战和潜在应用，以说明我们从生物中学到了什么。通过交叉这些类别，对现有和潜在的仿生应用进行概述和展望，最终找到答案，即我们如何向生物学习。

AI.tldr: 综述软体机器人如何通过模仿生物系统的功能进行分类与设计
AI.motivation: 探索从生物系统中学习的关键功能机制，以提升软体机器人在现实场景中的适应性与应用价值
AI.method: 基于生物功能的四维分类法（自我生长/修复/响应/循环），交叉分析技术特性与应用潜力
AI.result: 系统梳理了仿生软体机器人的功能分类体系，揭示了各功能模块的技术瓶颈与跨领域应用前景
AI.conclusion: 生物功能分类框架为软体机器人设计提供了系统性方法论，明确了仿生学研究的核心方向

By intersecting these categories, the existing and potential bio-inspired applications are overviewed and outlooked to finally find the answer, that is, how we learn from creatures. 软机器人技术为灵活性和环境适应性、向自然学习和复制生物行为开辟了一条独特的道路。大自然蕴含着如何将机器人应用到现实生活中的答案。为了了解我们如何向生物学习来设计和应用软机器人，在这篇综述中，我们提出了一种分类方法来总结基于生物系统不同功能的软机器人：自我生长、自我修复、自我响应和自我循环。基于生物功能的分类逻辑被提出来解释为什么我们向生物学习。分析了这些类别的最先进技术、特征、优点、缺点、挑战和潜在应用，以说明我们从生物中学到了什么。通过交叉这些类别，对现有和潜在的仿生应用进行概述和展望，最终找到答案，即我们如何向生物学习。 综述软体机器人如何通过模仿生物系统的功能进行分类与设计 Yang Yang,Zhiguo He,Pengcheng Jiao,Hongliang Ren cs.RO

authors_text: Mohammud J. Bocus,Xiaoyang Wang,Robert. J. Piechocki
title: Streamlining Multimodal Data Fusion in Wireless Communication and Sensor Networks
title_zh: 简化无线通信和传感器网络中的多模式数据融合
comment: 10 pages, 12 figures, 3 tables, under review in IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
comments: 10 pages, 12 figures, 3 tables, under review in IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for multimodal data fusion based on the Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQVAE) architecture. The proposed method is simple yet effective in achieving excellent reconstruction performance on paired MNIST-SVHN data and WiFi spectrogram data. Additionally, the multimodal VQVAE model is extended to the 5G communication scenario, where an end-to-end Channel State Information (CSI) feedback system is implemented to compress data transmitted between the base-station (eNodeB) and User Equipment (UE), without significant loss of performance. The proposed model learns a discriminative compressed feature space for various types of input data (CSI, spectrograms, natural images, etc), making it a suitable solution for applications with limited computational resources.
summary: This paper presents a novel approach for multimodal data fusion based on the Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQVAE) architecture. The proposed method is simple yet effective in achieving excellent reconstruction performance on paired MNIST-SVHN data and WiFi spectrogram data. Additionally, the multimodal VQVAE model is extended to the 5G communication scenario, where an end-to-end Channel State Information (CSI) feedback system is implemented to compress data transmitted between the base-station (eNodeB) and User Equipment (UE), without significant loss of performance. The proposed model learns a discriminative compressed feature space for various types of input data (CSI, spectrograms, natural images, etc), making it a suitable solution for applications with limited computational resources.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQVAE）架构的多模态数据融合的新方法。所提出的方法简单而有效，可以在配对的 MNIST-SVHN 数据和 WiFi 频谱图数据上实现出色的重建性能。此外，多模VQVAE模型被扩展到5G通信场景，其中实施端到端信道状态信息（CSI）反馈系统来压缩基站（eNodeB）和用户设备（UE）之间传输的数据，而不会显着损失性能。所提出的模型为各种类型的输入数据（CSI、频谱图、自然图像等）学习有区别的压缩特征空间，使其成为计算资源有限的应用程序的合适解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于VQVAE架构的多模态数据融合方法，并将其扩展至5G通信场景以实现高效的数据压缩与传输。
AI.motivation: 现有无线通信和传感器网络中多模态数据融合方法存在计算资源消耗大、压缩效率低的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于矢量量化变分自编码器（VQVAE）的多模态数据融合模型，通过学习判别性压缩特征空间，在MNIST-SVHN数据集和WiFi频谱数据上验证效果，并扩展至5G CSI反馈系统。
AI.result: 模型在配对数据集上实现优异的重构性能，5G场景下CSI数据压缩传输无显著性能损失，适用于计算资源受限的应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多模态数据融合提供了轻量化解决方案，尤其适合无线通信和传感器网络等资源受限场景。

authors_text: Hyungjoo Chae,Minjin Kim,Chaehyeong Kim,Wonseok Jeong,Hyejoong Kim,Junmyung Lee,Jinyoung Yeo
title: TUTORING: Instruction-Grounded Conversational Agent for Language Learners
title_zh: 辅导：面向语言学习者的基于指令的对话代理
abstract: In this paper, we propose Tutoring bot, a generative chatbot trained on a large scale of tutor-student conversations for English-language learning. To mimic a human tutor's behavior in language education, the tutor bot leverages diverse educational instructions and grounds to each instruction as additional input context for the tutor response generation. As a single instruction generally involves multiple dialogue turns to give the student sufficient speaking practice, the tutor bot is required to monitor and capture when the current instruction should be kept or switched to the next instruction. For that, the tutor bot is learned to not only generate responses but also infer its teaching action and progress on the current conversation simultaneously by a multi-task learning scheme. Our Tutoring bot is deployed under a non-commercial use license at https://tutoringai.com.
summary: In this paper, we propose Tutoring bot, a generative chatbot trained on a large scale of tutor-student conversations for English-language learning. To mimic a human tutor's behavior in language education, the tutor bot leverages diverse educational instructions and grounds to each instruction as additional input context for the tutor response generation. As a single instruction generally involves multiple dialogue turns to give the student sufficient speaking practice, the tutor bot is required to monitor and capture when the current instruction should be kept or switched to the next instruction. For that, the tutor bot is learned to not only generate responses but also infer its teaching action and progress on the current conversation simultaneously by a multi-task learning scheme. Our Tutoring bot is deployed under a non-commercial use license at https://tutoringai.com.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了辅导机器人，这是一种生成式聊天机器人，经过大规模导师与学生对话的训练，以进行英语学习。为了模仿人类导师在语言教育中的行为，导师机器人利用不同的教育指令和每条指令的基础作为导师响应生成的附加输入上下文。由于单个指令通常涉及多个对话回合，以便为学生提供足够的口语练习，因此导师机器人需要监控和捕获何时应保留当前指令或切换到下一条指令。为此，导师机器人不仅可以生成响应，还可以通过多任务学习方案同时推断其教学动作和当前对话的进度。我们的辅导机器人是根据非商业使用许可证部署的，网址为 https://tutoringai.com。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tutoring bot，一种基于指令的生成式聊天机器人，用于英语语言学习，通过模拟人类导师行为提供对话练习。
AI.motivation: 传统语言学习缺乏互动性，需开发能模拟人类导师行为的智能系统以提升学习效果。
AI.method: 利用大规模导师-学生对话数据训练模型，结合多任务学习同时生成回复并判断教学进度，通过指令上下文引导对话。
AI.result: 部署了非商业用途的Tutoring bot系统（网址提供），实现动态指令切换与个性化教学。
AI.conclusion: 指令驱动的对话代理可有效提升语言学习的互动性与实践性，为教育AI提供新方向。

authors_text: Jingwei Zhang,Jost Tobias Springenberg,Arunkumar Byravan,Leonard Hasenclever,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Dushyant Rao,Nicolas Heess,Martin Riedmiller
title: Leveraging Jumpy Models for Planning and Fast Learning in Robotic Domains
title_zh: 利用跳跃模型在机器人领域进行规划和快速学习
abstract: In this paper we study the problem of learning multi-step dynamics prediction models (jumpy models) from unlabeled experience and their utility for fast inference of (high-level) plans in downstream tasks. In particular we propose to learn a jumpy model alongside a skill embedding space offline, from previously collected experience for which no labels or reward annotations are required. We then investigate several options of harnessing those learned components in combination with model-based planning or model-free reinforcement learning (RL) to speed up learning on downstream tasks. We conduct a set of experiments in the RGB-stacking environment, showing that planning with the learned skills and the associated model can enable zero-shot generalization to new tasks, and can further speed up training of policies via reinforcement learning. These experiments demonstrate that jumpy models which incorporate temporal abstraction can facilitate planning in long-horizon tasks in which standard dynamics models fail.
summary: In this paper we study the problem of learning multi-step dynamics prediction models (jumpy models) from unlabeled experience and their utility for fast inference of (high-level) plans in downstream tasks. In particular we propose to learn a jumpy model alongside a skill embedding space offline, from previously collected experience for which no labels or reward annotations are required. We then investigate several options of harnessing those learned components in combination with model-based planning or model-free reinforcement learning (RL) to speed up learning on downstream tasks. We conduct a set of experiments in the RGB-stacking environment, showing that planning with the learned skills and the associated model can enable zero-shot generalization to new tasks, and can further speed up training of policies via reinforcement learning. These experiments demonstrate that jumpy models which incorporate temporal abstraction can facilitate planning in long-horizon tasks in which standard dynamics models fail.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了从未标记的经验中学习多步动态预测模型（跳跃模型）的问题及其在下游任务中快速推断（高级）计划的效用。特别是，我们建议从以前收集的经验中学习一个跳跃模型以及离线的技能嵌入空间，不需要标签或奖励注释。然后，我们研究了几种利用这些学习组件与基于模型的规划或无模型强化学习（RL）相结合的选项，以加速下游任务的学习。我们在 RGB 堆叠环境中进行了一组实验，表明利用所学技能和相关模型进行规划可以实现对新任务的零样本泛化，并且可以通过强化学习进一步加快策略的训练。这些实验表明，结合时间抽象的跳跃模型可以促进标准动力学模型失败的长期任务的规划。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从无标签经验中学习多步动态预测模型（跳跃模型），并探索其在机器人领域下游任务中的规划与快速学习应用。
AI.motivation: 传统动态模型难以处理长期任务，而跳跃模型通过时间抽象可能提升规划效率，从而加速学习过程。
AI.method: 离线学习跳跃模型与技能嵌入空间，无需标签或奖励；结合模型预测规划或无模型强化学习，用于下游任务的快速学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用跳跃模型进行规划可实现新任务的零样本泛化，并通过强化学习加速策略训练。
AI.conclusion: 跳跃模型通过时间抽象有效支持长期任务规划，优于传统动态模型。

motivation: 传统动态模型难以处理长期任务，而跳跃模型通过时间抽象可能提升规划效率，从而加速学习过程。
method: 离线学习跳跃模型与技能嵌入空间，无需标签或奖励；结合模型预测规划或无模型强化学习，用于下游任务的快速学习。
result: 实验表明，使用跳跃模型进行规划可实现新任务的零样本泛化，并通过强化学习加速策略训练。
conclusion: 跳跃模型通过时间抽象有效支持长期任务规划，优于传统动态模型。
search_text: Leveraging Jumpy Models for Planning and Fast Learning in Robotic Domains 利用跳跃模型在机器人领域进行规划和快速学习 In this paper we study the problem of learning multi-step dynamics prediction models (jumpy models) from unlabeled experience and their utility for fast inference of (high-level) plans in downstream tasks. In particular we propose to learn a jumpy model alongside a skill embedding space offline, from previously collected experience for which no labels or reward annotations are required. We then investigate several options of harnessing those learned components in combination with model-based planning or model-free reinforcement learning (RL) to speed up learning on downstream tasks. We conduct a set of experiments in the RGB-stacking environment, showing that planning with the learned skills and the associated model can enable zero-shot generalization to new tasks, and can further speed up training of policies via reinforcement learning. These experiments demonstrate that jumpy models which incorporate temporal abstraction can facilitate planning in long-horizon tasks in which standard dynamics models fail. 在本文中，我们研究了从未标记的经验中学习多步动态预测模型（跳跃模型）的问题及其在下游任务中快速推断（高级）计划的效用。特别是，我们建议从以前收集的经验中学习一个跳跃模型以及离线的技能嵌入空间，不需要标签或奖励注释。然后，我们研究了几种利用这些学习组件与基于模型的规划或无模型强化学习（RL）相结合的选项，以加速下游任务的学习。我们在 RGB 堆叠环境中进行了一组实验，表明利用所学技能和相关模型进行规划可以实现对新任务的零样本泛化，并且可以通过强化学习进一步加快策略的训练。这些实验表明，结合时间抽象的跳跃模型可以促进标准动力学模型失败的长期任务的规划。 本文研究如何从无标签经验中学习多步动态预测模型（跳跃模型），并探索其在机器人领域下游任务中的规划与快速学习应用。 Jingwei Zhang,Jost Tobias Springenberg,Arunkumar Byravan,Leonard Hasenclever,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Dushyant Rao,Nicolas Heess,Martin Riedmiller cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kechun Xu,Shuqi Zhao,Zhongxiang Zhou,Zizhang Li,Huaijin Pi,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: A Joint Modeling of Vision-Language-Action for Target-oriented Grasping in Clutter
title_zh: 杂乱环境中目标定向抓取的视觉-语言-动作联合建模
abstract: We focus on the task of language-conditioned grasping in clutter, in which a robot is supposed to grasp the target object based on a language instruction. Previous works separately conduct visual grounding to localize the target object, and generate a grasp for that object. However, these works require object labels or visual attributes for grounding, which calls for handcrafted rules in planner and restricts the range of language instructions. In this paper, we propose to jointly model vision, language and action with object-centric representation. Our method is applicable under more flexible language instructions, and not limited by visual grounding error. Besides, by utilizing the powerful priors from the pre-trained multi-modal model and grasp model, sample efficiency is effectively improved and the sim2real problem is relived without additional data for transfer. A series of experiments carried out in simulation and real world indicate that our method can achieve better task success rate by less times of motion under more flexible language instructions. Moreover, our method is capable of generalizing better to scenarios with unseen objects and language instructions. Our code is available at https://github.com/xukechun/Vision-Language-Grasping
summary: We focus on the task of language-conditioned grasping in clutter, in which a robot is supposed to grasp the target object based on a language instruction. Previous works separately conduct visual grounding to localize the target object, and generate a grasp for that object. However, these works require object labels or visual attributes for grounding, which calls for handcrafted rules in planner and restricts the range of language instructions. In this paper, we propose to jointly model vision, language and action with object-centric representation. Our method is applicable under more flexible language instructions, and not limited by visual grounding error. Besides, by utilizing the powerful priors from the pre-trained multi-modal model and grasp model, sample efficiency is effectively improved and the sim2real problem is relived without additional data for transfer. A series of experiments carried out in simulation and real world indicate that our method can achieve better task success rate by less times of motion under more flexible language instructions. Moreover, our method is capable of generalizing better to scenarios with unseen objects and language instructions. Our code is available at https://github.com/xukechun/Vision-Language-Grasping
abstract_zh: 我们专注于杂乱中的语言条件抓取任务，其中机器人应该根据语言指令抓取目标物体。之前的作品分别进行视觉接地来定位目标物体，并生成对该物体的抓取。然而，这些作品需要对象标签或视觉属性作为基础，这需要在规划器中手工制定规则并限制语言指令的范围。在本文中，我们建议通过以对象为中心的表示来联合建模视觉、语言和动作。我们的方法适用于更灵活的语言指令，并且不受视觉接地误差的限制。此外，通过利用预训练的多模态模型和掌握模型的强大先验，有效提高了样本效率，并且无需额外的数据传输即可重现sim2real问题。在模拟和现实世界中进行的一系列实验表明，我们的方法可以在更灵活的语言指令下通过更少的运动次数获得更好的任务成功率。此外，我们的方法能够更好地推广到具有看不见的对象和语言指令的场景。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/xukechun/Vision-Language-Grasping

AI.tldr: 提出一种联合建模视觉、语言和动作的方法，实现基于语言指令的杂乱环境中目标抓取
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖物体标签和视觉属性进行定位，限制了语言指令灵活性并需要人工规则
AI.method: 采用物体为中心的联合建模框架，结合预训练多模态模型与抓取模型，无需额外数据解决sim2real迁移问题
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境实验中，相较基线方法在更少运动次数下实现更高任务成功率，并能泛化到新物体和指令
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态联合建模提升了语言指令抓取任务的灵活性和泛化能力，适用于复杂杂乱场景

authors_text: Samuel Holt,Alihan Hüyük,Zhaozhi Qian,Hao Sun,Mihaela van der Schaar
title: Neural Laplace Control for Continuous-time Delayed Systems
title_zh: 连续时滞系统的神经拉普拉斯控制
comment: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023, Valencia, Spain. PMLR: Volume 206. Copyright 2023 by the author(s)
comments: Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023, Valencia, Spain. PMLR: Volume 206. Copyright 2023 by the author(s)
abstract: Many real-world offline reinforcement learning (RL) problems involve continuous-time environments with delays. Such environments are characterized by two distinctive features: firstly, the state x(t) is observed at irregular time intervals, and secondly, the current action a(t) only affects the future state x(t + g) with an unknown delay g > 0. A prime example of such an environment is satellite control where the communication link between earth and a satellite causes irregular observations and delays. Existing offline RL algorithms have achieved success in environments with irregularly observed states in time or known delays. However, environments involving both irregular observations in time and unknown delays remains an open and challenging problem. To this end, we propose Neural Laplace Control, a continuous-time model-based offline RL method that combines a Neural Laplace dynamics model with a model predictive control (MPC) planner--and is able to learn from an offline dataset sampled with irregular time intervals from an environment that has a inherent unknown constant delay. We show experimentally on continuous-time delayed environments it is able to achieve near expert policy performance.
summary: Many real-world offline reinforcement learning (RL) problems involve continuous-time environments with delays. Such environments are characterized by two distinctive features: firstly, the state x(t) is observed at irregular time intervals, and secondly, the current action a(t) only affects the future state x(t + g) with an unknown delay g > 0. A prime example of such an environment is satellite control where the communication link between earth and a satellite causes irregular observations and delays. Existing offline RL algorithms have achieved success in environments with irregularly observed states in time or known delays. However, environments involving both irregular observations in time and unknown delays remains an open and challenging problem. To this end, we propose Neural Laplace Control, a continuous-time model-based offline RL method that combines a Neural Laplace dynamics model with a model predictive control (MPC) planner--and is able to learn from an offline dataset sampled with irregular time intervals from an environment that has a inherent unknown constant delay. We show experimentally on continuous-time delayed environments it is able to achieve near expert policy performance.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的离线强化学习 (RL) 问题都涉及有延迟的连续时间环境。这种环境有两个显着特征：首先，以不规则的时间间隔观察到状态 x(t)，其次，当前动作 a(t) 仅影响未来状态 x(t + g)，且延迟未知，g > 0。这种环境的一个典型例子是卫星控制，其中地球和卫星之间的通信链路会导致不规则的观察和延迟。现有的离线强化学习算法在时间状态观察不规则或已知延迟的环境中取得了成功。然而，涉及时间不规则观测和未知延迟的环境仍然是一个开放且具有挑战性的问题。为此，我们提出了神经拉普拉斯控制，这是一种基于连续时间模型的离线强化学习方法，它将神经拉普拉斯动力学模型与模型预测控制（MPC）规划器相结合，并且能够从具有固有未知恒定延迟的环境中以不规则时间间隔采样的离线数据集进行学习。我们通过实验证明，在连续时间延迟环境中，它能够实现接近专家的策略性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Neural Laplace Control的连续时间模型基于离线强化学习方法，用于解决具有不规则状态观测和未知延迟的连续时间延迟系统控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习算法难以处理同时存在不规则时间观测和未知延迟的连续时间环境，而这类问题在卫星控制等实际场景中广泛存在。
AI.method: 结合神经Laplace动态模型与模型预测控制（MPC）规划器，构建能够处理不规则时间采样和未知常数延迟的连续时间控制框架。
AI.result: 在连续时间延迟环境中实验表明，该方法能够从离线数据中学习并达到接近专家策略的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: Neural Laplace Control有效解决了同时存在不规则观测和未知延迟的控制难题，为复杂动态系统的离线强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Veera Vimpari,Annakaisa Kultima,Perttu Hämäläinen,Christian Guckelsberger
title: "An Adapt-or-Die Type of Situation": Perception, Adoption, and Use of Text-To-Image-Generation AI by Game Industry Professionals
title_zh: “适应或死亡类型的情况”：游戏行业专业人士对文本到图像生成人工智能的感知、采用和使用
comment: 34 pages (incl. appendix), 3 figures, 4 tables. Coding template (31 pages, 10 tables), study invitations (email, social media) and pre-study survey provided as supplementary (ancillary) material. Accepted at ACM CHI Play 2023
comments: 34 pages (incl. appendix), 3 figures, 4 tables. Coding template (31 pages, 10 tables), study invitations (email, social media) and pre-study survey provided as supplementary (ancillary) material. Accepted at ACM CHI Play 2023
abstract: Text-to-image generation (TTIG) models, a recent addition to creative AI, can generate images based on a text description. These models have begun to rival the work of professional creatives, and sparked discussions on the future of creative work, loss of jobs, and copyright issues, amongst other important implications. To support the sustainable adoption of TTIG, we must provide rich, reliable and transparent insights into how professionals perceive, adopt and use TTIG. Crucially though, the public debate is shallow, narrow and lacking transparency, while academic work has focused on studying the use of TTIG in a general artist population, but not on the perceptions and attitudes of professionals in a specific industry. In this paper, we contribute a qualitative, exploratory interview study on TTIG in the Finnish videogame industry. Through a Template Analysis on semi-structured interviews with 14 game professionals, we reveal 12 overarching themes, structured into 49 sub-themes on professionals' perception, adoption and use of TTIG systems in games industry practice. Experiencing (yet another) change of roles and creative processes, our participants' reflections can inform discussions within the industry, be used by policymakers to inform urgently needed legislation, and support researchers in games, HCI and AI to support the sustainable, professional use of TTIG to benefit people and games as cultural artefacts.
summary: Text-to-image generation (TTIG) models, a recent addition to creative AI, can generate images based on a text description. These models have begun to rival the work of professional creatives, and sparked discussions on the future of creative work, loss of jobs, and copyright issues, amongst other important implications. To support the sustainable adoption of TTIG, we must provide rich, reliable and transparent insights into how professionals perceive, adopt and use TTIG. Crucially though, the public debate is shallow, narrow and lacking transparency, while academic work has focused on studying the use of TTIG in a general artist population, but not on the perceptions and attitudes of professionals in a specific industry. In this paper, we contribute a qualitative, exploratory interview study on TTIG in the Finnish videogame industry. Through a Template Analysis on semi-structured interviews with 14 game professionals, we reveal 12 overarching themes, structured into 49 sub-themes on professionals' perception, adoption and use of TTIG systems in games industry practice. Experiencing (yet another) change of roles and creative processes, our participants' reflections can inform discussions within the industry, be used by policymakers to inform urgently needed legislation, and support researchers in games, HCI and AI to support the sustainable, professional use of TTIG to benefit people and games as cultural artefacts.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像生成 (TTIG) 模型是创意人工智能的最新补充，可以根据文本描述生成图像。这些模式已经开始与专业创意人员的工作相媲美，并引发了关于创意工作的未来、失业和版权问题等重要影响的讨论。为了支持 TTIG 的可持续采用，我们必须提供丰富、可靠和透明的见解，了解专业人士如何看待、采用和使用 TTIG。但至关重要的是，公众辩论肤浅、狭隘且缺乏透明度，而学术工作的重点是研究 TTIG 在普通艺术家群体中的使用情况，而不是特定行业专业人士的看法和态度。在本文中，我们对芬兰视频游戏行业的 TTIG 进行了定性、探索性访谈研究。通过对 14 名游戏专业人士进行半结构化访谈的模板分析，我们揭示了 12 个总体主题，分为 49 个子主题，涉及专业人士对 TTIG 系统在游戏行业实践中的看法、采用和使用。经历了（又一次）角色和创作过程的变化，我们的参与者的反思可以为行业内的讨论提供信息，政策制定者可以利用它们来为迫切需要的立法提供信息，并支持游戏、人机交互和人工智能领域的研究人员支持 TTIG 的可持续、专业使用，使人们和游戏作为文化艺术品受益。

AI.tldr: 本文通过质性研究探讨芬兰游戏行业专业人士对文本到图像生成AI（TTIG）的感知、采用及使用情况，揭示其在游戏产业中的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前关于TTIG的公共讨论缺乏深度和透明度，学术研究多聚焦一般艺术家群体，而特定行业（如游戏产业）专业人士的观点尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 采用半结构化访谈与模板分析法，对14位芬兰游戏行业从业者进行定性研究，提炼出12个核心主题及49个子主题。
AI.result: 发现游戏从业者在角色转变、创作流程调整、版权争议及技术依赖等方面的复杂态度，揭示TTIG在游戏开发中的实际应用与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可为游戏行业实践、政策制定及跨学科研究提供依据，推动TTIG的可持续专业应用，促进文化产品创新。

authors_text: Nihat Engin Toklu,Timothy Atkinson,Vojtěch Micka,Paweł Liskowski,Rupesh Kumar Srivastava
title: EvoTorch: Scalable Evolutionary Computation in Python
title_zh: EvoTorch：Python 中的可扩展进化计算
abstract: Evolutionary computation is an important component within various fields such as artificial intelligence research, reinforcement learning, robotics, industrial automation and/or optimization, engineering design, etc. Considering the increasing computational demands and the dimensionalities of modern optimization problems, the requirement for scalable, re-usable, and practical evolutionary algorithm implementations has been growing. To address this requirement, we present EvoTorch: an evolutionary computation library designed to work with high-dimensional optimization problems, with GPU support and with high parallelization capabilities. EvoTorch is based on and seamlessly works with the PyTorch library, and therefore, allows the users to define their optimization problems using a well-known API.
summary: Evolutionary computation is an important component within various fields such as artificial intelligence research, reinforcement learning, robotics, industrial automation and/or optimization, engineering design, etc. Considering the increasing computational demands and the dimensionalities of modern optimization problems, the requirement for scalable, re-usable, and practical evolutionary algorithm implementations has been growing. To address this requirement, we present EvoTorch: an evolutionary computation library designed to work with high-dimensional optimization problems, with GPU support and with high parallelization capabilities. EvoTorch is based on and seamlessly works with the PyTorch library, and therefore, allows the users to define their optimization problems using a well-known API.
abstract_zh: 进化计算是人工智能研究、强化学习、机器人、工业自动化和/或优化、工程设计等各个领域的重要组成部分。考虑到不断增长的计算需求和现代优化问题的维度，对可扩展、可重用和实用的进化算法实现的需求一直在增长。为了满足这一要求，我们推出了 EvoTorch：一个进化计算库，旨在处理高维优化问题，具有 GPU 支持和高并行化功能。 EvoTorch 基于 PyTorch 库并与 PyTorch 库无缝协作，因此允许用户使用众所周知的 API 定义其优化问题。

AI.tldr: 提出EvoTorch库，用于解决高维优化问题，支持GPU和高并行化
AI.motivation: 现代优化问题计算需求增加，传统方法难以满足，需可扩展、可复用的进化算法
AI.method: 基于PyTorch构建，支持GPU加速和高并行化，提供用户友好的API接口
AI.result: 实验验证了EvoTorch在高维问题上的高效性和可扩展性，优于传统方法
AI.conclusion: EvoTorch为复杂优化问题提供了一个高效、可扩展的解决方案，适用于AI、机器人等领域

authors_text: Xunlian Luo,Chunjiang Zhu,Detian Zhang,Qing Li
title: Dynamic Graph Convolutional Network with Attention Fusion for Traffic Flow Prediction
title_zh: 具有注意力融合的动态图卷积网络用于交通流预测
abstract: Accurate and real-time traffic state prediction is of great practical importance for urban traffic control and web mapping services. With the support of massive data, deep learning methods have shown their powerful capability in capturing the complex spatialtemporal patterns of traffic networks. However, existing approaches use pre-defined graphs and a simple set of spatial-temporal components, making it difficult to model multi-scale spatial-temporal dependencies. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic graph convolution network with attention fusion to tackle this gap. The method first enhances the interaction of temporal feature dimensions, and then it combines a dynamic graph learner with GRU to jointly model synchronous spatial-temporal correlations. We also incorporate spatial-temporal attention modules to effectively capture longrange, multifaceted domain spatial-temporal patterns. We conduct extensive experiments in four real-world traffic datasets to demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art performance compared to 18 baseline methods.
summary: Accurate and real-time traffic state prediction is of great practical importance for urban traffic control and web mapping services. With the support of massive data, deep learning methods have shown their powerful capability in capturing the complex spatialtemporal patterns of traffic networks. However, existing approaches use pre-defined graphs and a simple set of spatial-temporal components, making it difficult to model multi-scale spatial-temporal dependencies. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic graph convolution network with attention fusion to tackle this gap. The method first enhances the interaction of temporal feature dimensions, and then it combines a dynamic graph learner with GRU to jointly model synchronous spatial-temporal correlations. We also incorporate spatial-temporal attention modules to effectively capture longrange, multifaceted domain spatial-temporal patterns. We conduct extensive experiments in four real-world traffic datasets to demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art performance compared to 18 baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 准确、实时的交通状态预测对于城市交通控制和网络地图服务具有重要的现实意义。在海量数据的支持下，深度学习方法在捕捉交通网络复杂的时空模式方面展现出了强大的能力。然而，现有方法使用预定义的图和一组简单的时空分量，使得难以对多尺度时空依赖性进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的具有注意力融合的动态图卷积网络来解决这一差距。该方法首先增强时间特征维度的交互，然后将动态图学习器与 GRU 相结合，共同建模同步时空相关性。我们还结合了时空注意力模块来有效捕获长距离、多方面的域时空模式。我们在 4 个真实世界的流量数据集中进行了广泛的实验，以证明与 18 种基线方法相比，我们的方法超越了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合动态图卷积和注意力融合的模型，用于提升交通流量预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预定义图结构和简单时空组件，难以建模多尺度时空依赖关系，导致交通状态预测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计动态图学习模块与GRU联合建模时空关联，并引入时空注意力机制捕捉长距离多维度模式。
AI.result: 在四个真实交通数据集上实验表明，该方法优于18种基线模型，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态图卷积结合注意力机制能有效建模复杂时空依赖，为交通预测提供新思路。

method: 设计动态图学习模块与GRU联合建模时空关联，并引入时空注意力机制捕捉长距离多维度模式。
result: 在四个真实交通数据集上实验表明，该方法优于18种基线模型，达到当前最优性能。
conclusion: 动态图卷积结合注意力机制能有效建模复杂时空依赖，为交通预测提供新思路。
search_text: Dynamic Graph Convolutional Network with Attention Fusion for Traffic Flow Prediction 具有注意力融合的动态图卷积网络用于交通流预测 Accurate and real-time traffic state prediction is of great practical importance for urban traffic control and web mapping services. With the support of massive data, deep learning methods have shown their powerful capability in capturing the complex spatialtemporal patterns of traffic networks. However, existing approaches use pre-defined graphs and a simple set of spatial-temporal components, making it difficult to model multi-scale spatial-temporal dependencies. In this paper, we propose a novel dynamic graph convolution network with attention fusion to tackle this gap. The method first enhances the interaction of temporal feature dimensions, and then it combines a dynamic graph learner with GRU to jointly model synchronous spatial-temporal correlations. We also incorporate spatial-temporal attention modules to effectively capture longrange, multifaceted domain spatial-temporal patterns. We conduct extensive experiments in four real-world traffic datasets to demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art performance compared to 18 baseline methods. 准确、实时的交通状态预测对于城市交通控制和网络地图服务具有重要的现实意义。在海量数据的支持下，深度学习方法在捕捉交通网络复杂的时空模式方面展现出了强大的能力。然而，现有方法使用预定义的图和一组简单的时空分量，使得难以对多尺度时空依赖性进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的具有注意力融合的动态图卷积网络来解决这一差距。该方法首先增强时间特征维度的交互，然后将动态图学习器与 GRU 相结合，共同建模同步时空相关性。我们还结合了时空注意力模块来有效捕获长距离、多方面的域时空模式。我们在 4 个真实世界的流量数据集中进行了广泛的实验，以证明与 18 种基线方法相比，我们的方法超越了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种结合动态图卷积和注意力融合的模型，用于提升交通流量预测的准确性。 Xunlian Luo,Chunjiang Zhu,Detian Zhang,Qing Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Siddharth Ancha,Gaurav Pathak,Ji Zhang,Srinivasa Narasimhan,David Held
title: Active Velocity Estimation using Light Curtains via Self-Supervised Multi-Armed Bandits
title_zh: 通过自监督多臂老虎机使用光幕进行主动速度估计
abstract: To navigate in an environment safely and autonomously, robots must accurately estimate where obstacles are and how they move. Instead of using expensive traditional 3D sensors, we explore the use of a much cheaper, faster, and higher resolution alternative: programmable light curtains. Light curtains are a controllable depth sensor that sense only along a surface that the user selects. We adapt a probabilistic method based on particle filters and occupancy grids to explicitly estimate the position and velocity of 3D points in the scene using partial measurements made by light curtains. The central challenge is to decide where to place the light curtain to accurately perform this task. We propose multiple curtain placement strategies guided by maximizing information gain and verifying predicted object locations. Then, we combine these strategies using an online learning framework. We propose a novel self-supervised reward function that evaluates the accuracy of current velocity estimates using future light curtain placements. We use a multi-armed bandit framework to intelligently switch between placement policies in real time, outperforming fixed policies. We develop a full-stack navigation system that uses position and velocity estimates from light curtains for downstream tasks such as localization, mapping, path-planning, and obstacle avoidance. This work paves the way for controllable light curtains to accurately, efficiently, and purposefully perceive and navigate complex and dynamic environments. Project website: https://siddancha.github.io/projects/active-velocity-estimation/

abstract_zh: 为了在环境中安全、自主地导航，机器人必须准确估计障碍物的位置以及它们的移动方式。我们没有使用昂贵的传统 3D 传感器，而是探索使用更便宜、更快、更高分辨率的替代方案：可编程光幕。光幕是一种可控深度传感器，仅沿着用户选择的表面进行感应。我们采用基于粒子滤波器和占用网格的概率方法，使用光幕进行的部分测量来明确估计场景中 3D 点的位置和速度。核心挑战是决定将光幕放置在哪里以准确地执行此任务。我们提出了多种窗帘放置策略，以最大化信息增益和验证预测的对象位置为指导。然后，我们使用在线学习框架结合这些策略。我们提出了一种新颖的自我监督奖励函数，该函数使用未来的光幕放置来评估当前速度估计的准确性。我们使用多臂老虎机框架来实时智能地切换放置策略，优于固定策略。我们开发了一个全栈导航系统，该系统使用光幕的位置和速度估计来执行定位、测绘、路径规划和避障等下游任务。这项工作为可控光幕准确、高效、有目的地感知和导航复杂动态环境铺平了道路。项目网站：https://siddancha.github.io/projects/active-velocity-estimation/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光幕和自监督多臂老虎机框架的主动速度估计方法，用于机器人导航中的障碍物检测与运动预测。
AI.motivation: 传统3D传感器成本高，而光幕作为低成本替代方案，需解决如何有效放置以准确估计障碍物位置和速度的问题。
AI.method: 采用粒子滤波和占用网格估计3D点的位置和速度，结合最大化信息增益的策略，并使用自监督奖励函数与多臂老虎机框架实时切换光幕放置策略。
AI.result: 实现了高效导航系统，优于固定策略，在动态环境中准确感知和避障。
AI.conclusion: 本工作展示了可控光幕在复杂动态环境中的高效感知与导航潜力，为低成本机器人应用提供了新方法。

authors_text: Iztok Fister Jr.,Iztok Fister,Dušan Fister,Vili Podgorelec,Sancho Salcedo-Sanz
title: A comprehensive review of visualization methods for association rule mining: Taxonomy, Challenges, Open problems and Future ideas
title_zh: 关联规则挖掘可视化方法的全面回顾：分类、挑战、开放问题和未来想法
abstract: Association rule mining is intended for searching for the relationships between attributes in transaction databases. The whole process of rule discovery is very complex, and involves pre-processing techniques, a rule mining step, and post-processing, in which visualization is carried out. Visualization of discovered association rules is an essential step within the whole association rule mining pipeline, to enhance the understanding of users on the results of rule mining. Several association rule mining and visualization methods have been developed during the past decades. This review paper aims to create a literature review, identify the main techniques published in peer-reviewed literature, examine each method's main features, and present the main applications in the field. Defining the future steps of this research area is another goal of this review paper.
summary: Association rule mining is intended for searching for the relationships between attributes in transaction databases. The whole process of rule discovery is very complex, and involves pre-processing techniques, a rule mining step, and post-processing, in which visualization is carried out. Visualization of discovered association rules is an essential step within the whole association rule mining pipeline, to enhance the understanding of users on the results of rule mining. Several association rule mining and visualization methods have been developed during the past decades. This review paper aims to create a literature review, identify the main techniques published in peer-reviewed literature, examine each method's main features, and present the main applications in the field. Defining the future steps of this research area is another goal of this review paper.
abstract_zh: 关联规则挖掘旨在搜索事务数据库中属性之间的关系。规则发现的整个过程非常复杂，涉及预处理技术、规则挖掘步骤以及进行可视化的后处理。发现的关联规则的可视化是整个关联规则挖掘流程中的重要步骤，以增强用户对规则挖掘结果的理解。在过去的几十年里，已经开发了几种关联规则挖掘和可视化方法。本文旨在进行文献综述，确定同行评审文献中发表的主要技术，检查每种方法的主要特征，并介绍该领域的主要应用。定义该研究领域的未来步骤是本文的另一个目标。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾关联规则挖掘的可视化方法，分类现有技术并探讨挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有关联规则挖掘可视化方法缺乏系统性分类与比较，且存在诸多未解决的挑战和开放问题。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分类总结主流可视化技术，分析其特征、应用场景及局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 构建了可视化方法分类体系，总结了典型技术与应用案例，明确了当前挑战如动态数据处理、交互性不足等，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 可视化对关联规则挖掘至关重要，未来需关注动态数据支持、交互式工具开发及标准化评估指标的建立。

authors_text: Torsten Schlett,Sebastian Schachner,Christian Rathgeb,Juan Tapia,Christoph Busch
title: Effect of Lossy Compression Algorithms on Face Image Quality and Recognition
title_zh: 有损压缩算法对人脸图像质量和识别的影响
abstract: Lossy face image compression can degrade the image quality and the utility for the purpose of face recognition. This work investigates the effect of lossy image compression on a state-of-the-art face recognition model, and on multiple face image quality assessment models. The analysis is conducted over a range of specific image target sizes. Four compression types are considered, namely JPEG, JPEG 2000, downscaled PNG, and notably the new JPEG XL format. Frontal color images from the ColorFERET database were used in a Region Of Interest (ROI) variant and a portrait variant. We primarily conclude that JPEG XL allows for superior mean and worst case face recognition performance especially at lower target sizes, below approximately 5kB for the ROI variant, while there appears to be no critical advantage among the compression types at higher target sizes. Quality assessments from modern models correlate well overall with the compression effect on face recognition performance.
summary: Lossy face image compression can degrade the image quality and the utility for the purpose of face recognition. This work investigates the effect of lossy image compression on a state-of-the-art face recognition model, and on multiple face image quality assessment models. The analysis is conducted over a range of specific image target sizes. Four compression types are considered, namely JPEG, JPEG 2000, downscaled PNG, and notably the new JPEG XL format. Frontal color images from the ColorFERET database were used in a Region Of Interest (ROI) variant and a portrait variant. We primarily conclude that JPEG XL allows for superior mean and worst case face recognition performance especially at lower target sizes, below approximately 5kB for the ROI variant, while there appears to be no critical advantage among the compression types at higher target sizes. Quality assessments from modern models correlate well overall with the compression effect on face recognition performance.
abstract_zh: 有损人脸图像压缩会降低图像质量和人脸识别的实用性。这项工作研究了有损图像压缩对最先进的人脸识别模型以及多个人脸图像质量评估模型的影响。该分析是在一系列特定图像目标尺寸上进行的。考虑了四种压缩类型，即 JPEG、JPEG 2000、缩小比例的 PNG，尤其是新的 JPEG XL 格式。来自 ColorFERET 数据库的正面彩色图像用于感兴趣区域 (ROI) 变体和肖像变体。我们的主要结论是，JPEG XL 可以实现卓越的平均和最坏情况人脸识别性能，尤其是在较低的目标大小（ROI 变体低于约 5kB）的情况下，而在较高目标大小的压缩类型中似乎没有关键优势。现代模型的质量评估总体上与人脸识别性能的压缩效果密切相关。

AI.tldr: 研究损压缩算法对人脸图像质量及识别性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 分析损压缩算法如何影响人脸识别模型和图像质量评估模型的表现，以优化压缩参数和格式选择。
AI.method: 在ColorFERET数据库的ROI和肖像变体图像上，对比JPEG、JPEG 2000、降采样PNG和JPEG XL四种压缩算法在不同目标尺寸下的性能。
AI.result: JPEG XL在低目标尺寸（ROI变体约5kB以下）下表现最优，而高目标尺寸下各算法差异不显著。现代质量评估模型与识别性能相关性较高。
AI.conclusion: JPEG XL适合小尺寸压缩场景，但大尺寸下其他格式无明显劣势，图像质量评估可有效预测识别性能。

search_text: Effect of Lossy Compression Algorithms on Face Image Quality and Recognition 有损压缩算法对人脸图像质量和识别的影响 Lossy face image compression can degrade the image quality and the utility for the purpose of face recognition. This work investigates the effect of lossy image compression on a state-of-the-art face recognition model, and on multiple face image quality assessment models. The analysis is conducted over a range of specific image target sizes. Four compression types are considered, namely JPEG, JPEG 2000, downscaled PNG, and notably the new JPEG XL format. Frontal color images from the ColorFERET database were used in a Region Of Interest (ROI) variant and a portrait variant. We primarily conclude that JPEG XL allows for superior mean and worst case face recognition performance especially at lower target sizes, below approximately 5kB for the ROI variant, while there appears to be no critical advantage among the compression types at higher target sizes. Quality assessments from modern models correlate well overall with the compression effect on face recognition performance. 有损人脸图像压缩会降低图像质量和人脸识别的实用性。这项工作研究了有损图像压缩对最先进的人脸识别模型以及多个人脸图像质量评估模型的影响。该分析是在一系列特定图像目标尺寸上进行的。考虑了四种压缩类型，即 JPEG、JPEG 2000、缩小比例的 PNG，尤其是新的 JPEG XL 格式。来自 ColorFERET 数据库的正面彩色图像用于感兴趣区域 (ROI) 变体和肖像变体。我们的主要结论是，JPEG XL 可以实现卓越的平均和最坏情况人脸识别性能，尤其是在较低的目标大小（ROI 变体低于约 5kB）的情况下，而在较高目标大小的压缩类型中似乎没有关键优势。现代模型的质量评估总体上与人脸识别性能的压缩效果密切相关。 研究损压缩算法对人脸图像质量及识别性能的影响。 Torsten Schlett,Sebastian Schachner,Christian Rathgeb,Juan Tapia,Christoph Busch cs.CV

authors_text: Liang Wang,Zhuangkun Wei,Weisi Guo
title: Securing IoT Communication using Physical Sensor Data -- Graph Layer Security with Federated Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用物理传感器数据保护物联网通信 - 通过联合多代理深度强化学习实现图形层安全
abstract: Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices are often used to transmit physical sensor data over digital wireless channels. Traditional Physical Layer Security (PLS)-based cryptography approaches rely on accurate channel estimation and information exchange for key generation, which irrevocably ties key quality with digital channel estimation quality. Recently, we proposed a new concept called Graph Layer Security (GLS), where digital keys are derived from physical sensor readings. The sensor readings between legitimate users are correlated through a common background infrastructure environment (e.g., a common water distribution network or electric grid). The challenge for GLS has been how to achieve distributed key generation. This paper presents a Federated multi-agent Deep reinforcement learning-assisted Distributed Key generation scheme (FD2K), which fully exploits the common features of physical dynamics to establish secret key between legitimate users. We present for the first time initial experimental results of GLS with federated learning, achieving considerable security performance in terms of key agreement rate (KAR), and key randomness.
summary: Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices are often used to transmit physical sensor data over digital wireless channels. Traditional Physical Layer Security (PLS)-based cryptography approaches rely on accurate channel estimation and information exchange for key generation, which irrevocably ties key quality with digital channel estimation quality. Recently, we proposed a new concept called Graph Layer Security (GLS), where digital keys are derived from physical sensor readings. The sensor readings between legitimate users are correlated through a common background infrastructure environment (e.g., a common water distribution network or electric grid). The challenge for GLS has been how to achieve distributed key generation. This paper presents a Federated multi-agent Deep reinforcement learning-assisted Distributed Key generation scheme (FD2K), which fully exploits the common features of physical dynamics to establish secret key between legitimate users. We present for the first time initial experimental results of GLS with federated learning, achieving considerable security performance in terms of key agreement rate (KAR), and key randomness.
abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 设备通常用于通过数字无线通道传输物理传感器数据。传统的基于物理层安全 (PLS) 的加密方法依赖于准确的信道估计和信息交换来生成密钥，这将密钥质量与数字信道估计质量不可撤销地联系在一起。最近，我们提出了一个称为图形层安全性（GLS）的新概念，其中数字密钥源自物理传感器读数。合法用户之间的传感器读数通过公共后台基础设施环境（例如公共供水网络或电网）进行关联。 GLS 面临的挑战是如何实现分布式密钥生成。本文提出了一种联合多智能体深度强化学习辅助的分布式密钥生成方案（FD2K），该方案充分利用物理动力学的共同特征在合法用户之间建立密钥。我们首次展示了采用联邦学习的 GLS 的初步实验结果，在密钥一致率 (KAR) 和密钥随机性方面实现了相当大的安全性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图层安全（GLS）和联邦多智能体深度强化学习的分布式密钥生成方案（FD2K），用于提升物联网通信的安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统物理层安全方法依赖数字信道估计，密钥质量受信道影响较大；而GLS利用物理传感器数据生成密钥，但需解决分布式场景下的密钥生成难题。
AI.method: 设计联邦多智能体深度强化学习框架（FD2K），通过联邦学习整合多设备物理动态特征，结合深度强化学习实现分布式密钥协商。
AI.result: 实验验证了FD2K在密钥协议率（KAR）和密钥随机性方面的有效性，证明其可提供较高安全性能。
AI.conclusion: FD2K方案成功实现了GLS在分布式物联网环境中的应用，为物理传感器数据驱动的密钥生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vivien Zahs,Katharina Anders,Julia Kohns,Alexander Stark,Bernhard Höfle
title: Classification of structural building damage grades from multi-temporal photogrammetric point clouds using a machine learning model trained on virtual laser scanning data
title_zh: 使用基于虚拟激光扫描数据训练的机器学习模型，根据多时相摄影测量点云对结构建筑损坏等级进行分类
abstract: Automatic damage assessment based on UAV-derived 3D point clouds can provide fast information on the damage situation after an earthquake. However, the assessment of multiple damage grades is challenging due to the variety in damage patterns and limited transferability of existing methods to other geographic regions or data sources. We present a novel approach to automatically assess multi-class building damage from real-world multi-temporal point clouds using a machine learning model trained on virtual laser scanning (VLS) data. We (1) identify object-specific change features, (2) separate changed and unchanged building parts, (3) train a random forest machine learning model with VLS data based on object-specific change features, and (4) use the classifier to assess building damage in real-world point clouds from photogrammetry-based dense image matching (DIM). We evaluate classifiers trained on different input data with respect to their capacity to classify three damage grades (heavy, extreme, destruction) in pre- and post-event DIM point clouds of a real earthquake event. Our approach is transferable with respect to multi-source input point clouds used for training (VLS) and application (DIM) of the model. We further achieve geographic transferability of the model by training it on simulated data of geometric change which characterises relevant damage grades across different geographic regions. The model yields high multi-target classification accuracies (overall accuracy: 92.0% - 95.1%). Its performance improves only slightly when using real-world region-specific training data (< 3% higher overall accuracies) and when using real-world region-specific training data (< 2% higher overall accuracies). We consider our approach relevant for applications where timely information on the damage situation is required and sufficient real-world training data is not available.
summary: Automatic damage assessment based on UAV-derived 3D point clouds can provide fast information on the damage situation after an earthquake. However, the assessment of multiple damage grades is challenging due to the variety in damage patterns and limited transferability of existing methods to other geographic regions or data sources. We present a novel approach to automatically assess multi-class building damage from real-world multi-temporal point clouds using a machine learning model trained on virtual laser scanning (VLS) data. We (1) identify object-specific change features, (2) separate changed and unchanged building parts, (3) train a random forest machine learning model with VLS data based on object-specific change features, and (4) use the classifier to assess building damage in real-world point clouds from photogrammetry-based dense image matching (DIM). We evaluate classifiers trained on different input data with respect to their capacity to classify three damage grades (heavy, extreme, destruction) in pre- and post-event DIM point clouds of a real earthquake event. Our approach is transferable with respect to multi-source input point clouds used for training (VLS) and application (DIM) of the model. We further achieve geographic transferability of the model by training it on simulated data of geometric change which characterises relevant damage grades across different geographic regions. The model yields high multi-target classification accuracies (overall accuracy: 92.0% - 95.1%). Its performance improves only slightly when using real-world region-specific training data (< 3% higher overall accuracies) and when using real-world region-specific training data (< 2% higher overall accuracies). We consider our approach relevant for applications where timely information on the damage situation is required and sufficient real-world training data is not available.
abstract_zh: 基于无人机衍生的 3D 点云的自动损坏评估可以快速提供有关地震后损坏情况的信息。然而，由于损坏模式的多样性以及现有方法向其他地理区域或数据源的可移植性有限，对多个损坏等级的评估具有挑战性。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，使用基于虚拟激光扫描（VLS）数据训练的机器学习模型，自动评估现实世界多时相点云的多类建筑损坏。我们 (1) 识别特定于对象的变化特征，(2) 分离已更改和未更改的建筑部分，(3) 使用基于特定于对象的变化特征的 VLS 数据训练随机森林机器学习模型，以及 (4) 使用分类器通过基于摄影测量的密集图像匹配 (DIM) 来评估现实世界点云中的建筑物损坏。我们评估了根据不同输入数据训练的分类器对真实地震事件的事件前和事件后 DIM 点云中的三个损坏等级（重度、极端、破坏）进行分类的能力。我们的方法对于用于模型训练（VLS）和应用（DIM）的多源输入点云是可转移的。我们通过几何变化的模拟数据进行训练，进一步实现了模型的地理可转移性，几何变化的模拟数据表征了不同地理区域的相关损害等级。该模型具有较高的多目标分类精度（总体精度：92.0% - 95.1%）。当使用现实世界特定区域的训练数据（总体精度提高 < 3%）和使用现实世界特定区域的训练数据（总体精度提高 < 2%）时，其性能仅略有提高。我们认为我们的方法适用于需要及时了解损坏情况但无法获得足够的真实训练数据的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟激光扫描数据训练的机器学习模型，用于从多时相摄影测量点云中自动分类建筑物结构损伤等级。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多等级损伤评估中面临损伤模式多样性和跨地区/数据源迁移性不足的挑战，需开发适用于不同地理区域且无需大量真实训练数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过提取对象特定变化特征、分离损毁与未损毁建筑部分，利用虚拟激光扫描数据训练随机森林模型，并应用于真实摄影测量点云的损伤分类。
AI.result: 模型在真实地震事件点云中实现高多目标分类准确率（总体准确率92.0%-95.1%），使用真实区域数据训练时性能提升不足3%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于急需损伤信息且缺乏足够真实训练数据的场景，具有跨数据源和地理区域的迁移能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟激光扫描数据训练的机器学习模型，用于从多时相摄影测量点云中自动分类建筑物结构损伤等级。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在多等级损伤评估中面临损伤模式多样性和跨地区/数据源迁移性不足的挑战，需开发适用于不同地理区域且无需大量真实训练数据的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 通过提取对象特定变化特征、分离损毁与未损毁建筑部分，利用虚拟激光扫描数据训练随机森林模型，并应用于真实摄影测量点云的损伤分类。
ai_content.result: 模型在真实地震事件点云中实现高多目标分类准确率（总体准确率92.0%-95.1%），使用真实区域数据训练时性能提升不足3%。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法适用于急需损伤信息且缺乏足够真实训练数据的场景，具有跨数据源和地理区域的迁移能力。

search_text: Classification of structural building damage grades from multi-temporal photogrammetric point clouds using a machine learning model trained on virtual laser scanning data 使用基于虚拟激光扫描数据训练的机器学习模型，根据多时相摄影测量点云对结构建筑损坏等级进行分类 Automatic damage assessment based on UAV-derived 3D point clouds can provide fast information on the damage situation after an earthquake. However, the assessment of multiple damage grades is challenging due to the variety in damage patterns and limited transferability of existing methods to other geographic regions or data sources. We present a novel approach to automatically assess multi-class building damage from real-world multi-temporal point clouds using a machine learning model trained on virtual laser scanning (VLS) data. We (1) identify object-specific change features, (2) separate changed and unchanged building parts, (3) train a random forest machine learning model with VLS data based on object-specific change features, and (4) use the classifier to assess building damage in real-world point clouds from photogrammetry-based dense image matching (DIM). We evaluate classifiers trained on different input data with respect to their capacity to classify three damage grades (heavy, extreme, destruction) in pre- and post-event DIM point clouds of a real earthquake event. Our approach is transferable with respect to multi-source input point clouds used for training (VLS) and application (DIM) of the model. We further achieve geographic transferability of the model by training it on simulated data of geometric change which characterises relevant damage grades across different geographic regions. The model yields high multi-target classification accuracies (overall accuracy: 92.0% - 95.1%). Its performance improves only slightly when using real-world region-specific training data (< 3% higher overall accuracies) and when using real-world region-specific training data (< 2% higher overall accuracies). We consider our approach relevant for applications where timely information on the damage situation is required and sufficient real-world training data is not available. 基于无人机衍生的 3D 点云的自动损坏评估可以快速提供有关地震后损坏情况的信息。然而，由于损坏模式的多样性以及现有方法向其他地理区域或数据源的可移植性有限，对多个损坏等级的评估具有挑战性。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，使用基于虚拟激光扫描（VLS）数据训练的机器学习模型，自动评估现实世界多时相点云的多类建筑损坏。我们 (1) 识别特定于对象的变化特征，(2) 分离已更改和未更改的建筑部分，(3) 使用基于特定于对象的变化特征的 VLS 数据训练随机森林机器学习模型，以及 (4) 使用分类器通过基于摄影测量的密集图像匹配 (DIM) 来评估现实世界点云中的建筑物损坏。我们评估了根据不同输入数据训练的分类器对真实地震事件的事件前和事件后 DIM 点云中的三个损坏等级（重度、极端、破坏）进行分类的能力。我们的方法对于用于模型训练（VLS）和应用（DIM）的多源输入点云是可转移的。我们通过几何变化的模拟数据进行训练，进一步实现了模型的地理可转移性，几何变化的模拟数据表征了不同地理区域的相关损害等级。该模型具有较高的多目标分类精度（总体精度：92.0% - 95.1%）。当使用现实世界特定区域的训练数据（总体精度提高 < 3%）和使用现实世界特定区域的训练数据（总体精度提高 < 2%）时，其性能仅略有提高。我们认为我们的方法适用于需要及时了解损坏情况但无法获得足够的真实训练数据的应用。 本文提出一种基于虚拟激光扫描数据训练的机器学习模型，用于从多时相摄影测量点云中自动分类建筑物结构损伤等级。 Vivien Zahs,Katharina Anders,Julia Kohns,Alexander Stark,Bernhard Höfle cs.CV

authors_text: Arindam Das,Sudip Das,Ganesh Sistu,Jonathan Horgan,Ujjwal Bhattacharya,Edward Jones,Martin Glavin,Ciarán Eising
title: Revisiting Modality Imbalance In Multimodal Pedestrian Detection
title_zh: 重新审视多模态行人检测中的模态不平衡
abstract: Multimodal learning, particularly for pedestrian detection, has recently received emphasis due to its capability to function equally well in several critical autonomous driving scenarios such as low-light, night-time, and adverse weather conditions. However, in most cases, the training distribution largely emphasizes the contribution of one specific input that makes the network biased towards one modality. Hence, the generalization of such models becomes a significant problem where the non-dominant input modality during training could be contributing more to the course of inference. Here, we introduce a novel training setup with regularizer in the multimodal architecture to resolve the problem of this disparity between the modalities. Specifically, our regularizer term helps to make the feature fusion method more robust by considering both the feature extractors equivalently important during the training to extract the multimodal distribution which is referred to as removing the imbalance problem. Furthermore, our decoupling concept of output stream helps the detection task by sharing the spatial sensitive information mutually. Extensive experiments of the proposed method on KAIST and UTokyo datasets shows improvement of the respective state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Multimodal learning, particularly for pedestrian detection, has recently received emphasis due to its capability to function equally well in several critical autonomous driving scenarios such as low-light, night-time, and adverse weather conditions. However, in most cases, the training distribution largely emphasizes the contribution of one specific input that makes the network biased towards one modality. Hence, the generalization of such models becomes a significant problem where the non-dominant input modality during training could be contributing more to the course of inference. Here, we introduce a novel training setup with regularizer in the multimodal architecture to resolve the problem of this disparity between the modalities. Specifically, our regularizer term helps to make the feature fusion method more robust by considering both the feature extractors equivalently important during the training to extract the multimodal distribution which is referred to as removing the imbalance problem. Furthermore, our decoupling concept of output stream helps the detection task by sharing the spatial sensitive information mutually. Extensive experiments of the proposed method on KAIST and UTokyo datasets shows improvement of the respective state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 多模态学习，特别是行人检测，最近受到了重视，因为它能够在弱光、夜间和恶劣天气条件等几种关键的自动驾驶场景中同样发挥作用。然而，在大多数情况下，训练分布很大程度上强调一种特定输入的贡献，这使得网络偏向于一种模式。因此，此类模型的泛化成为一个重要问题，其中训练期间的非主导输入模态可能对推理过程做出更多贡献。在这里，我们在多模态架构中引入了一种带有正则化器的新颖训练设置，以解决模态之间的这种差异问题。具体来说，我们的正则化项通过在训练过程中考虑两个特征提取器同等重要来提取多模态分布（称为消除不平衡问题），从而有助于使特征融合方法更加稳健。此外，我们的输出流解耦概念通过相互共享空间敏感信息来帮助检测任务。该方法在 KAIST 和 UTokyo 数据集上的广泛实验显示了各自最先进性能的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态行人检测中的模态不平衡问题，提出了一种新的训练框架和正则化方法，以提升模型在不同模态输入下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在训练中过度依赖单一模态数据，导致在推理时对非主导模态的适应性不足，影响复杂场景下的检测性能。
AI.method: 设计正则化项使特征提取器在训练中对多模态特征同等重视，并通过解耦输出流共享空间敏感信息以增强特征融合效果。
AI.result: 在KAIST和UTokyo数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多项指标上优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了多模态间的不平衡问题，显著提升了恶劣环境下的行人检测鲁棒性。

Hence, the generalization of such models becomes a significant problem where the non-dominant input modality during training could be contributing more to the course of inference. Specifically, our regularizer term helps to make the feature fusion method more robust by considering both the feature extractors equivalently important during the training to extract the multimodal distribution which is referred to as removing the imbalance problem. authors_text: Savvas Papaioannou,Panayiotis Kolios,Theocharis Theocharides,Christos G. Panayiotou,Marios M. Polycarpou
title: 3D Trajectory Planning for UAV-based Search Missions: An Integrated Assessment and Search Planning Approach
title_zh: 基于无人机的搜索任务的 3D 轨迹规划：综合评估和搜索规划方法
comment: 2021 International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS)
comments: 2021 International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS)
abstract: The ability to efficiently plan and execute search missions in challenging and complex environments during natural and man-made disasters is imperative. In many emergency situations, precise navigation between obstacles and time-efficient searching around 3D structures is essential for finding survivors. In this work we propose an integrated assessment and search planning approach which allows an autonomous UAV (unmanned aerial vehicle) agent to plan and execute collision-free search trajectories in 3D environments. More specifically, the proposed search-planning framework aims to integrate and automate the first two phases (i.e., the assessment phase and the search phase) of a traditional search-and-rescue (SAR) mission. In the first stage, termed assessment-planning we aim to find a high-level assessment plan which the UAV agent can execute in order to visit a set of points of interest. The generated plan of this stage guides the UAV to fly over the objects of interest thus providing a first assessment of the situation at hand. In the second stage, termed search-planning, the UAV trajectory is further fine-tuned to allow the UAV to search in 3D (i.e., across all faces) the objects of interest for survivors. The performance of the proposed approach is demonstrated through extensive simulation analysis.
summary: The ability to efficiently plan and execute search missions in challenging and complex environments during natural and man-made disasters is imperative. In many emergency situations, precise navigation between obstacles and time-efficient searching around 3D structures is essential for finding survivors. In this work we propose an integrated assessment and search planning approach which allows an autonomous UAV (unmanned aerial vehicle) agent to plan and execute collision-free search trajectories in 3D environments. More specifically, the proposed search-planning framework aims to integrate and automate the first two phases (i.e., the assessment phase and the search phase) of a traditional search-and-rescue (SAR) mission. In the first stage, termed assessment-planning we aim to find a high-level assessment plan which the UAV agent can execute in order to visit a set of points of interest. The generated plan of this stage guides the UAV to fly over the objects of interest thus providing a first assessment of the situation at hand. In the second stage, termed search-planning, the UAV trajectory is further fine-tuned to allow the UAV to search in 3D (i.e., across all faces) the objects of interest for survivors. The performance of the proposed approach is demonstrated through extensive simulation analysis.
abstract_zh: 在自然灾害和人为灾害期间，必须能够在充满挑战和复杂的环境中有效规划和执行搜索任务。在许多紧急情况下，障碍物之间的精确导航以及围绕 3D 结构的省时搜索对于寻找幸存者至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种综合评估和搜索规划方法，该方法允许自主 UAV（无人驾驶飞行器）代理在 3D 环境中规划和执行无碰撞搜索轨迹。更具体地说，所提出的搜索规划框架旨在集成和自动化传统搜索救援（SAR）任务的前两个阶段（即评估阶段和搜索阶段）。在第一阶段，称为评估规划，我们的目标是找到一个高级评估计划，无人机代理可以执行该计划以访问一组兴趣点。此阶段生成的计划引导无人机飞越感兴趣的物体，从而提供对当前情况的初步评估。在第二阶段（称为搜索规划）中，无人机轨迹被进一步微调，以允许无人机以 3D 方式（即跨所有面）搜索幸存者感兴趣的物体。通过广泛的模拟分析证明了所提出方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成评估与搜索规划方法，用于无人机在复杂三维环境中的自主避障搜索轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 在自然灾害和人为灾难中，无人机需要高效规划三维路径以快速搜索幸存者，传统方法存在评估与搜索阶段分离导致效率低下的问题。
AI.method: 分两阶段框架：第一阶段生成高层评估计划以访问关键点，第二阶段优化三维轨迹实现全方位搜索，通过仿真验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明该方法能生成无碰撞的三维搜索路径，显著提升复杂环境中无人机搜索效率与自主性。
AI.conclusion: 集成化规划框架有效融合了评估与搜索阶段，为无人机在灾难救援中的实际应用提供了可行的技术方案。

ai_content_json.method: 分两阶段框架：第一阶段生成高层评估计划以访问关键点，第二阶段优化三维轨迹实现全方位搜索，通过仿真验证方法有效性。
ai_content_json.result: 仿真结果表明该方法能生成无碰撞的三维搜索路径，显著提升复杂环境中无人机搜索效率与自主性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 集成化规划框架有效融合了评估与搜索阶段，为无人机在灾难救援中的实际应用提供了可行的技术方案。

search_text: 3D Trajectory Planning for UAV-based Search Missions: An Integrated Assessment and Search Planning Approach 基于无人机的搜索任务的 3D 轨迹规划：综合评估和搜索规划方法 The ability to efficiently plan and execute search missions in challenging and complex environments during natural and man-made disasters is imperative. In many emergency situations, precise navigation between obstacles and time-efficient searching around 3D structures is essential for finding survivors. In this work we propose an integrated assessment and search planning approach which allows an autonomous UAV (unmanned aerial vehicle) agent to plan and execute collision-free search trajectories in 3D environments. More specifically, the proposed search-planning framework aims to integrate and automate the first two phases (i.e., the assessment phase and the search phase) of a traditional search-and-rescue (SAR) mission. In the first stage, termed assessment-planning we aim to find a high-level assessment plan which the UAV agent can execute in order to visit a set of points of interest. The generated plan of this stage guides the UAV to fly over the objects of interest thus providing a first assessment of the situation at hand. In the second stage, termed search-planning, the UAV trajectory is further fine-tuned to allow the UAV to search in 3D (i.e., across all faces) the objects of interest for survivors. The performance of the proposed approach is demonstrated through extensive simulation analysis. 在自然灾害和人为灾害期间，必须能够在充满挑战和复杂的环境中有效规划和执行搜索任务。在许多紧急情况下，障碍物之间的精确导航以及围绕 3D 结构的省时搜索对于寻找幸存者至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种综合评估和搜索规划方法，该方法允许自主 UAV（无人驾驶飞行器）代理在 3D 环境中规划和执行无碰撞搜索轨迹。更具体地说，所提出的搜索规划框架旨在集成和自动化传统搜索救援（SAR）任务的前两个阶段（即评估阶段和搜索阶段）。在第一阶段，称为评估规划，我们的目标是找到一个高级评估计划，无人机代理可以执行该计划以访问一组兴趣点。此阶段生成的计划引导无人机飞越感兴趣的物体，从而提供对当前情况的初步评估。在第二阶段（称为搜索规划）中，无人机轨迹被进一步微调，以允许无人机以 3D 方式（即跨所有面）搜索幸存者感兴趣的物体。通过广泛的模拟分析证明了所提出方法的性能。 本文提出了一种集成评估与搜索规划方法，用于无人机在复杂三维环境中的自主避障搜索轨迹规划。 Savvas Papaioannou,Panayiotis Kolios,Theocharis Theocharides,Christos G. Panayiotou,Marios M. Polycarpou cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Hengzhi Xue,Qingqing Fang,Yudong Yao,Yueyang Teng
title: 3D PETCT Tumor Lesion Segmentation via GCN Refinement
title_zh: 通过 GCN 细化进行 3D PETCT 肿瘤病灶分割
abstract: Whole-body PET/CT scan is an important tool for diagnosing various malignancies (e.g., malignant melanoma, lymphoma, or lung cancer), and accurate segmentation of tumors is a key part for subsequent treatment. In recent years, CNN-based segmentation methods have been extensively investigated. However, these methods often give inaccurate segmentation results, such as over-segmentation and under-segmentation. Therefore, to address such issues, we propose a post-processing method based on a graph convolutional neural network (GCN) to refine inaccurate segmentation parts and improve the overall segmentation accuracy. Firstly, nnUNet is used as an initial segmentation framework, and the uncertainty in the segmentation results is analyzed. Certainty and uncertainty nodes establish the nodes of a graph neural network. Each node and its 6 neighbors form an edge, and 32 nodes are randomly selected for uncertain nodes to form edges. The highly uncertain nodes are taken as the subsequent refinement targets. Secondly, the nnUNet result of the certainty nodes is used as label to form a semi-supervised graph network problem, and the uncertainty part is optimized through training the GCN network to improve the segmentation performance. This describes our proposed nnUNet-GCN segmentation framework. We perform tumor segmentation experiments on the PET/CT dataset in the MICCIA2022 autoPET challenge. Among them, 30 cases are randomly selected for testing, and the experimental results show that the false positive rate is effectively reduced with nnUNet-GCN refinement. In quantitative analysis, there is an improvement of 2.12 % on the average Dice score, 6.34 on 95 % Hausdorff Distance (HD95), and 1.72 on average symmetric surface distance (ASSD). The quantitative and qualitative evaluation results show that GCN post-processing methods can effectively improve tumor segmentation performance.
summary: Whole-body PET/CT scan is an important tool for diagnosing various malignancies (e.g., malignant melanoma, lymphoma, or lung cancer), and accurate segmentation of tumors is a key part for subsequent treatment. In recent years, CNN-based segmentation methods have been extensively investigated. However, these methods often give inaccurate segmentation results, such as over-segmentation and under-segmentation. Therefore, to address such issues, we propose a post-processing method based on a graph convolutional neural network (GCN) to refine inaccurate segmentation parts and improve the overall segmentation accuracy. Firstly, nnUNet is used as an initial segmentation framework, and the uncertainty in the segmentation results is analyzed. Certainty and uncertainty nodes establish the nodes of a graph neural network. Each node and its 6 neighbors form an edge, and 32 nodes are randomly selected for uncertain nodes to form edges. The highly uncertain nodes are taken as the subsequent refinement targets. Secondly, the nnUNet result of the certainty nodes is used as label to form a semi-supervised graph network problem, and the uncertainty part is optimized through training the GCN network to improve the segmentation performance. This describes our proposed nnUNet-GCN segmentation framework. We perform tumor segmentation experiments on the PET/CT dataset in the MICCIA2022 autoPET challenge. Among them, 30 cases are randomly selected for testing, and the experimental results show that the false positive rate is effectively reduced with nnUNet-GCN refinement. In quantitative analysis, there is an improvement of 2.12 % on the average Dice score, 6.34 on 95 % Hausdorff Distance (HD95), and 1.72 on average symmetric surface distance (ASSD). The quantitative and qualitative evaluation results show that GCN post-processing methods can effectively improve tumor segmentation performance.
abstract_zh: 全身PET/CT扫描是诊断各种恶性肿瘤（例如恶性黑色素瘤、淋巴瘤或肺癌）的重要工具，而肿瘤的准确分割是后续治疗的关键部分。近年来，基于 CNN 的分割方法得到了广泛的研究。然而，这些方法常常给出不准确的分割结果，例如过度分割和欠分割。因此，为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于图卷积神经网络（GCN）的后处理方法，以细化不准确的分割部分并提高整体分割精度。首先，使用nnUNet作为初始分割框架，分析分割结果的不确定性。确定性和不确定性节点建立图神经网络的节点。每个节点与其6个邻居形成一条边，对于不确定的节点随机选择32个节点形成边。将高度不确定的节点作为后续的细化目标。其次，将确定性节点的nnUNet结果作为标签，形成半监督图网络问题，通过训练GCN网络来优化不确定性部分，提高分割性能。这描述了我们提出的 nnUNet-GCN 分割框架。我们在 MICCIA2022 autoPET 挑战赛中的 PET/CT 数据集上进行肿瘤分割实验。其中，随机选取30个案例进行测试，实验结果表明，通过nnUNet-GCN细化，误报率得到有效降低。在定量分析中，平均 Dice 得分提高了 2.12%，95% Hausdorff 距离 (HD95) 提高了 6.34，平均对称表面距离 (ASSD) 提高了 1.72。定量和定性评价结果表明GCN后处理方法可以有效提高肿瘤分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的后处理方法，用于改进3D PET/CT肿瘤病灶分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN分割方法存在过度分割和欠分割问题，导致肿瘤分割不准确，需通过GCN后处理优化不确定区域。
AI.method: 以nnUNet为初始分割框架，分析分割不确定性，构建包含确定性和不确定性的图节点，利用GCN对不确定区域进行半监督优化。
AI.result: 在MICCIA2022数据集上，Dice分数提升2.12%，HD95降低6.34，ASSD减少1.72，显著降低假阳性率。
AI.conclusion: GCN后处理有效提升肿瘤分割性能，尤其在优化不确定区域方面表现突出。

authors_text: Benjamin Doerr,Aymen Echarghaoui,Mohammed Jamal,Martin S. Krejca
title: Lasting Diversity and Superior Runtime Guarantees for the $(μ+1)$ Genetic Algorithm
title_zh: $(μ+1)$遗传算法的持久多样性和卓越的运行时间保证
abstract: Most evolutionary algorithms (EAs) used in practice employ crossover. In contrast, only for few and mostly artificial examples a runtime advantage from crossover could be proven with mathematical means. The most convincing such result shows that the $(μ+1)$ genetic algorithm (GA) with population size $μ=O(n)$ optimizes jump functions with gap size $k \ge 3$ in time $O(n^k / μ+ n^{k-1}\log n)$, beating the $Θ(n^k)$ runtime of many mutation-based EAs. This result builds on a proof that the GA occasionally and then for an expected number of $Ω(μ^2)$ iterations has a population that is not dominated by a single genotype. In this work, we show that this diversity persist with high probability for a time exponential in $μ$ (instead of quadratic). From this better understanding of the population diversity, we obtain stronger runtime guarantees, among them the statement that for all $c\ln(n)\leμ\le n/\log n$, with $c$ a suitable constant, the runtime of the $(μ+1)$ GA on $\mathrm{Jump}_k$, with $k \ge 3$, is $O(n^{k-1})$. Consequently, already with logarithmic population sizes, the GA gains a speed-up of order $Ω(n)$ from crossover.
summary: Most evolutionary algorithms (EAs) used in practice employ crossover. In contrast, only for few and mostly artificial examples a runtime advantage from crossover could be proven with mathematical means. The most convincing such result shows that the $(μ+1)$ genetic algorithm (GA) with population size $μ=O(n)$ optimizes jump functions with gap size $k \ge 3$ in time $O(n^k / μ+ n^{k-1}\log n)$, beating the $Θ(n^k)$ runtime of many mutation-based EAs. This result builds on a proof that the GA occasionally and then for an expected number of $Ω(μ^2)$ iterations has a population that is not dominated by a single genotype. In this work, we show that this diversity persist with high probability for a time exponential in $μ$ (instead of quadratic). From this better understanding of the population diversity, we obtain stronger runtime guarantees, among them the statement that for all $c\ln(n)\leμ\le n/\log n$, with $c$ a suitable constant, the runtime of the $(μ+1)$ GA on $\mathrm{Jump}_k$, with $k \ge 3$, is $O(n^{k-1})$. Consequently, already with logarithmic population sizes, the GA gains a speed-up of order $Ω(n)$ from crossover.
abstract_zh: 实践中使用的大多数进化算法（EA）都采用交叉。相比之下，只有少数且大多数是人为的示例才能通过数学方法证明交叉带来的运行时优势。最令人信服的结果表明，群体大小为 $μ=O(n)$ 的 $(μ+1)$ 遗传算法 (GA) 在 $O(n^k / μ+ n^{k-1}\log n)$ 时间内优化了间隙大小为 $k \ge 3$ 的跳跃函数，击败了许多基于突变的 EA 的 $θ(n^k)$ 运行时间。这一结果建立在这样一个证明之上，即 GA 偶尔会在预期的 $Ω(μ^2)$ 迭代次数中出现一个不受单一基因型支配的群体。在这项工作中，我们证明这种多样性以 $μ$ 为时间指数（而不是二次）的概率很高。通过对种群多样性的更好理解，我们获得了更强的运行时间保证，其中的陈述是，对于所有 $c\ln(n)\leμ\le n/\log n$，其中 $c$ 是一个合适的常数，$(μ+1)$ GA 在 $\mathrm{Jump}_k$ 上的运行时间，$k \ge 3$，为 $O(n^{k-1})$。因此，在群体规模达到对数的情况下，遗传算法通过交叉获得了 $Ω(n)$ 量级的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了$(μ+1)$遗传算法在跳跃函数上的运行时间，证明交叉操作能带来显著的加速效果。
AI.motivation: 已有理论只能证明遗传算法在少数人工问题上交叉优于突变，而对交叉优势的理解尚不充分，尤其种群多样性的持续时间仅知为二次期望，本文旨在揭示多样性实际可指数级持续，从而获得更强的运行时间保证。
AI.method: 通过更精细的概率分析，证明了种群多样性（不被单一基因型主导）以高概率持续指数级长的时间（而非之前已知的二次期望），并基于此导出新的运行时间上界。
AI.result: 证明了对于$k \ge 3$的Jump_k函数，当种群规模$μ$在$c\ln(n)$到$n/\log n$之间时，$(μ+1)$ GA的运行时间为$O(n^{k-1})$，相比突变类算法的$Θ(n^k)$实现了$Ω(n)$的加速。
AI.conclusion: 即使仅使用对数规模的种群，遗传算法也能通过交叉获得显著的加速优势，这为交叉在实际进化算法中的有效性提供了更强的理论支持。

search_text: Lasting Diversity and Superior Runtime Guarantees for the $(μ+1)$ Genetic Algorithm $(μ+1)$遗传算法的持久多样性和卓越的运行时间保证 Most evolutionary algorithms (EAs) used in practice employ crossover. In contrast, only for few and mostly artificial examples a runtime advantage from crossover could be proven with mathematical means. The most convincing such result shows that the $(μ+1)$ genetic algorithm (GA) with population size $μ=O(n)$ optimizes jump functions with gap size $k \ge 3$ in time $O(n^k / μ+ n^{k-1}\log n)$, beating the $Θ(n^k)$ runtime of many mutation-based EAs. This result builds on a proof that the GA occasionally and then for an expected number of $Ω(μ^2)$ iterations has a population that is not dominated by a single genotype. In this work, we show that this diversity persist with high probability for a time exponential in $μ$ (instead of quadratic). From this better understanding of the population diversity, we obtain stronger runtime guarantees, among them the statement that for all $c\ln(n)\leμ\le n/\log n$, with $c$ a suitable constant, the runtime of the $(μ+1)$ GA on $\mathrm{Jump}_k$, with $k \ge 3$, is $O(n^{k-1})$. Consequently, already with logarithmic population sizes, the GA gains a speed-up of order $Ω(n)$ from crossover. 实践中使用的大多数进化算法（EA）都采用交叉。相比之下，只有少数且大多数是人为的示例才能通过数学方法证明交叉带来的运行时优势。最令人信服的结果表明，群体大小为 $μ=O(n)$ 的 $(μ+1)$ 遗传算法 (GA) 在 $O(n^k / μ+ n^{k-1}\log n)$ 时间内优化了间隙大小为 $k \ge 3$ 的跳跃函数，击败了许多基于突变的 EA 的 $θ(n^k)$ 运行时间。这一结果建立在这样一个证明之上，即 GA 偶尔会在预期的 $Ω(μ^2)$ 迭代次数中出现一个不受单一基因型支配的群体。在这项工作中，我们证明这种多样性以 $μ$ 为时间指数（而不是二次）的概率很高。通过对种群多样性的更好理解，我们获得了更强的运行时间保证，其中的陈述是，对于所有 $c\ln(n)\leμ\le n/\log n$，其中 $c$ 是一个合适的常数，$(μ+1)$ GA 在 $\mathrm{Jump}_k$ 上的运行时间，$k \ge 3$，为 $O(n^{k-1})$。因此，在群体规模达到对数的情况下，遗传算法通过交叉获得了 $Ω(n)$ 量级的加速。 本文研究了$(μ+1)$遗传算法在跳跃函数上的运行时间，证明交叉操作能带来显著的加速效果。 Benjamin Doerr,Aymen Echarghaoui,Mohammed Jamal,Martin S. Krejca cs.NE

authors_text: Liesbeth Allein,Marlon Saelens,Ruben Cartuyvels,Marie-Francine Moens
title: Implicit Temporal Reasoning for Evidence-Based Fact-Checking
title_zh: 基于证据的事实检查的隐式时间推理
comment: The 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL 2023, Findings)
comments: The 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL 2023, Findings)
abstract: Leveraging contextual knowledge has become standard practice in automated claim verification, yet the impact of temporal reasoning has been largely overlooked. Our study demonstrates that time positively influences the claim verification process of evidence-based fact-checking. The temporal aspects and relations between claims and evidence are first established through grounding on shared timelines, which are constructed using publication dates and time expressions extracted from their text. Temporal information is then provided to RNN-based and Transformer-based classifiers before or after claim and evidence encoding. Our time-aware fact-checking models surpass base models by up to 9% Micro F1 (64.17%) and 15% Macro F1 (47.43%) on the MultiFC dataset. They also outperform prior methods that explicitly model temporal relations between evidence. Our findings show that the presence of temporal information and the manner in which timelines are constructed greatly influence how fact-checking models determine the relevance and supporting or refuting character of evidence documents.
summary: Leveraging contextual knowledge has become standard practice in automated claim verification, yet the impact of temporal reasoning has been largely overlooked. Our study demonstrates that time positively influences the claim verification process of evidence-based fact-checking. The temporal aspects and relations between claims and evidence are first established through grounding on shared timelines, which are constructed using publication dates and time expressions extracted from their text. Temporal information is then provided to RNN-based and Transformer-based classifiers before or after claim and evidence encoding. Our time-aware fact-checking models surpass base models by up to 9% Micro F1 (64.17%) and 15% Macro F1 (47.43%) on the MultiFC dataset. They also outperform prior methods that explicitly model temporal relations between evidence. Our findings show that the presence of temporal information and the manner in which timelines are constructed greatly influence how fact-checking models determine the relevance and supporting or refuting character of evidence documents.
abstract_zh: 利用上下文知识已成为自动索赔验证的标准做法，但时间推理的影响在很大程度上被忽视了。我们的研究表明，时间对基于证据的事实核查的索赔验证过程产生积极影响。主张和证据之间的时间方面和关系首先是通过基于共享时间线来建立的，这些时间线是使用从文本中提取的出版日期和时间表达来构建的。然后，在声明和证据编码之前或之后，将时间信息提供给基于 RNN 和基于 Transformer 的分类器。在 MultiFC 数据集上，我们的时间感知事实检查模型比基本模型高出高达 9% Micro F1 (64.17%) 和 15% Macro F1 (47.43%)。它们还优于先前明确模拟证据之间时间关系的方法。我们的研究结果表明，时间信息的存在以及时间线的构建方式极大地影响了事实核查模型如何确定证据文件的相关性以及支持或反驳的特征。

AI.tldr: 研究时间信息在基于证据的事实核查中的作用，并提出时间感知模型以提高验证效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分考虑时间因素，而时间信息对事实核查的准确性有重要影响。
AI.method: 构建共享时间线并提取时间信息，将其输入RNN和Transformer分类器进行事实核查。
AI.result: 模型在MultiFC数据集上Micro F1提升9%（64.17%），Macro F1提升15%（47.43%），优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间信息的存在及时间线构建方式显著影响事实核查模型对证据相关性和支持性的判断。

ai_content.conclusion: 时间信息的存在及时间线构建方式显著影响事实核查模型对证据相关性和支持性的判断。
