authors_text: Jwalin Bhatt,Yaroslav Zharov,Sungho Suh,Tilo Baumbach,Vincent Heuveline,Paul Lukowicz
title: A Knowledge Distillation framework for Multi-Organ Segmentation of Medaka Fish in Tomographic Image
title_zh: 层析图像中青鳉鱼多器官分割的知识蒸馏框架
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging 2023 (ISBI 2023)
comments: Accepted at IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging 2023 (ISBI 2023)
abstract: Morphological atlases are an important tool in organismal studies, and modern high-throughput Computed Tomography (CT) facilities can produce hundreds of full-body high-resolution volumetric images of organisms. However, creating an atlas from these volumes requires accurate organ segmentation. In the last decade, machine learning approaches have achieved incredible results in image segmentation tasks, but they require large amounts of annotated data for training. In this paper, we propose a self-training framework for multi-organ segmentation in tomographic images of Medaka fish. We utilize the pseudo-labeled data from a pretrained Teacher model and adopt a Quality Classifier to refine the pseudo-labeled data. Then, we introduce a pixel-wise knowledge distillation method to prevent overfitting to the pseudo-labeled data and improve the segmentation performance. The experimental results demonstrate that our method improves mean Intersection over Union (IoU) by 5.9% on the full dataset and enables keeping the quality while using three times less markup.
summary: Morphological atlases are an important tool in organismal studies, and modern high-throughput Computed Tomography (CT) facilities can produce hundreds of full-body high-resolution volumetric images of organisms. However, creating an atlas from these volumes requires accurate organ segmentation. In the last decade, machine learning approaches have achieved incredible results in image segmentation tasks, but they require large amounts of annotated data for training. In this paper, we propose a self-training framework for multi-organ segmentation in tomographic images of Medaka fish. We utilize the pseudo-labeled data from a pretrained Teacher model and adopt a Quality Classifier to refine the pseudo-labeled data. Then, we introduce a pixel-wise knowledge distillation method to prevent overfitting to the pseudo-labeled data and improve the segmentation performance. The experimental results demonstrate that our method improves mean Intersection over Union (IoU) by 5.9% on the full dataset and enables keeping the quality while using three times less markup.
abstract_zh: 形态图谱是生物体研究的重要工具，现代高通量计算机断层扫描 (CT) 设施可以生成数百个生物体的全身高分辨率体积图像。然而，从这些体积创建图谱需要准确的器官分割。在过去的十年中，机器学习方法在图像分割任务中取得了令人难以置信的成果，但它们需要大量带注释的数据进行训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于青鳉鱼断层图像多器官分割的自训练框架。我们利用来自预训练教师模型的伪标记数据，并采用质量分类器来细化伪标记数据。然后，我们引入了逐像素知识蒸馏方法，以防止对伪标记数据的过度拟合并提高分割性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法将完整数据集的平均交并集 (IoU) 提高了 5.9%，并且能够在使用更少三倍标记的同时保持质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的多器官分割框架，用于斑马鱼断层扫描图像的自动分割。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法需要大量标注数据进行训练，而创建形态图谱需要高精度的器官分割，因此需要减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 利用预训练教师模型生成伪标签数据，并通过质量分类器优化伪标签，再结合像素级知识蒸馏方法防止过拟合并提升分割性能。
AI.result: 在完整数据集上平均交并比（IoU）提升5.9%，同时将标注数据量减少至原来的三分之一。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低了标注数据依赖性，在保持分割质量的同时提升了效率，适用于高通量断层扫描图像分析。

authors_text: Christian Haase,Christoph Hertrich,Georg Loho
title: Lower Bounds on the Depth of Integral ReLU Neural Networks via Lattice Polytopes
title_zh: 通过格子多面体的积分 ReLU 神经网络深度的下界
abstract: We prove that the set of functions representable by ReLU neural networks with integer weights strictly increases with the network depth while allowing arbitrary width. More precisely, we show that $\lceil\log_2(n)\rceil$ hidden layers are indeed necessary to compute the maximum of $n$ numbers, matching known upper bounds. Our results are based on the known duality between neural networks and Newton polytopes via tropical geometry. The integrality assumption implies that these Newton polytopes are lattice polytopes. Then, our depth lower bounds follow from a parity argument on the normalized volume of faces of such polytopes.
summary: We prove that the set of functions representable by ReLU neural networks with integer weights strictly increases with the network depth while allowing arbitrary width. More precisely, we show that $\lceil\log_2(n)\rceil$ hidden layers are indeed necessary to compute the maximum of $n$ numbers, matching known upper bounds. Our results are based on the known duality between neural networks and Newton polytopes via tropical geometry. The integrality assumption implies that these Newton polytopes are lattice polytopes. Then, our depth lower bounds follow from a parity argument on the normalized volume of faces of such polytopes.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，具有整数权重的 ReLU 神经网络可表示的函数集严格随网络深度增加，同时允许任意宽度。更准确地说，我们表明 $\lceil\log_2(n)\rceil$ 隐藏层确实是计算 $n$ 个数字的最大值所必需的，与已知的上限相匹配。我们的结果基于神经网络和牛顿多胞体之间通过热带几何已知的对偶性。完整性假设意味着这些牛顿多胞体是晶格多胞体。然后，我们的深度下限是根据此类多面体面的归一化体积的奇偶性论证得出的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过晶格多面体证明整数权重ReLU神经网络的深度下界，确定计算n个数最大值需要⌈log₂(n)⌉层隐藏层。
AI.motivation: 理解ReLU神经网络深度与表达能力的关系，特别是在整数权重约束下的必要深度，有助于指导网络设计与理论分析。
AI.method: 基于神经网络与牛顿多面体的对偶性，利用热带几何将问题转化为晶格多面体的归一化体积奇偶性论证。
AI.result: 严格证明计算n个数最大值需要⌈log₂(n)⌉层隐藏层，与已知上界一致，建立深度下界理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何方法揭示神经网络深度与多面体结构的关联，为深度学习理论提供了新的分析视角和数学工具。

authors_text: Cunjuan Zhu,Qi Jia,Wei Chen,Yanming Guo,Yu Liu
title: Deep Learning for Video-Text Retrieval: a Review
title_zh: 用于视频文本检索的深度学习：回顾
comment: International Journal of Multimedia Information Retrieval (IJMIR)
comments: International Journal of Multimedia Information Retrieval (IJMIR)
abstract: Video-Text Retrieval (VTR) aims to search for the most relevant video related to the semantics in a given sentence, and vice versa. In general, this retrieval task is composed of four successive steps: video and textual feature representation extraction, feature embedding and matching, and objective functions. In the last, a list of samples retrieved from the dataset is ranked based on their matching similarities to the query. In recent years, significant and flourishing progress has been achieved by deep learning techniques, however, VTR is still a challenging task due to the problems like how to learn an efficient spatial-temporal video feature and how to narrow the cross-modal gap. In this survey, we review and summarize over 100 research papers related to VTR, demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on several commonly benchmarked datasets, and discuss potential challenges and directions, with the expectation to provide some insights for researchers in the field of video-text retrieval.
summary: Video-Text Retrieval (VTR) aims to search for the most relevant video related to the semantics in a given sentence, and vice versa. In general, this retrieval task is composed of four successive steps: video and textual feature representation extraction, feature embedding and matching, and objective functions. In the last, a list of samples retrieved from the dataset is ranked based on their matching similarities to the query. In recent years, significant and flourishing progress has been achieved by deep learning techniques, however, VTR is still a challenging task due to the problems like how to learn an efficient spatial-temporal video feature and how to narrow the cross-modal gap. In this survey, we review and summarize over 100 research papers related to VTR, demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on several commonly benchmarked datasets, and discuss potential challenges and directions, with the expectation to provide some insights for researchers in the field of video-text retrieval.
abstract_zh: 视频文本检索（VTR）旨在搜索与给定句子中的语义最相关的视频，反之亦然。一般来说，该检索任务由四个连续步骤组成：视频和文本特征表示提取、特征嵌入和匹配以及目标函数。最后，从数据集中检索到的样本列表根据它们与查询的匹配相似度进行排名。近年来，深度学习技术取得了显着且蓬勃的进展，然而，由于如何学习有效的时空视频特征以及如何缩小跨模态差距等问题，VTR仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本次调查中，我们回顾和总结了 100 多篇与 VTR 相关的研究论文，展示了在几个常用基准数据集上的最先进的性能，并讨论了潜在的挑战和方向，希望为视频文本检索领域的研究人员提供一些见解。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在视频-文本检索领域的研究进展，分析了现有方法的挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习推动了视频-文本检索的发展，但时空特征学习与跨模态语义鸿沟仍是核心难题，需系统总结现有研究以指导未来工作。
AI.method: 通过回顾100余篇文献，归纳方法框架，评估最新算法在基准数据集上的性能，并分析技术瓶颈与改进方向。
AI.result: 总结了特征提取、跨模态匹配等关键技术，揭示了当前方法在处理长时序依赖与语义对齐中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了视频-文本检索性能，但需进一步探索高效时空建模与跨模态表示学习以突破现有瓶颈。

search_text: Deep Learning for Video-Text Retrieval: a Review 用于视频文本检索的深度学习：回顾 Video-Text Retrieval (VTR) aims to search for the most relevant video related to the semantics in a given sentence, and vice versa. In general, this retrieval task is composed of four successive steps: video and textual feature representation extraction, feature embedding and matching, and objective functions. In the last, a list of samples retrieved from the dataset is ranked based on their matching similarities to the query. In recent years, significant and flourishing progress has been achieved by deep learning techniques, however, VTR is still a challenging task due to the problems like how to learn an efficient spatial-temporal video feature and how to narrow the cross-modal gap. In this survey, we review and summarize over 100 research papers related to VTR, demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on several commonly benchmarked datasets, and discuss potential challenges and directions, with the expectation to provide some insights for researchers in the field of video-text retrieval. 视频文本检索（VTR）旨在搜索与给定句子中的语义最相关的视频，反之亦然。一般来说，该检索任务由四个连续步骤组成：视频和文本特征表示提取、特征嵌入和匹配以及目标函数。最后，从数据集中检索到的样本列表根据它们与查询的匹配相似度进行排名。近年来，深度学习技术取得了显着且蓬勃的进展，然而，由于如何学习有效的时空视频特征以及如何缩小跨模态差距等问题，VTR仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本次调查中，我们回顾和总结了 100 多篇与 VTR 相关的研究论文，展示了在几个常用基准数据集上的最先进的性能，并讨论了潜在的挑战和方向，希望为视频文本检索领域的研究人员提供一些见解。 本文综述了深度学习在视频-文本检索领域的研究进展，分析了现有方法的挑战与未来方向。 Cunjuan Zhu,Qi Jia,Wei Chen,Yanming Guo,Yu Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Mattie Fellows,Matthew J. A. Smith,Shimon Whiteson
title: Why Target Networks Stabilise Temporal Difference Methods
title_zh: 为什么目标网络稳定时间差分方法
comment: Found a small error in Appendix (Proposition 1, Appendix B3, penultimate line) that affects results presented in the original submission. These have been fixed and this version is the one accepted at ICML 2023
comments: Found a small error in Appendix (Proposition 1, Appendix B3, penultimate line) that affects results presented in the original submission. These have been fixed and this version is the one accepted at ICML 2023
abstract: Integral to recent successes in deep reinforcement learning has been a class of temporal difference methods that use infrequently updated target values for policy evaluation in a Markov Decision Process. Yet a complete theoretical explanation for the effectiveness of target networks remains elusive. In this work, we provide an analysis of this popular class of algorithms, to finally answer the question: `why do target networks stabilise TD learning'? To do so, we formalise the notion of a partially fitted policy evaluation method, which describes the use of target networks and bridges the gap between fitted methods and semigradient temporal difference algorithms. Using this framework we are able to uniquely characterise the so-called deadly triad - the use of TD updates with (nonlinear) function approximation and off-policy data - which often leads to nonconvergent algorithms. This insight leads us to conclude that the use of target networks can mitigate the effects of poor conditioning in the Jacobian of the TD update. Instead, we show that under mild regularity conditions and a well tuned target network update frequency, convergence can be guaranteed even in the extremely challenging off-policy sampling and nonlinear function approximation setting.
summary: Integral to recent successes in deep reinforcement learning has been a class of temporal difference methods that use infrequently updated target values for policy evaluation in a Markov Decision Process. Yet a complete theoretical explanation for the effectiveness of target networks remains elusive. In this work, we provide an analysis of this popular class of algorithms, to finally answer the question: `why do target networks stabilise TD learning'? To do so, we formalise the notion of a partially fitted policy evaluation method, which describes the use of target networks and bridges the gap between fitted methods and semigradient temporal difference algorithms. Using this framework we are able to uniquely characterise the so-called deadly triad - the use of TD updates with (nonlinear) function approximation and off-policy data - which often leads to nonconvergent algorithms. This insight leads us to conclude that the use of target networks can mitigate the effects of poor conditioning in the Jacobian of the TD update. Instead, we show that under mild regularity conditions and a well tuned target network update frequency, convergence can be guaranteed even in the extremely challenging off-policy sampling and nonlinear function approximation setting.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习最近取得的成功不可或缺的是一类时间差分方法，该方法使用不经常更新的目标值在马尔可夫决策过程中进行策略评估。然而，对目标网络有效性的完整理论解释仍然难以捉摸。在这项工作中，我们对这类流行的算法进行了分析，以最终回答这个问题：“为什么目标网络能够稳定 TD 学习”？为此，我们形式化了部分拟合策略评估方法的概念，该方法描述了目标网络的使用并弥合了拟合方法和半梯度时间差分算法之间的差距。使用这个框架，我们能够独特地描述所谓的致命三元组 - 使用 TD 更新与（非线性）函数逼近和离策略数据 - 这通常会导致算法不收敛。这一见解使我们得出结论，使用目标网络可以减轻 TD 更新的雅可比行列式中不良调节的影响。相反，我们表明，在温和的规律性条件和良好调整的目标网络更新频率下，即使在极具挑战性的离策略采样和非线性函数逼近设置中也可以保证收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文分析目标网络为何能稳定时间差分方法，通过提出部分拟合策略评估框架，解释目标网络如何缓解TD学习中的不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管目标网络在深度强化学习中广泛应用，但其理论解释尚不完整，尤其无法解释其稳定TD学习的机制，因此需要系统分析其作用原理。
AI.method: 提出部分拟合策略评估方法，建立目标网络与半梯度TD算法的联系，分析'致命三元组'问题，并探讨目标网络对雅可比矩阵条件的改善作用。
AI.result: 证明在适当调整目标网络更新频率的条件下，即使面对非策略采样和非线性函数逼近的挑战，算法仍可保证收敛。
AI.conclusion: 目标网络通过缓解TD更新雅可比矩阵的病态条件，有效稳定学习过程，其合理更新频率是确保收敛的关键因素。

result: 证明在适当调整目标网络更新频率的条件下，即使面对非策略采样和非线性函数逼近的挑战，算法仍可保证收敛。
conclusion: 目标网络通过缓解TD更新雅可比矩阵的病态条件，有效稳定学习过程，其合理更新频率是确保收敛的关键因素。
search_text: Why Target Networks Stabilise Temporal Difference Methods 为什么目标网络稳定时间差分方法 Integral to recent successes in deep reinforcement learning has been a class of temporal difference methods that use infrequently updated target values for policy evaluation in a Markov Decision Process. Yet a complete theoretical explanation for the effectiveness of target networks remains elusive. In this work, we provide an analysis of this popular class of algorithms, to finally answer the question: `why do target networks stabilise TD learning'? To do so, we formalise the notion of a partially fitted policy evaluation method, which describes the use of target networks and bridges the gap between fitted methods and semigradient temporal difference algorithms. Using this framework we are able to uniquely characterise the so-called deadly triad - the use of TD updates with (nonlinear) function approximation and off-policy data - which often leads to nonconvergent algorithms. This insight leads us to conclude that the use of target networks can mitigate the effects of poor conditioning in the Jacobian of the TD update. Instead, we show that under mild regularity conditions and a well tuned target network update frequency, convergence can be guaranteed even in the extremely challenging off-policy sampling and nonlinear function approximation setting. 深度强化学习最近取得的成功不可或缺的是一类时间差分方法，该方法使用不经常更新的目标值在马尔可夫决策过程中进行策略评估。然而，对目标网络有效性的完整理论解释仍然难以捉摸。在这项工作中，我们对这类流行的算法进行了分析，以最终回答这个问题：“为什么目标网络能够稳定 TD 学习”？为此，我们形式化了部分拟合策略评估方法的概念，该方法描述了目标网络的使用并弥合了拟合方法和半梯度时间差分算法之间的差距。使用这个框架，我们能够独特地描述所谓的致命三元组 - 使用 TD 更新与（非线性）函数逼近和离策略数据 - 这通常会导致算法不收敛。这一见解使我们得出结论，使用目标网络可以减轻 TD 更新的雅可比行列式中不良调节的影响。相反，我们表明，在温和的规律性条件和良好调整的目标网络更新频率下，即使在极具挑战性的离策略采样和非线性函数逼近设置中也可以保证收敛。 本文分析目标网络为何能稳定时间差分方法，通过提出部分拟合策略评估框架，解释目标网络如何缓解TD学习中的不稳定性问题。 Mattie Fellows,Matthew J. A. Smith,Shimon Whiteson cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nguyen Duc Thuan,Hoang Si Hong
title: HUST bearing: a practical dataset for ball bearing fault diagnosis
title_zh: HUST轴承：滚珠轴承故障诊断的实用数据集
comment: We are considering some issues in the paper
comments: We are considering some issues in the paper
abstract: In this work, we introduce a practical dataset named HUST bearing, that provides a large set of vibration data on different ball bearings. This dataset contains 90 raw vibration data of 6 types of defects (inner crack, outer crack, ball crack, and their 2-combinations) on 5 types of bearing at 3 working conditions with the sample rate of 51,200 samples per second. We established the envelope analysis and order tracking analysis on the introduced dataset to allow an initial evaluation of the data. A number of classical machine learning classification methods are used to identify bearing faults of the dataset using features in different domains. The typical advanced unsupervised transfer learning algorithms also perform to observe the transferability of knowledge among parts of the dataset. The experimental results of examined methods on the dataset gain divergent accuracy up to 100% on classification task and 60-80% on unsupervised transfer learning task.
summary: In this work, we introduce a practical dataset named HUST bearing, that provides a large set of vibration data on different ball bearings. This dataset contains 90 raw vibration data of 6 types of defects (inner crack, outer crack, ball crack, and their 2-combinations) on 5 types of bearing at 3 working conditions with the sample rate of 51,200 samples per second. We established the envelope analysis and order tracking analysis on the introduced dataset to allow an initial evaluation of the data. A number of classical machine learning classification methods are used to identify bearing faults of the dataset using features in different domains. The typical advanced unsupervised transfer learning algorithms also perform to observe the transferability of knowledge among parts of the dataset. The experimental results of examined methods on the dataset gain divergent accuracy up to 100% on classification task and 60-80% on unsupervised transfer learning task.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了一个名为 HUSTbearing 的实用数据集，它提供了大量不同滚珠轴承的振动数据。该数据集包含 5 种轴承在 3 个工况下 6 种缺陷（内裂纹、外裂纹、球裂纹及其 2 种组合）的 90 个原始振动数据，采样率为 51,200 个样本/秒。我们对引入的数据集建立了包络分析和阶次跟踪分析，以便对数据进行初步评估。许多经典的机器学习分类方法用于利用不同领域的特征来识别数据集的轴承故障。典型的高级无监督迁移学习算法还可以观察数据集各部分之间知识的可迁移性。数据集上检查方法的实验结果在分类任务上获得了高达 100% 的不同准确度，在无监督迁移学习任务上获得了 60-80% 的分歧准确度。

AI.tldr: 介绍一个用于滚动轴承故障诊断的实用数据集HUST bearing，并评估其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏实际应用中的多样性和复杂性，需提供更全面的振动数据以支持故障诊断方法研究。
AI.method: 采用包络分析和阶次跟踪分析进行数据评估，结合经典机器学习及无监督迁移学习算法进行故障分类与知识迁移实验。
AI.result: 分类任务准确率最高达100%，无监督迁移学习任务准确率在60-80%之间。
AI.conclusion: HUST bearing数据集有效支持多种故障诊断方法的测试，有助于推动轴承故障检测技术发展。

authors_text: Bin Liu,Xiaolin Wei,Bo Li,Junjie Cao,Yu-Kun Lai
title: Pose-Controllable 3D Facial Animation Synthesis using Hierarchical Audio-Vertex Attention
title_zh: 使用分层音频顶点注意力的姿势可控 3D 面部动画合成
abstract: Most of the existing audio-driven 3D facial animation methods suffered from the lack of detailed facial expression and head pose, resulting in unsatisfactory experience of human-robot interaction. In this paper, a novel pose-controllable 3D facial animation synthesis method is proposed by utilizing hierarchical audio-vertex attention. To synthesize real and detailed expression, a hierarchical decomposition strategy is proposed to encode the audio signal into both a global latent feature and a local vertex-wise control feature. Then the local and global audio features combined with vertex spatial features are used to predict the final consistent facial animation via a graph convolutional neural network by fusing the intrinsic spatial topology structure of the face model and the corresponding semantic feature of the audio. To accomplish pose-controllable animation, we introduce a novel pose attribute augmentation method by utilizing the 2D talking face technique. Experimental results indicate that the proposed method can produce more realistic facial expressions and head posture movements. Qualitative and quantitative experiments show that the proposed method achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Most of the existing audio-driven 3D facial animation methods suffered from the lack of detailed facial expression and head pose, resulting in unsatisfactory experience of human-robot interaction. In this paper, a novel pose-controllable 3D facial animation synthesis method is proposed by utilizing hierarchical audio-vertex attention. To synthesize real and detailed expression, a hierarchical decomposition strategy is proposed to encode the audio signal into both a global latent feature and a local vertex-wise control feature. Then the local and global audio features combined with vertex spatial features are used to predict the final consistent facial animation via a graph convolutional neural network by fusing the intrinsic spatial topology structure of the face model and the corresponding semantic feature of the audio. To accomplish pose-controllable animation, we introduce a novel pose attribute augmentation method by utilizing the 2D talking face technique. Experimental results indicate that the proposed method can produce more realistic facial expressions and head posture movements. Qualitative and quantitative experiments show that the proposed method achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 现有的大多数音频驱动的3D面部动画方法都缺乏详细的面部表情和头部姿势，导致人机交互体验不理想。本文提出了一种利用分层音频顶点注意力的新型姿势可控 3D 面部动画合成方法。为了合成真实和详细的表达，提出了一种分层分解策略，将音频信号编码为全局潜在特征和局部顶点控制特征。然后，通过融合面部模型的内在空间拓扑结构和音频的相应语义特征，将局部和全局音频特征与顶点空间特征相结合，通过图卷积神经网络来预测最终一致的面部动画。为了实现姿势可控动画，我们利用 2D 说话脸部技术引入了一种新颖的姿势属性增强方法。实验结果表明，该方法可以产生更真实的面部表情和头部姿势运动。定性和定量实验表明，所提出的方法与最先进的方法相比具有竞争性的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层音频-顶点注意力的可控制3D面部动画合成方法，以提升人机交互中的面部表情和头部姿态的真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动的3D面部动画方法缺乏细节表情和头部姿态控制，导致人机交互体验不佳，需改进以实现更自然的动画效果。
AI.method: 通过分层分解策略将音频信号编码为全局潜在特征和局部顶点控制特征，并结合顶点空间特征与图卷积网络融合面部模型拓扑结构及音频语义特征，引入2D talking face技术实现姿态控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成更逼真的面部表情和头部运动，定性和定量结果均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了3D面部动画的细节表现力和姿态可控性，为高质量人机交互提供了新思路。

authors_text: Carlos E. Luis,Alessandro G. Bottero,Julia Vinogradska,Felix Berkenkamp,Jan Peters
title: Model-Based Uncertainty in Value Functions
title_zh: 价值函数中基于模型的不确定性
abstract: We consider the problem of quantifying uncertainty over expected cumulative rewards in model-based reinforcement learning. In particular, we focus on characterizing the variance over values induced by a distribution over MDPs. Previous work upper bounds the posterior variance over values by solving a so-called uncertainty Bellman equation, but the over-approximation may result in inefficient exploration. We propose a new uncertainty Bellman equation whose solution converges to the true posterior variance over values and explicitly characterizes the gap in previous work. Moreover, our uncertainty quantification technique is easily integrated into common exploration strategies and scales naturally beyond the tabular setting by using standard deep reinforcement learning architectures. Experiments in difficult exploration tasks, both in tabular and continuous control settings, show that our sharper uncertainty estimates improve sample-efficiency.
summary: We consider the problem of quantifying uncertainty over expected cumulative rewards in model-based reinforcement learning. In particular, we focus on characterizing the variance over values induced by a distribution over MDPs. Previous work upper bounds the posterior variance over values by solving a so-called uncertainty Bellman equation, but the over-approximation may result in inefficient exploration. We propose a new uncertainty Bellman equation whose solution converges to the true posterior variance over values and explicitly characterizes the gap in previous work. Moreover, our uncertainty quantification technique is easily integrated into common exploration strategies and scales naturally beyond the tabular setting by using standard deep reinforcement learning architectures. Experiments in difficult exploration tasks, both in tabular and continuous control settings, show that our sharper uncertainty estimates improve sample-efficiency.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在基于模型的强化学习中量化预期累积奖励的不确定性问题。特别是，我们专注于表征由 MDP 分布引起的值的方差。先前的工作通过求解所谓的不确定性贝尔曼方程来确定值的后验方差的上限，但过度逼近可能会导致探索效率低下。我们提出了一个新的不确定性贝尔曼方程，其解收敛于值的真实后验方差，并明确地表征了先前工作中的差距。此外，我们的不确定性量化技术可以轻松集成到常见的探索策略中，并通过使用标准的深度强化学习架构自然地扩展到表格设置之外。在表格和连续控制设置中进行的困难探索任务的实验表明，我们更清晰的不确定性估计可以提高样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究模型基于强化学习中值函数的不确定性量化问题，提出新的不确定贝尔曼方程以改进现有方法的估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过不确定性贝尔曼方程上界后验方差可能导致探索效率低下，需更精确的不确定性估计方法。
AI.method: 提出新的不确定贝尔曼方程，其解收敛至真实后验方差，并结合深度强化学习架构实现非表格场景扩展。

search_text: Model-Based Uncertainty in Value Functions 价值函数中基于模型的不确定性 We consider the problem of quantifying uncertainty over expected cumulative rewards in model-based reinforcement learning. In particular, we focus on characterizing the variance over values induced by a distribution over MDPs. Previous work upper bounds the posterior variance over values by solving a so-called uncertainty Bellman equation, but the over-approximation may result in inefficient exploration. We propose a new uncertainty Bellman equation whose solution converges to the true posterior variance over values and explicitly characterizes the gap in previous work. Moreover, our uncertainty quantification technique is easily integrated into common exploration strategies and scales naturally beyond the tabular setting by using standard deep reinforcement learning architectures. Experiments in difficult exploration tasks, both in tabular and continuous control settings, show that our sharper uncertainty estimates improve sample-efficiency. 我们考虑在基于模型的强化学习中量化预期累积奖励的不确定性问题。特别是，我们专注于表征由 MDP 分布引起的值的方差。先前的工作通过求解所谓的不确定性贝尔曼方程来确定值的后验方差的上限，但过度逼近可能会导致探索效率低下。我们提出了一个新的不确定性贝尔曼方程，其解收敛于值的真实后验方差，并明确地表征了先前工作中的差距。此外，我们的不确定性量化技术可以轻松集成到常见的探索策略中，并通过使用标准的深度强化学习架构自然地扩展到表格设置之外。在表格和连续控制设置中进行的困难探索任务的实验表明，我们更清晰的不确定性估计可以提高样本效率。 本文研究模型基于强化学习中值函数的不确定性量化问题，提出新的不确定贝尔曼方程以改进现有方法的估计精度。 Carlos E. Luis,Alessandro G. Bottero,Julia Vinogradska,Felix Berkenkamp,Jan Peters cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Xuefeng Wang,Xinran Li,Jiawei Shao,Jun Zhang
title: AC2C: Adaptively Controlled Two-Hop Communication for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: AC2C：用于多智能体强化学习的自适应控制两跳通信
abstract: Learning communication strategies in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has recently attracted intensive attention. Early studies typically assumed a fully-connected communication topology among agents, which induces high communication costs and may not be feasible. Some recent works have developed adaptive communication strategies to reduce communication overhead, but these methods cannot effectively obtain valuable information from agents that are beyond the communication range. In this paper, we consider a realistic communication model where each agent has a limited communication range, and the communication topology dynamically changes. To facilitate effective agent communication, we propose a novel communication protocol called Adaptively Controlled Two-Hop Communication (AC2C). After an initial local communication round, AC2C employs an adaptive two-hop communication strategy to enable long-range information exchange among agents to boost performance, which is implemented by a communication controller. This controller determines whether each agent should ask for two-hop messages and thus helps to reduce the communication overhead during distributed execution. We evaluate AC2C on three cooperative multi-agent tasks, and the experimental results show that it outperforms relevant baselines with lower communication costs.
summary: Learning communication strategies in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has recently attracted intensive attention. Early studies typically assumed a fully-connected communication topology among agents, which induces high communication costs and may not be feasible. Some recent works have developed adaptive communication strategies to reduce communication overhead, but these methods cannot effectively obtain valuable information from agents that are beyond the communication range. In this paper, we consider a realistic communication model where each agent has a limited communication range, and the communication topology dynamically changes. To facilitate effective agent communication, we propose a novel communication protocol called Adaptively Controlled Two-Hop Communication (AC2C). After an initial local communication round, AC2C employs an adaptive two-hop communication strategy to enable long-range information exchange among agents to boost performance, which is implemented by a communication controller. This controller determines whether each agent should ask for two-hop messages and thus helps to reduce the communication overhead during distributed execution. We evaluate AC2C on three cooperative multi-agent tasks, and the experimental results show that it outperforms relevant baselines with lower communication costs.
abstract_zh: 协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的学习通信策略最近引起了人们的广泛关注。早期的研究通常假设代理之间采用全连接的通信拓扑，这会导致高昂的通信成本并且可能不可行。最近的一些工作已经开发了自适应通信策略来减少通信开销，但这些方法无法有效地从超出通信范围的代理那里获取有价值的信息。在本文中，我们考虑一个现实的通信模型，其中每个代理的通信范围有限，并且通信拓扑动态变化。为了促进有效的代理通信，我们提出了一种称为自适应控制两跳通信（AC2C）的新颖通信协议。在初始本地通信回合之后，AC2C 采用自适应两跳通信策略来实现代理之间的远程信息交换，以提高性能，该策略由通信控制器实现。该控制器确定每个代理是否应该请求两跳消息，从而有助于减少分布式执行期间的通信开销。我们在三个协作多智能体任务上评估了 AC2C，实验结果表明它的性能优于相关基线，并且通信成本更低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应两跳通信协议AC2C，用于解决多智能体强化学习中通信成本高和信息获取受限的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有通信策略要么采用高成本的全连接拓扑，要么无法有效获取通信范围外的信息，导致多智能体协作效率低下。
AI.method: 通过初始本地通信后，采用自适应两跳通信策略，由通信控制器动态决策是否请求两跳信息，降低通信开销。
AI.result: 在三个协作任务中，AC2C相较基线方法实现了更低的通信成本和更优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: AC2C通过动态控制两跳通信，在保证信息传播效率的同时有效降低了通信开销，适用于动态变化的通信环境。

authors_text: Junhyung Go,Jongbin Ryu
title: Spatial Bias for Attention-free Non-local Neural Networks
title_zh: 无注意力非局部神经网络的空间偏差
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the spatial bias to learn global knowledge without self-attention in convolutional neural networks. Owing to the limited receptive field, conventional convolutional neural networks suffer from learning long-range dependencies. Non-local neural networks have struggled to learn global knowledge, but unavoidably have too heavy a network design due to the self-attention operation. Therefore, we propose a fast and lightweight spatial bias that efficiently encodes global knowledge without self-attention on convolutional neural networks. Spatial bias is stacked on the feature map and convolved together to adjust the spatial structure of the convolutional features. Therefore, we learn the global knowledge on the convolution layer directly with very few additional resources. Our method is very fast and lightweight due to the attention-free non-local method while improving the performance of neural networks considerably. Compared to non-local neural networks, the spatial bias use about 10 times fewer parameters while achieving comparable performance with 1.6 ~ 3.3 times more throughput on a very little budget. Furthermore, the spatial bias can be used with conventional non-local neural networks to further improve the performance of the backbone model. We show that the spatial bias achieves competitive performance that improves the classification accuracy by +0.79% and +1.5% on ImageNet-1K and cifar100 datasets. Additionally, we validate our method on the MS-COCO and ADE20K datasets for downstream tasks involving object detection and semantic segmentation.
summary: In this paper, we introduce the spatial bias to learn global knowledge without self-attention in convolutional neural networks. Owing to the limited receptive field, conventional convolutional neural networks suffer from learning long-range dependencies. Non-local neural networks have struggled to learn global knowledge, but unavoidably have too heavy a network design due to the self-attention operation. Therefore, we propose a fast and lightweight spatial bias that efficiently encodes global knowledge without self-attention on convolutional neural networks. Spatial bias is stacked on the feature map and convolved together to adjust the spatial structure of the convolutional features. Therefore, we learn the global knowledge on the convolution layer directly with very few additional resources. Our method is very fast and lightweight due to the attention-free non-local method while improving the performance of neural networks considerably. Compared to non-local neural networks, the spatial bias use about 10 times fewer parameters while achieving comparable performance with 1.6 ~ 3.3 times more throughput on a very little budget. Furthermore, the spatial bias can be used with conventional non-local neural networks to further improve the performance of the backbone model. We show that the spatial bias achieves competitive performance that improves the classification accuracy by +0.79% and +1.5% on ImageNet-1K and cifar100 datasets. Additionally, we validate our method on the MS-COCO and ADE20K datasets for downstream tasks involving object detection and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入了空间偏差来在卷积神经网络中学习全局知识而无需自注意力。由于感受野有限，传统的卷积神经网络难以学习长程依赖性。非局部神经网络一直在努力学习全局知识，但由于自注意力操作，不可避免地会导致网络设计过于繁重。因此，我们提出了一种快速且轻量级的空间偏差，可以有效地编码全局知识，而无需卷积神经网络的自注意力。空间偏差堆叠在特征图上并一起卷积以调整卷积特征的空间结构。因此，我们只需很少的额外资源就可以直接学习卷积层上的全局知识。由于无注意力的非局部方法，我们的方法非常快速且轻量级，同时显着提高了神经网络的性能。与非局部神经网络相比，空间偏差使用的参数减少了约 10 倍，同时以很少的预算实现了可比的性能，吞吐量增加了 1.6 至 3.3 倍。此外，空间偏差可以与传统的非局部神经网络一起使用，以进一步提高骨干模型的性能。我们表明，空间偏差实现了有竞争力的性能，在 ImageNet-1K 和 cifar100 数据集上将分类精度提高了 +0.79% 和 +1.5%。此外，我们还在 MS-COCO 和 ADE20K 数据集上验证了我们的方法，用于涉及对象检测和语义分割的下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需自注意力机制的空间偏置方法，用于在卷积神经网络中高效学习全局知识。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络受限于感受野难以学习长距离依赖，非局部网络虽能学习全局知识但自注意力机制导致网络复杂度高。
AI.method: 通过将空间偏置叠加在特征图并进行卷积操作，直接在卷积层中学习全局知识，避免使用自注意力机制。
AI.result: 相比非局部网络，参数量减少约10倍，ImageNet-1K和cifar100分类准确率分别提升0.79%和1.5%，并在目标检测和语义分割任务中验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持性能的同时显著降低计算量和参数量，适用于多种下游任务且可与传统非局部网络结合使用。

Compared to non-local neural networks, the spatial bias use about 10 times fewer parameters while achieving comparable performance with 1.6 ~ 3.3 times more throughput on a very little budget. Furthermore, the spatial bias can be used with conventional non-local neural networks to further improve the performance of the backbone model. We show that the spatial bias achieves competitive performance that improves the classification accuracy by +0.79% and +1.5% on ImageNet-1K and cifar100 datasets. Additionally, we validate our method on the MS-COCO and ADE20K datasets for downstream tasks involving object detection and semantic segmentation. 在本文中，我们引入了空间偏差来在卷积神经网络中学习全局知识而无需自注意力。由于感受野有限，传统的卷积神经网络难以学习长程依赖性。非局部神经网络一直在努力学习全局知识，但由于自注意力操作，不可避免地会导致网络设计过于繁重。因此，我们提出了一种快速且轻量级的空间偏差，可以有效地编码全局知识，而无需卷积神经网络的自注意力。空间偏差堆叠在特征图上并一起卷积以调整卷积特征的空间结构。因此，我们只需很少的额外资源就可以直接学习卷积层上的全局知识。由于无注意力的非局部方法，我们的方法非常快速且轻量级，同时显着提高了神经网络的性能。与非局部神经网络相比，空间偏差使用的参数减少了约 10 倍，同时以很少的预算实现了可比的性能，吞吐量增加了 1.6 至 3.3 倍。此外，空间偏差可以与传统的非局部神经网络一起使用，以进一步提高骨干模型的性能。我们表明，空间偏差实现了有竞争力的性能，在 ImageNet-1K 和 cifar100 数据集上将分类精度提高了 +0.79% 和 +1.5%。此外，我们还在 MS-COCO 和 ADE20K 数据集上验证了我们的方法，用于涉及对象检测和语义分割的下游任务。 本文提出一种无需自注意力机制的空间偏置方法，用于在卷积神经网络中高效学习全局知识。 Junhyung Go,Jongbin Ryu cs.CV

authors_text: Yuquan Zhang,Yongquan Zhang
title: FedPDC:Federated Learning for Public Dataset Correction
title_zh: FedPDC：联邦学习用于公共数据集校正
abstract: As people pay more and more attention to privacy protection, Federated Learning (FL), as a promising distributed machine learning paradigm, is receiving more and more attention. However, due to the biased distribution of data on devices in real life, federated learning has lower classification accuracy than traditional machine learning in Non-IID scenarios. Although there are many optimization algorithms, the local model aggregation in the parameter server is still relatively traditional. In this paper, a new algorithm FedPDC is proposed to optimize the aggregation mode of local models and the loss function of local training by using the shared data sets in some industries. In many benchmark experiments, FedPDC can effectively improve the accuracy of the global model in the case of extremely unbalanced data distribution, while ensuring the privacy of the client data. At the same time, the accuracy improvement of FedPDC does not bring additional communication costs.
summary: As people pay more and more attention to privacy protection, Federated Learning (FL), as a promising distributed machine learning paradigm, is receiving more and more attention. However, due to the biased distribution of data on devices in real life, federated learning has lower classification accuracy than traditional machine learning in Non-IID scenarios. Although there are many optimization algorithms, the local model aggregation in the parameter server is still relatively traditional. In this paper, a new algorithm FedPDC is proposed to optimize the aggregation mode of local models and the loss function of local training by using the shared data sets in some industries. In many benchmark experiments, FedPDC can effectively improve the accuracy of the global model in the case of extremely unbalanced data distribution, while ensuring the privacy of the client data. At the same time, the accuracy improvement of FedPDC does not bring additional communication costs.
abstract_zh: 随着人们对隐私保护的越来越重视，联邦学习（FL）作为一种很有前景的分布式机器学习范式，越来越受到人们的关注。然而，由于现实生活中数据在设备上的分布存在偏差，联邦学习在非独立同分布场景下的分类精度低于传统机器学习。虽然优化算法有很多，但参数服务器中的局部模型聚合仍然比较传统。本文提出了一种新算法FedPDC，利用部分行业的共享数据集来优化本地模型的聚合模式和本地训练的损失函数。在很多基准实验中，FedPDC能够在数据分布极不平衡的情况下有效提高全局模型的准确性，同时保证客户端数据的隐私性。同时，FedPDC的准确性提升并不会带来额外的通信成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedPDC算法，通过优化联邦学习中的本地模型聚合方式和损失函数，解决非独立同分布场景下的数据偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中设备数据分布存在偏差导致联邦学习准确率低于传统方法，且现有参数服务器的模型聚合方式较为传统，难以应对极端不平衡数据分布。
AI.method: 利用行业共享数据集优化本地模型聚合策略及损失函数设计，改进联邦学习过程中的参数更新机制。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，FedPDC在极端不平衡数据分布下显著提升全局模型准确率，同时保持客户端数据隐私且不增加通信开销。
AI.conclusion: FedPDC通过创新的聚合与损失函数优化，在保证隐私的前提下有效解决非独立同分布场景下的联邦学习性能瓶颈。

authors_text: Natalya Ivanchuk,Peter Kogut,Petro Martyniuk
title: Data fusion of satellite imagery for generation of daily cloud free images at high resolution level
title_zh: 卫星图像的数据融合，用于生成高分辨率的每日云免费图像
abstract: In this paper we discuss a new variational approach to the Date Fusion problem of multi-spectral satellite images from Sentinel-2 and MODIS that have been captured at different resolution level and, arguably, on different days. The crucial point of our approach that the MODIS image is cloud-free whereas the images from Sentinel-2 can be corrupted by clouds or noise.
summary: In this paper we discuss a new variational approach to the Date Fusion problem of multi-spectral satellite images from Sentinel-2 and MODIS that have been captured at different resolution level and, arguably, on different days. The crucial point of our approach that the MODIS image is cloud-free whereas the images from Sentinel-2 can be corrupted by clouds or noise.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们讨论了一种新的变分方法，用于解决来自 Sentinel-2 和 MODIS 的多光谱卫星图像的数据融合问题，这些图像是在不同的分辨率级别（可以说是在不同的日期）捕获的。我们方法的关键点是 MODIS 图像是无云的，而 Sentinel-2 的图像可能会被云或噪声损坏。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种变分方法，融合Sentinel-2和MODIS多光谱卫星影像，生成高分辨率的每日无云图像。
AI.motivation: Sentinel-2影像受云层和噪声影响，而MODIS影像虽无云但分辨率较低，需融合两者优势以获得高质量无云图像。
AI.method: 基于变分优化框架，利用MODIS的无云特性与Sentinel-2的高分辨率数据进行多尺度融合。
AI.result: 成功生成高分辨率无云图像，有效保留地表特征并消除云层干扰。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高分辨率的同时实现无云影像生成，为遥感数据应用提供可靠支持。

authors_text: Yuki Kondo,Norimichi Ukita
title: Joint Learning of Blind Super-Resolution and Crack Segmentation for Realistic Degraded Images
title_zh: 真实退化图像的盲超分辨率和裂纹分割联合学习
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement (TIM) 2024. The project page is located at https://yuki-11.github.io/CSBSR-project-page/
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement (TIM) 2024. The project page is located at https://yuki-11.github.io/CSBSR-project-page/
abstract: This paper proposes crack segmentation augmented by super resolution (SR) with deep neural networks. In the proposed method, a SR network is jointly trained with a binary segmentation network in an end-to-end manner. This joint learning allows the SR network to be optimized for improving segmentation results. For realistic scenarios, the SR network is extended from non-blind to blind for processing a low-resolution image degraded by unknown blurs. The joint network is improved by our proposed two extra paths that further encourage the mutual optimization between SR and segmentation. Comparative experiments with State of The Art (SoTA) segmentation methods demonstrate the superiority of our joint learning, and various ablation studies prove the effects of our contributions.
summary: This paper proposes crack segmentation augmented by super resolution (SR) with deep neural networks. In the proposed method, a SR network is jointly trained with a binary segmentation network in an end-to-end manner. This joint learning allows the SR network to be optimized for improving segmentation results. For realistic scenarios, the SR network is extended from non-blind to blind for processing a low-resolution image degraded by unknown blurs. The joint network is improved by our proposed two extra paths that further encourage the mutual optimization between SR and segmentation. Comparative experiments with State of The Art (SoTA) segmentation methods demonstrate the superiority of our joint learning, and various ablation studies prove the effects of our contributions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了通过深度神经网络的超分辨率（SR）增强的裂纹分割。在所提出的方法中，SR网络与二进制分割网络以端到端的方式联合训练。这种联合学习可以优化 SR 网络以改善分割结果。对于现实场景，SR网络从非盲扩展到盲，以处理因未知模糊而降级的低分辨率图像。我们提出的两条额外路径改进了联合网络，进一步鼓励 SR 和分割之间的相互优化。与最先进（SoTA）分割方法的比较实验证明了我们联合学习的优越性，各种消融研究证明了我们贡献的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合盲超分辨率与裂缝分割的联合学习方法，用于处理真实退化图像。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理超分辨率和裂缝分割，导致信息丢失且难以应对未知模糊的低分辨率图像。
AI.method: 通过端到端联合训练超分辨率网络与二值分割网络，并扩展为盲超分辨率处理未知模糊，引入两条额外路径促进双向优化。
AI.result: 实验表明联合学习方法优于现有分割技术，消融实验证明了设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合学习框架能有效提升真实退化图像的裂缝分割性能，结构设计增强了SR与分割的协同优化。

For realistic scenarios, the SR network is extended from non-blind to blind for processing a low-resolution image degraded by unknown blurs. Comparative experiments with State of The Art (SoTA) segmentation methods demonstrate the superiority of our joint learning, and various ablation studies prove the effects of our contributions. 本文提出了通过深度神经网络的超分辨率（SR）增强的裂纹分割。在所提出的方法中，SR网络与二进制分割网络以端到端的方式联合训练。这种联合学习可以优化 SR 网络以改善分割结果。对于现实场景，SR网络从非盲扩展到盲，以处理因未知模糊而降级的低分辨率图像。我们提出的两条额外路径改进了联合网络，进一步鼓励 SR 和分割之间的相互优化。与最先进（SoTA）分割方法的比较实验证明了我们联合学习的优越性，各种消融研究证明了我们贡献的效果。 本文提出了一种结合盲超分辨率与裂缝分割的联合学习方法，用于处理真实退化图像。 Yuki Kondo,Norimichi Ukita cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Shumpei Takezaki,Kiyohito Tanaka,Seiichi Uchida,Takeaki Kadota
title: Disease Severity Regression with Continuous Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过连续数据增强进行疾病严重程度回归
abstract: Disease severity regression by a convolutional neural network (CNN) for medical images requires a sufficient number of image samples labeled with severity levels. Conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN)-based data augmentation (DA) is a possible solution, but it encounters two issues. The first issue is that existing cGANs cannot deal with real-valued severity levels as their conditions, and the second is that the severity of the generated images is not fully reliable. We propose continuous DA as a solution to the two issues. Our method uses continuous severity GAN to generate images at real-valued severity levels and dataset-disjoint multi-objective optimization to deal with the second issue. Our method was evaluated for estimating ulcerative colitis (UC) severity of endoscopic images and achieved higher classification performance than conventional DA methods.
summary: Disease severity regression by a convolutional neural network (CNN) for medical images requires a sufficient number of image samples labeled with severity levels. Conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN)-based data augmentation (DA) is a possible solution, but it encounters two issues. The first issue is that existing cGANs cannot deal with real-valued severity levels as their conditions, and the second is that the severity of the generated images is not fully reliable. We propose continuous DA as a solution to the two issues. Our method uses continuous severity GAN to generate images at real-valued severity levels and dataset-disjoint multi-objective optimization to deal with the second issue. Our method was evaluated for estimating ulcerative colitis (UC) severity of endoscopic images and achieved higher classification performance than conventional DA methods.
abstract_zh: 通过卷积神经网络（CNN）对医学图像进行疾病严重程度回归需要足够数量的标记有严重程度级别的图像样本。基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的数据增强（DA）是一种可能的解决方案，但它遇到了两个问题。第一个问题是现有的 cGAN 无法处理真实值的严重性级别作为其条件，第二个问题是生成的图像的严重性并不完全可靠。我们建议持续发展议程作为这两个问题的解决方案。我们的方法使用连续严重性 GAN 来生成实值严重性级别的图像，并使用数据集不相交的多目标优化来处理第二个问题。我们的方法用于评估内窥镜图像的溃疡性结肠炎 (UC) 严重程度，并取得了比传统 DA 方法更高的分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种连续数据增强方法，用于解决医学图像中疾病严重程度回归问题，克服传统cGAN在处理实数值严重程度标签和生成图像可靠性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有cGAN无法处理连续值严重程度标签且生成图像的严重程度不可靠，导致医学图像分析中数据不足问题难以解决。
AI.method: 设计连续严重程度GAN生成任意实数值标签的图像，并通过数据集独立多目标优化提升生成图像的可靠性。
AI.result: 在溃疡性结肠炎内镜图像的严重程度估计任务中，该方法分类性能优于传统数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 连续数据增强方法有效解决了医学图像严重程度回归中的关键问题，为数据不足场景提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Liangqi Zhang,Yihao Luo,Xiang Cao,Haibo Shen,Tianjiang Wang
title: Frequency and Scale Perspectives of Feature Extraction
title_zh: 特征提取的频率和规模视角
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved superior performance but still lack clarity about the nature and properties of feature extraction. In this paper, by analyzing the sensitivity of neural networks to frequencies and scales, we find that neural networks not only have low- and medium-frequency biases but also prefer different frequency bands for different classes, and the scale of objects influences the preferred frequency bands. These observations lead to the hypothesis that neural networks must learn the ability to extract features at various scales and frequencies. To corroborate this hypothesis, we propose a network architecture based on Gaussian derivatives, which extracts features by constructing scale space and employing partial derivatives as local feature extraction operators to separate high-frequency information. This manually designed method of extracting features from different scales allows our GSSDNets to achieve comparable accuracy with vanilla networks on various datasets.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved superior performance but still lack clarity about the nature and properties of feature extraction. In this paper, by analyzing the sensitivity of neural networks to frequencies and scales, we find that neural networks not only have low- and medium-frequency biases but also prefer different frequency bands for different classes, and the scale of objects influences the preferred frequency bands. These observations lead to the hypothesis that neural networks must learn the ability to extract features at various scales and frequencies. To corroborate this hypothesis, we propose a network architecture based on Gaussian derivatives, which extracts features by constructing scale space and employing partial derivatives as local feature extraction operators to separate high-frequency information. This manually designed method of extracting features from different scales allows our GSSDNets to achieve comparable accuracy with vanilla networks on various datasets.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已经取得了优异的性能，但仍然缺乏对特征提取的本质和特性的清晰认识。本文通过分析神经网络对频率和尺度的敏感性，发现神经网络不仅存在低频和中频偏差，而且对不同类别偏好不同的频段，并且物体的尺度影响偏好频段。这些观察结果得出这样的假设：神经网络必须学习以不同尺度和频率提取特征的能力。为了证实这一假设，我们提出了一种基于高斯导数的网络架构，通过构建尺度空间并采用偏导数作为局部特征提取算子来分离高频信息来提取特征。这种手动设计的从不同尺度提取特征的方法使我们的 GSSDNet 在各种数据集上达到与普通网络相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文从频率和尺度角度分析卷积神经网络（CNN）的特征提取机制，并提出基于高斯导数的网络架构以提升特征提取能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在性能上表现优异，但其特征提取的本质和特性仍不明确，尤其缺乏对频率和尺度敏感性的系统研究。
AI.method: 通过分析网络对频率和尺度的敏感性，提出基于高斯导数的GSSDNets架构，利用尺度空间构建和偏导数操作符分离高频信息。
AI.result: GSSDNets在多个数据集上实现了与传统网络相当的准确率，验证了多尺度多频率特征提取的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 手动设计的尺度空间特征提取方法能够有效捕捉不同频率和尺度的信息，为理解CNN特征提取机制提供了新视角。

authors_text: Yong-Hyun Park,Mingi Kwon,Junghyo Jo,Youngjung Uh
title: Unsupervised Discovery of Semantic Latent Directions in Diffusion Models
title_zh: 扩散模型中语义潜在方向的无监督发现
abstract: Despite the success of diffusion models (DMs), we still lack a thorough understanding of their latent space. While image editing with GANs builds upon latent space, DMs rely on editing the conditions such as text prompts. We present an unsupervised method to discover interpretable editing directions for the latent variables $\mathbf{x}_t \in \mathcal{X}$ of DMs. Our method adopts Riemannian geometry between $\mathcal{X}$ and the intermediate feature maps $\mathcal{H}$ of the U-Nets to provide a deep understanding over the geometrical structure of $\mathcal{X}$. The discovered semantic latent directions mostly yield disentangled attribute changes, and they are globally consistent across different samples. Furthermore, editing in earlier timesteps edits coarse attributes, while ones in later timesteps focus on high-frequency details. We define the curvedness of a line segment between samples to show that $\mathcal{X}$ is a curved manifold. Experiments on different baselines and datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method even on Stable Diffusion. Our source code will be publicly available for the future researchers.
summary: Despite the success of diffusion models (DMs), we still lack a thorough understanding of their latent space. While image editing with GANs builds upon latent space, DMs rely on editing the conditions such as text prompts. We present an unsupervised method to discover interpretable editing directions for the latent variables $\mathbf{x}_t \in \mathcal{X}$ of DMs. Our method adopts Riemannian geometry between $\mathcal{X}$ and the intermediate feature maps $\mathcal{H}$ of the U-Nets to provide a deep understanding over the geometrical structure of $\mathcal{X}$. The discovered semantic latent directions mostly yield disentangled attribute changes, and they are globally consistent across different samples. Furthermore, editing in earlier timesteps edits coarse attributes, while ones in later timesteps focus on high-frequency details. We define the curvedness of a line segment between samples to show that $\mathcal{X}$ is a curved manifold. Experiments on different baselines and datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method even on Stable Diffusion. Our source code will be publicly available for the future researchers.
abstract_zh: 尽管扩散模型（DM）取得了成功，但我们仍然缺乏对其潜在空间的透彻了解。 GAN 的图像编辑建立在潜在空间之上，而 DM 则依赖于编辑文本提示等条件。我们提出了一种无监督方法来发现 DM 的潜在变量 $\mathbf{x}_t \in \mathcal{X}$ 的可解释编辑方向。我们的方法在$\mathcal{X}$和U-Nets的中间特征图$\mathcal{H}$之间采用黎曼几何，以提供对$\mathcal{X}$几何结构的深入理解。发现的语义潜在方向主要产生解缠结的属性变化，并且它们在不同样本之间是全局一致的。此外，在较早的时间步长中进行编辑会编辑粗略属性，而在较晚的时间步长中进行编辑则侧重于高频细节。我们定义样本之间的线段的弯曲度来表明 $\mathcal{X}$ 是弯曲流形。对不同基线和数据集的实验证明了我们的方法即使在稳定扩散上也是有效的。我们的源代码将向未来的研究人员公开。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种无监督方法，用于发现扩散模型潜在空间中的语义方向，以实现可解释的图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型的潜在空间结构尚不明确，现有方法依赖条件编辑而非直接操作潜在变量，缺乏对潜在空间几何特性的深入分析。
AI.method: 结合黎曼几何与U-Net中间特征图，分析潜在空间几何结构，通过曲率定义揭示流形特性，并发现跨样本一致的语义编辑方向。
AI.result: 发现的语义方向可实现属性解耦编辑，早期时间步影响粗粒度属性，晚期聚焦细节；方法在多个基准模型（包括Stable Diffusion）上验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次系统揭示扩散模型潜在空间的几何特性，为潜在变量编辑提供新范式，代码将公开促进后续研究。

ai_content_json.method: 结合黎曼几何与U-Net中间特征图，分析潜在空间几何结构，通过曲率定义揭示流形特性，并发现跨样本一致的语义编辑方向。
ai_content_json.result: 发现的语义方向可实现属性解耦编辑，早期时间步影响粗粒度属性，晚期聚焦细节；方法在多个基准模型（包括Stable Diffusion）上验证有效。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法首次系统揭示扩散模型潜在空间的几何特性，为潜在变量编辑提供新范式，代码将公开促进后续研究。

search_text: Unsupervised Discovery of Semantic Latent Directions in Diffusion Models 扩散模型中语义潜在方向的无监督发现 Despite the success of diffusion models (DMs), we still lack a thorough understanding of their latent space. While image editing with GANs builds upon latent space, DMs rely on editing the conditions such as text prompts. We present an unsupervised method to discover interpretable editing directions for the latent variables $\mathbf{x}_t \in \mathcal{X}$ of DMs. Our method adopts Riemannian geometry between $\mathcal{X}$ and the intermediate feature maps $\mathcal{H}$ of the U-Nets to provide a deep understanding over the geometrical structure of $\mathcal{X}$. The discovered semantic latent directions mostly yield disentangled attribute changes, and they are globally consistent across different samples. Furthermore, editing in earlier timesteps edits coarse attributes, while ones in later timesteps focus on high-frequency details. We define the curvedness of a line segment between samples to show that $\mathcal{X}$ is a curved manifold. Experiments on different baselines and datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method even on Stable Diffusion. Our source code will be publicly available for the future researchers. 尽管扩散模型（DM）取得了成功，但我们仍然缺乏对其潜在空间的透彻了解。 GAN 的图像编辑建立在潜在空间之上，而 DM 则依赖于编辑文本提示等条件。我们提出了一种无监督方法来发现 DM 的潜在变量 $\mathbf{x}_t \in \mathcal{X}$ 的可解释编辑方向。我们的方法在$\mathcal{X}$和U-Nets的中间特征图$\mathcal{H}$之间采用黎曼几何，以提供对$\mathcal{X}$几何结构的深入理解。发现的语义潜在方向主要产生解缠结的属性变化，并且它们在不同样本之间是全局一致的。此外，在较早的时间步长中进行编辑会编辑粗略属性，而在较晚的时间步长中进行编辑则侧重于高频细节。我们定义样本之间的线段的弯曲度来表明 $\mathcal{X}$ 是弯曲流形。对不同基线和数据集的实验证明了我们的方法即使在稳定扩散上也是有效的。我们的源代码将向未来的研究人员公开。 该论文提出一种无监督方法，用于发现扩散模型潜在空间中的语义方向，以实现可解释的图像编辑。 Yong-Hyun Park,Mingi Kwon,Junghyo Jo,Youngjung Uh cs.CV

authors_text: Svante Janson
title: The number of descendants in a random directed acyclic graph
title_zh: 随机有向无环图中的后代数量
abstract: We consider a well known model of random directed acyclic graphs of order $n$, obtained by recursively adding vertices, where each new vertex has a fixed outdegree $d\ge2$ and the endpoints of the $d$ edges from it are chosen uniformly at random among previously existing vertices. Our main results concern the number $X$ of vertices that are descendants of $n$. We show that $X/\sqrt n$ converges in distribution; the limit distribution is, up to a constant factor, given by the $d$th root of a Gamma distributed variable. $Γ(d/(d-1))$. When $d=2$, the limit distribution can also be described as a chi distribution $χ(4)$. We also show convergence of moments, and find thus the asymptotics of the mean and higher moments.
summary: We consider a well known model of random directed acyclic graphs of order $n$, obtained by recursively adding vertices, where each new vertex has a fixed outdegree $d\ge2$ and the endpoints of the $d$ edges from it are chosen uniformly at random among previously existing vertices. Our main results concern the number $X$ of vertices that are descendants of $n$. We show that $X/\sqrt n$ converges in distribution; the limit distribution is, up to a constant factor, given by the $d$th root of a Gamma distributed variable. $Γ(d/(d-1))$. When $d=2$, the limit distribution can also be described as a chi distribution $χ(4)$. We also show convergence of moments, and find thus the asymptotics of the mean and higher moments.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个众所周知的$n$阶随机有向无环图模型，通过递归添加顶点获得，其中每个新顶点都有一个固定的出度$d\ge2$，并且$d$边的端点是在先前存在的顶点中均匀随机选择的。我们的主要结果涉及作为 $n$ 后代的顶点数量 $X$。我们证明 $X/\sqrt n$ 在分布上收敛；极限分布在常数因子范围内由 Gamma 分布变量的 $d$th 根给出。 $Г(d/(d-1))$。当$d=2$时，极限分布也可以描述为卡方分布$χ(4)$。我们还展示了矩的收敛性，并因此找到了平均矩和高矩的渐进性。

AI.tldr: 研究随机有向无环图中某个顶点后代数量的分布特性。
AI.motivation: 分析随机有向无环图的结构特性，为理解复杂网络中的传播和依赖关系提供理论基础。
AI.method: 通过递归构建随机图模型，结合概率论方法分析后代数量的渐进行为及分布收敛性。
AI.result: 证明后代数量标准化后收敛于Gamma分布的d次根（或chi分布当d=2时），并推导出矩的渐近表达式。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了随机有向无环图中后代数量的尺度规律，为相关网络模型的分析提供数学工具。

authors_text: Shancong Mou,Xiaoyi Gu,Meng Cao,Haoping Bai,Ping Huang,Jiulong Shan,Jianjun Shi
title: RGI: robust GAN-inversion for mask-free image inpainting and unsupervised pixel-wise anomaly detection
title_zh: RGI：用于无掩模图像修复和无监督像素异常检测的鲁棒 GAN 反转
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs), trained on a large-scale image dataset, can be a good approximator of the natural image manifold. GAN-inversion, using a pre-trained generator as a deep generative prior, is a promising tool for image restoration under corruptions. However, the performance of GAN-inversion can be limited by a lack of robustness to unknown gross corruptions, i.e., the restored image might easily deviate from the ground truth. In this paper, we propose a Robust GAN-inversion (RGI) method with a provable robustness guarantee to achieve image restoration under unknown \textit{gross} corruptions, where a small fraction of pixels are completely corrupted. Under mild assumptions, we show that the restored image and the identified corrupted region mask converge asymptotically to the ground truth. Moreover, we extend RGI to Relaxed-RGI (R-RGI) for generator fine-tuning to mitigate the gap between the GAN learned manifold and the true image manifold while avoiding trivial overfitting to the corrupted input image, which further improves the image restoration and corrupted region mask identification performance. The proposed RGI/R-RGI method unifies two important applications with state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance: (i) mask-free semantic inpainting, where the corruptions are unknown missing regions, the restored background can be used to restore the missing content; (ii) unsupervised pixel-wise anomaly detection, where the corruptions are unknown anomalous regions, the retrieved mask can be used as the anomalous region's segmentation mask.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs), trained on a large-scale image dataset, can be a good approximator of the natural image manifold. GAN-inversion, using a pre-trained generator as a deep generative prior, is a promising tool for image restoration under corruptions. However, the performance of GAN-inversion can be limited by a lack of robustness to unknown gross corruptions, i.e., the restored image might easily deviate from the ground truth. In this paper, we propose a Robust GAN-inversion (RGI) method with a provable robustness guarantee to achieve image restoration under unknown \textit{gross} corruptions, where a small fraction of pixels are completely corrupted. Under mild assumptions, we show that the restored image and the identified corrupted region mask converge asymptotically to the ground truth. Moreover, we extend RGI to Relaxed-RGI (R-RGI) for generator fine-tuning to mitigate the gap between the GAN learned manifold and the true image manifold while avoiding trivial overfitting to the corrupted input image, which further improves the image restoration and corrupted region mask identification performance. The proposed RGI/R-RGI method unifies two important applications with state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance: (i) mask-free semantic inpainting, where the corruptions are unknown missing regions, the restored background can be used to restore the missing content; (ii) unsupervised pixel-wise anomaly detection, where the corruptions are unknown anomalous regions, the retrieved mask can be used as the anomalous region's segmentation mask.
abstract_zh: 在大规模图像数据集上训练的生成对抗网络（GAN）可以很好地逼近自然图像流形。 GAN 反转使用预先训练的生成器作为深度生成先验，是一种很有前途的腐败图像恢复工具。然而，GAN 反转的性能可能会因缺乏对未知严重损坏的鲁棒性而受到限制，即恢复的图像可能很容易偏离真实情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种鲁棒的 GAN 反转（RGI）方法，具有可证明的鲁棒性保证，可以在未知的 \textit{gross} 损坏（其中一小部分像素完全损坏）下实现图像恢复。在温和的假设下，我们表明恢复的图像和识别的损坏区域掩模渐近收敛于地面真相。此外，我们将 RGI 扩展到 Relaxed-RGI (R-RGI)，用于生成器微调，以缩小 GAN 学习流形与真实图像流形之间的差距，同时避免对损坏的输入图像的轻微过度拟合，这进一步提高了图像恢复和损坏区域掩模识别性能。所提出的 RGI/R-RGI 方法将两个重要的应用与最先进的（SOTA）性能结合起来：（i）无掩模语义修复，其中损坏是未知的丢失区域，恢复的背景可用于恢复丢失的内容； (ii)无监督的逐像素异常检测，其中损坏是未知的异常区域，检索到的掩模可以用作异常区域的分割掩模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的GAN反演方法RGI，用于无掩码图像修复和无监督像素级异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN反演方法在处理未知严重损坏时鲁棒性不足，导致恢复图像偏离真实值，需提升其对未知损坏的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出RGI方法，通过可证明的鲁棒性保证恢复图像和损坏区域掩码渐近收敛至真实值，并扩展为R-RGI以微调生成器，减少生成流形与真实流形的差距。
AI.result: RGI/R-RGI在无掩码语义修复和无监督像素级异常检测任务中均达到SOTA性能，恢复图像和损坏区域识别效果显著。
AI.conclusion: RGI/R-RGI统一了两项重要应用，通过处理未知损坏实现了高质量图像修复与异常检测，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Max Lamparth,Anka Reuel
title: Analyzing And Editing Inner Mechanisms Of Backdoored Language Models
title_zh: 分析和编辑后门语言模型的内部机制
abstract: Poisoning of data sets is a potential security threat to large language models that can lead to backdoored models. A description of the internal mechanisms of backdoored language models and how they process trigger inputs, e.g., when switching to toxic language, has yet to be found. In this work, we study the internal representations of transformer-based backdoored language models and determine early-layer MLP modules as most important for the backdoor mechanism in combination with the initial embedding projection. We use this knowledge to remove, insert, and modify backdoor mechanisms with engineered replacements that reduce the MLP module outputs to essentials for the backdoor mechanism. To this end, we introduce PCP ablation, where we replace transformer modules with low-rank matrices based on the principal components of their activations. We demonstrate our results on backdoored toy, backdoored large, and non-backdoored open-source models. We show that we can improve the backdoor robustness of large language models by locally constraining individual modules during fine-tuning on potentially poisonous data sets. Trigger warning: Offensive language.
summary: Poisoning of data sets is a potential security threat to large language models that can lead to backdoored models. A description of the internal mechanisms of backdoored language models and how they process trigger inputs, e.g., when switching to toxic language, has yet to be found. In this work, we study the internal representations of transformer-based backdoored language models and determine early-layer MLP modules as most important for the backdoor mechanism in combination with the initial embedding projection. We use this knowledge to remove, insert, and modify backdoor mechanisms with engineered replacements that reduce the MLP module outputs to essentials for the backdoor mechanism. To this end, we introduce PCP ablation, where we replace transformer modules with low-rank matrices based on the principal components of their activations. We demonstrate our results on backdoored toy, backdoored large, and non-backdoored open-source models. We show that we can improve the backdoor robustness of large language models by locally constraining individual modules during fine-tuning on potentially poisonous data sets. Trigger warning: Offensive language.
abstract_zh: 数据集中毒是对大型语言模型的潜在安全威胁，可能导致模型出现后门。尚未找到对后门语言模型的内部机制以及它们如何处理触发输入（例如，当切换到有毒语言时）的描述。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于 Transformer 的后门语言模型的内部表示，并结合初始嵌入投影确定早期层 MLP 模块对于后门机制最重要。我们利用这些知识来删除、插入和修改后门机制，并通过工程替换将 MLP 模块输出减少到后门机制的必需品。为此，我们引入了 PCP 消融，即根据激活的主要成分，用低秩矩阵替换变压器模块。我们在有后门的玩具、有后门的大型模型和无后门的开源模型上展示了我们的结果。我们证明，在对潜在有毒数据集进行微调时，可以通过局部约束各个模块来提高大型语言模型的后门鲁棒性。触发警告：攻击性语言。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了后门语言模型的内部机制，并提出通过编辑关键模块来增强其安全性。
AI.motivation: 数据中毒可能导致语言模型被植入后门，但现有研究缺乏对后门机制内部运作原理的深入分析。
AI.method: 通过分析Transformer模型的内部表示，确定早期MLP模块与嵌入投影层是后门机制的关键，提出基于主成分分析的PCP消融方法，用低秩矩阵替换部分模块。
AI.result: 在多个后门模型和开源模型上验证了方法有效性，通过局部约束模块参数可提升模型对有毒输入的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 针对关键模块的结构化编辑能够有效抵御后门攻击，为模型安全加固提供新思路。

authors_text: Hoi Man Lam,W. Jared Walker,Lucas Jonasch,Dimitri Schreiber,Michael C. Yip
title: Design and Mechanics of Cable-Driven Rolling Diaphragm Transmission for High-Transparency Robotic Motion
title_zh: 高透明度机器人运动的电缆驱动滚动膜片传动设计与机理
abstract: Applications of rolling diaphragm transmissions for medical and teleoperated robotics are of great interest, due to the low friction of rolling diaphragms combined with the power density and stiffness of hydraulic transmissions. However, the stiffness-enabling pressure preloads can form a tradeoff against bearing loading in some rolling diaphragm layouts, and transmission setup can be difficult. Utilization of cable drives compliment the rolling diaphragm transmission's advantages, but maintaining cable tension is crucial for optimal and consistent performance. In this paper, a coaxial opposed rolling diaphragm layout with cable drive and an electronic transmission control system are investigated, with a focus on system reliability and scalability. Mechanical features are proposed which enable force balancing, decoupling of transmission pressure from bearing loads, and maintenance of cable tension. Key considerations and procedures for automation of transmission setup, phasing, and operation are also presented. We also present an analysis of system stiffness to identify key compliance contributors, and conduct experiments to validate prototype design performance.
summary: Applications of rolling diaphragm transmissions for medical and teleoperated robotics are of great interest, due to the low friction of rolling diaphragms combined with the power density and stiffness of hydraulic transmissions. However, the stiffness-enabling pressure preloads can form a tradeoff against bearing loading in some rolling diaphragm layouts, and transmission setup can be difficult. Utilization of cable drives compliment the rolling diaphragm transmission's advantages, but maintaining cable tension is crucial for optimal and consistent performance. In this paper, a coaxial opposed rolling diaphragm layout with cable drive and an electronic transmission control system are investigated, with a focus on system reliability and scalability. Mechanical features are proposed which enable force balancing, decoupling of transmission pressure from bearing loads, and maintenance of cable tension. Key considerations and procedures for automation of transmission setup, phasing, and operation are also presented. We also present an analysis of system stiffness to identify key compliance contributors, and conduct experiments to validate prototype design performance.
abstract_zh: 由于滚动隔膜的低摩擦性以及液压传动的功率密度和刚度，滚动隔膜传动在医疗和遥控机器人领域的应用引起了人们的极大兴趣。然而，在某些滚动膜片布局中，支持刚度的压力预载可能会与轴承载荷形成权衡，并且传输设置可能很困难。电缆驱动器的使用补充了滚动膜片传输的优势，但保持电缆张力对于获得最佳和一致的性能至关重要。在本文中，研究了具有电缆驱动的同轴相对滚动隔膜布局和电子传输控制系统，重点是系统可靠性和可扩展性。提出的机械特征能够实现力平衡、传输压力与轴承载荷的解耦以及维持电缆张力。还介绍了传输设置、定相和操作自动化的关键考虑因素和程序。我们还对系统刚度进行了分析，以确定关键的合规性贡献者，并进行实验来验证原型设计性能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并分析了一种结合电缆驱动的同轴对置滚动隔膜传动系统，旨在解决其设置困难、电缆张力维持及系统刚度与轴承负载的平衡问题，以提升医疗和远程操作机器人的运动性能。
AI.motivation: 滚动隔膜传动虽具有低摩擦和高功率密度优势，但预加载压力与轴承负载的矛盾及电缆张力控制难题限制了其应用，需通过创新设计提升系统可靠性与可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出力平衡机械结构、压力与轴承负载解耦设计及电缆张力维持方案，结合自动化设置流程、相位控制方法，并通过系统刚度分析与原型实验验证性能。
AI.result: 实验验证了原型设计的有效性，明确了系统刚度的关键影响因素，证明了所提方法在可靠性和可扩展性上的优势，满足高透明度机器人运动需求。
AI.conclusion: 该设计有效解决了滚动隔膜传动的设置与张力控制难题，为高精度医疗机器人提供了可靠传动方案，同时强调了自动化控制与刚度分析在系统优化中的重要性。

authors_text: Dan Qiao,Ming Yin,Yu-Xiang Wang
title: Logarithmic Switching Cost in Reinforcement Learning beyond Linear MDPs
title_zh: 超越线性 MDP 的强化学习中的对数切换成本
abstract: In many real-life reinforcement learning (RL) problems, deploying new policies is costly. In those scenarios, algorithms must solve exploration (which requires adaptivity) while switching the deployed policy sparsely (which limits adaptivity). In this paper, we go beyond the existing state-of-the-art on this problem that focused on linear Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) by considering linear Bellman-complete MDPs with low inherent Bellman error. We propose the ELEANOR-LowSwitching algorithm that achieves the near-optimal regret with a switching cost logarithmic in the number of episodes and linear in the time-horizon $H$ and feature dimension $d$. We also prove a lower bound proportional to $dH$ among all algorithms with sublinear regret. In addition, we show the ``doubling trick'' used in ELEANOR-LowSwitching can be further leveraged for the generalized linear function approximation, under which we design a sample-efficient algorithm with near-optimal switching cost.
summary: In many real-life reinforcement learning (RL) problems, deploying new policies is costly. In those scenarios, algorithms must solve exploration (which requires adaptivity) while switching the deployed policy sparsely (which limits adaptivity). In this paper, we go beyond the existing state-of-the-art on this problem that focused on linear Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) by considering linear Bellman-complete MDPs with low inherent Bellman error. We propose the ELEANOR-LowSwitching algorithm that achieves the near-optimal regret with a switching cost logarithmic in the number of episodes and linear in the time-horizon $H$ and feature dimension $d$. We also prove a lower bound proportional to $dH$ among all algorithms with sublinear regret. In addition, we show the ``doubling trick'' used in ELEANOR-LowSwitching can be further leveraged for the generalized linear function approximation, under which we design a sample-efficient algorithm with near-optimal switching cost.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实生活中的强化学习 (RL) 问题中，部署新策略的成本很高。在这些场景中，算法必须解决探索问题（这需要自适应性），同时稀疏地切换部署的策略（这限制了自适应性）。在本文中，我们通过考虑具有低固有贝尔曼误差的线性贝尔曼完全 MDP，超越了该问题上现有的最先进技术，该问题专注于线性马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)。我们提出了 ELEANOR-LowSwitching 算法，该算法实现了接近最优的后悔，其切换成本在事件数上呈对数，在时间范围 $H$ 和特征维度 $d$ 上呈线性。我们还证明了所有具有亚线性遗憾的算法中与 $dH$ 成比例的下界。此外，我们还展示了 ELEANOR-LowSwitching 中使用的“加倍技巧”可以进一步用于广义线性函数逼近，在此基础上我们设计了一种具有接近最优切换成本的样本高效算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在强化学习中超越线性马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）的对数切换成本问题，提出了一种新的算法以减少策略切换带来的成本。
AI.motivation: 在现实中的强化学习问题中，部署新策略的成本较高，因此需要在探索（需要适应性）和稀疏策略切换（限制适应性）之间取得平衡。现有研究主要集中在线性MDPs，而本文希望扩展到更一般的线性Bellman完备MDPs。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为ELEANOR-LowSwitching的算法，该算法通过利用‘doubling trick’技术，在低内在Bellman误差的线性Bellman完备MDPs中实现近似最优的遗憾，并将其扩展到广义线性函数逼近。
AI.result: 该算法在回合数上实现了对数级切换成本，在时间范围H和特征维度d上呈线性增长；同时证明了所有具有次线性遗憾的算法的下界与dH成正比，并展示了‘doubling trick’在广义线性逼近中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文在更一般的MDPs框架下解决了策略切换成本问题，提出了高效的算法并证明了理论下界，为强化学习中的稀疏策略更新提供了新思路。

search_text: Logarithmic Switching Cost in Reinforcement Learning beyond Linear MDPs 超越线性 MDP 的强化学习中的对数切换成本 In many real-life reinforcement learning (RL) problems, deploying new policies is costly. In those scenarios, algorithms must solve exploration (which requires adaptivity) while switching the deployed policy sparsely (which limits adaptivity). In this paper, we go beyond the existing state-of-the-art on this problem that focused on linear Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) by considering linear Bellman-complete MDPs with low inherent Bellman error. We propose the ELEANOR-LowSwitching algorithm that achieves the near-optimal regret with a switching cost logarithmic in the number of episodes and linear in the time-horizon $H$ and feature dimension $d$. We also prove a lower bound proportional to $dH$ among all algorithms with sublinear regret. In addition, we show the ``doubling trick'' used in ELEANOR-LowSwitching can be further leveraged for the generalized linear function approximation, under which we design a sample-efficient algorithm with near-optimal switching cost. 在许多现实生活中的强化学习 (RL) 问题中，部署新策略的成本很高。在这些场景中，算法必须解决探索问题（这需要自适应性），同时稀疏地切换部署的策略（这限制了自适应性）。在本文中，我们通过考虑具有低固有贝尔曼误差的线性贝尔曼完全 MDP，超越了该问题上现有的最先进技术，该问题专注于线性马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)。我们提出了 ELEANOR-LowSwitching 算法，该算法实现了接近最优的后悔，其切换成本在事件数上呈对数，在时间范围 $H$ 和特征维度 $d$ 上呈线性。我们还证明了所有具有亚线性遗憾的算法中与 $dH$ 成比例的下界。此外，我们还展示了 ELEANOR-LowSwitching 中使用的“加倍技巧”可以进一步用于广义线性函数逼近，在此基础上我们设计了一种具有接近最优切换成本的样本高效算法。 本文研究了在强化学习中超越线性马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）的对数切换成本问题，提出了一种新的算法以减少策略切换带来的成本。 Dan Qiao,Ming Yin,Yu-Xiang Wang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Naoya Onizawa,Ryoma Sasaki,Duckgyu Shin,Warren J. Gross,Takahiro Hanyu
title: Stochastic Simulated Quantum Annealing for Fast Solution of Combinatorial Optimization Problems
title_zh: 用于快速解决组合优化问题的随机模拟量子退火
abstract: In this paper, we introduce stochastic simulated quantum annealing (SSQA) for large-scale combinatorial optimization problems. SSQA is designed based on stochastic computing and quantum Monte Carlo, which can simulate quantum annealing (QA) by using multiple replicas of spins (probabilistic bits) in classical computing. The use of stochastic computing leads to an efficient parallel spin-state update algorithm, enabling quick search for a solution around the global minimum energy. Therefore, SSQA realizes quantum-like annealing for large-scale problems and can handle fully connected models in combinatorial optimization, unlike QA. The proposed method is evaluated in MATLAB on graph isomorphism problems, which are typical combinatorial optimization problems. The proposed method achieves a convergence speed an order of magnitude faster than a conventional stochastic simulaated annealing method. Additionally, it can handle a 100-times larger problem size compared to QA and a 25-times larger problem size compared to a traditional SA method, respectively, for similar convergence probabilities.
summary: In this paper, we introduce stochastic simulated quantum annealing (SSQA) for large-scale combinatorial optimization problems. SSQA is designed based on stochastic computing and quantum Monte Carlo, which can simulate quantum annealing (QA) by using multiple replicas of spins (probabilistic bits) in classical computing. The use of stochastic computing leads to an efficient parallel spin-state update algorithm, enabling quick search for a solution around the global minimum energy. Therefore, SSQA realizes quantum-like annealing for large-scale problems and can handle fully connected models in combinatorial optimization, unlike QA. The proposed method is evaluated in MATLAB on graph isomorphism problems, which are typical combinatorial optimization problems. The proposed method achieves a convergence speed an order of magnitude faster than a conventional stochastic simulaated annealing method. Additionally, it can handle a 100-times larger problem size compared to QA and a 25-times larger problem size compared to a traditional SA method, respectively, for similar convergence probabilities.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入了用于大规模组合优化问题的随机模拟量子退火（SSQA）。 SSQA是基于随机计算和量子蒙特卡罗设计的，它可以利用经典计算中自旋的多个副本（概率位）来模拟量子退火（QA）。随机计算的使用带来了高效的并行自旋状态更新算法，能够快速搜索全局最小能量周围的解决方案。因此，与 QA 不同，SSQA 实现了大规模问题的类量子退火，并且可以在组合优化中处理全连接模型。该方法在 MATLAB 中针对图同构问题（典型的组合优化问题）进行了评估。该方法的收敛速度比传统的随机模拟退火方法快一个数量级。此外，在相似的收敛概率下，与 QA 相比，它可以处理大 100 倍的问题规模，与传统 SA 方法相比，它可以处理比传统 SA 方法大 25 倍的问题规模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机计算和量子蒙特卡洛方法的随机模拟量子退火（SSQA）算法，用于解决大规模组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统量子退火（QA）和模拟退火（SA）方法在处理大规模组合优化问题时存在效率低、问题规模受限等不足。
AI.method: 通过经典计算中多副本自旋（概率比特）的随机计算实现量子退火模拟，结合高效并行自旋状态更新算法。
AI.result: 在图同构问题测试中，SSQA收敛速度比传统模拟退火快一个数量级，可处理比QA大100倍、比传统SA大25倍的问题规模。
AI.conclusion: SSQA为大规模组合优化问题提供了高效的量子类似退火解决方案，尤其适用于全连接模型。
